Friends,

It was an honor to join Dan Bongino to discuss a multitude of topics and my run for the U.S. Senate seat in the great state of Alabama.

We talked a lot about the will and dedication of Gary Gordon and Randy Shughart and their bravery that day they saved my life in Somalia. That’s why I promised myself that I would never stop fighting to do better for my family, for my employees, and for my country.
[ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=1bf5f6b65a694fffa241ec948a0e0b11&_e=One7x2JYsiuyPWVn2WnBvRyzeQolm5CTrP6MliV5RVfk40P8YR-SAlQCJO-fKHrosrl-5nNceSkaWx1FtSa7sUfXVWakzy-qkTyfO1qKPaGUY5jiUEOnplwZhfFoQSLJAhZufRxmDQX-D7XKHO5tF-qUJRNF2yFMEfJIjNqWFrctgTGlXAcQklATRg_Fm7NWBtDL-dWFdA0aORe0YfziEQ8K5Hockiax-_OeiIPwqEL-BnLHByeFgpmtGDoYpuDA8A7yG5DiVJ2xKzzYy_dkQ6t3KzJf1OT47ShjmCK_-mWt9S6WTH-9zv658epvaAfqh0IfECFiJ6wXJpGUkE5rZlH4rc42Af8PmUY6lq4XZxKQ1qsxcVKmp5apQka0N8uBvzNIcMPLvfkLveHDoOdkT5fO4ojp6INuNhq_cvrNV2tn0W2_A7vq-T0AoXnyjOI-n-60LSb59wc1LbardMa4KUgBGJUTpc7mr9l_UtoZ0WSRxMirm1i2Pxsm4ceXIwfKInIeaLL57unSV-Dg4AJdXQ%3D%3D)

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’m ready for one more tour to serve my country.

America can’t take any more career politicians and can’t take any more terrible decisions from the Socialist Left under the leadership of Joe Biden.

If you’re committed to saving America from the Left, I hope you’ll rush your support below and join our campaign’s fight to stop career politicians.

Friend,

2021 was an amazing year because of your support and your action. Our campaign made up ground to end the year strong because of your commitment to ensuring that we can put America First Again and make sure that Ohio has a proven senator with a resume of action, instead of just a campaign built off of empty promises.

Your donations gave me the ability and resources to fight to stop the Left’s agenda, and your encouraging words gave me the will to keep fighting. I wouldn’t be able to keep going without your support, and that’s a FACT.

This is why I hate to ask you for your support so soon after you helped me finish 2021 strong, but if you’re able and if you’re willing, could you please rush a donation below, so our campaign has the resources to keep fighting in 2022? We must act now before it’s too late.

body:
If you read one piece of news today, please consider reading the op-ed that I wrote which was published in the Washington Times this morning. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? ---
Fellow American,

If you read one piece of news today, please consider reading the op-ed that I wrote which was published in the Washington Times this morning.

Rather than nominate an individual for the Supreme Court based on gender or race, the president should nominate an individual he believes is eminently qualified for the job; if that individual happens to be a black female, then he should nominate that person because they are the best candidate for the job and for no other reason than that.

**Read my entire op-ed in full below.**

Sincerely, Rod

**President Biden is Undermining Black Achievement**

Reports of Justice Stephen Breyer’s retirement spurred immediate reaction by progressive liberals. Within moments, politicians wasted no time in demanding that President Biden make good on his campaign promise to nominate a black woman to take Breyer’s place. Good intentions aside, promising to nominate the next Supreme Court justice on the basis of her skin color and gender severely undermines the nominee’s lifelong achievements—and those of all Black Americans.**As an attorney and son of Haitian immigrants, I understand the desire to see a black woman on the bench, but it should not come at the expense of her dignity**.

Judges must, above all things, be impartial in the way they treat the parties before them. They must be learned in the laws that they apply. And they must have a strong understanding of the proper function of a judge under our constitutional system. These are the things we should be talking about every time there's a vacancy on the federal bench. But instead of putting judicial philosophy and professional qualifications front and center, **Joe Biden is setting the stage for a three-ring Identity Politics Circus**. Race and gender are the star attractions, judicial philosophy be damned.

What Democratic leadership is doing right now has nothing to do with putting a black woman on the court for the sake of "representation." **It's pure political theater**. They are setting the stage for a spectacle in which Democrats are the woke heroes and Republicans are the bigoted villains. They are teeing up a brawl in the Senate Judiciary Committee over race and gender that will make Clarence Thomas’s confirmation hearings look like a cake walk. They will portray any attempt to genuinely press the nominee on her judicial philosophy, her approach to statutory interpretation, and her professional record as racist and sexist. Any attempt to honestly evaluate the nominee's qualifications for the job -- something the Committee should be doing with EVERY judicial nominee -- will be attacked as an assault on the candidate because of the attributes that should matter least, her race and sex.

**The whole spectacle will be a sickening inversion of the way Democrats have treated Justice Thomas for decades** , attacking him not for his conservatism, but for his blackness. After all, the progressive left will tolerate virtually anything except a black man who dares to think for himself. I know this from experience.**Like Justice Thomas, I’ve been called an “Uncle Tom” for arguing conservative viewpoints.** And like many minorities who have achieved academic success, I’ve been asked by “well-meaning” progressives whether I was part of an affirmative action program.

In many ways, we are the sum total of the experiences we have in life. Our family, our friendships, our faith, and our experiences all help shape our character and our convictions. There's a lot to be said for the way our immutable characteristics affect who we are. **But race and gender are not the sum total of our being**. Moreover, they do not and should not automatically determine what a person believes. If we are ever to achieve equality in America, **it will be because we have finally embraced Dr. King's vision of a society in which people are judged for the content of their character rather than the color of their skin**.

Now more than ever, Justice Thomas's dissent in a case on racial preferences ring true: "The Constitution abhors classifications based on race, not only because those classifications can harm favored races or are based on illegitimate motives, but also because every time the government places citizens on racial registers and makes race relevant to the provision of burdens or benefits, it demeans us all." Whoever President Biden nominates, she deserves treatment more dignified than the patronizing sham progressives are preparing for her.

**Mr. Dorilás is a navy combat veteran, first-generation American, and Republican congressional candidate who served as Counsel to the Secretary of Commerce, Wilbur Ross, 2020-2021.**

[**DONATE TO MY CAMPAGIN TODAY **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=59ac28c8cc83415abcbaa15acde05580&_e=Abn3Ckc4vx0FJR0-yDBWcf6aszLrGnSiaMnmw4-88nu1kHrIt-9HIVn8l3vvoYJxzY8JZMQhPEJYiDbfIgv5pnesO_35tAS-OBrE3NAOVVSHB0cCOBfCh1saSWAa4M2KO60K0uVRd19PF312yKk83XDm11eAjnYH4r5v7MnalLpMuE6KJuuVFV4XDVArtf4yMrHnHaBT9QaIQiAOpEQXQy8CbIKIvXjZMG8N4vH4LOohGCTOibcgA1Q67lH23p8nX1b06NOo3MLjm2DIO9r-EpgKvx5zLTsreYYoHmJR3n1DMb9fiF7m8OzZu6ofSQlM8t5A1vj5sUJU0dkSwMhiYFpSxZ4OumY3WoBwKAAPbb40wTP5uMeOSqBh2DS4Lei17nLJmEidefbpX5c8SwTUhZyPLDmxLboMMrsufUaMx_b_ei7biWFQ8Zg5YxS8eoKvuUOpimTtI1o7yF-k1kz4RTvy4hmJnKrcg0AS7Doi0fo%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=59ac28c8cc83415abcbaa15acde05580&_e=Abn3Ckc4vx0FJR0-yDBWcf6aszLrGnSiaMnmw4-88nu1kHrIt-9HIVn8l3vvoYJxzY8JZMQhPEJYiDbfIgv5pnesO_35tAS-OBrE3NAOVVSHB0cCOBfCh1saSWAa4M2KO60K0uVRd19PF312yKk83XDm11eAjnYH4r5v7MnalLpMuE6KJuuVFV4XDVArtf4yMrHnHaBT9QaIQiAOpEQXQy8CbIKIvXjZMG8N4vH4LOohGCTOibcgA1Q67lH23p8nX1b06NOo3MLjm2DIO9r-EiL7lmkMrPqXKs9zwIpJ2i5yk77LS7blHwkjS3fFXNWoRZGKY3loryznlur7H8rogexynoGAitxH3SUSmcC8agkKwbZWWJ9rxl1st7glOCz5-ALCGUVTetH2czK3qQqnbglgHfITv-2UxbwryrpiWS_hyWQfWOiUZRDAaBgkw2BSFBKd6IEWgZIdiCEVUM6M8uZjVokDwFRTukJKZhsVuBw%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=59ac28c8cc83415abcbaa15acde05580&_t=mym20YcWpu8XfOYsU1JD1L7TYIL05_YLa_uodioPghwaDeEE-vyRUF1dZ9MdrsMtTygBAPC0OoAkff8PkkXbk0WToMMhX-6zBTiAXQ4Oi2hKMaeZJv3XTBcTkkZcBB4lrFP1LQ0_jQdr7pLqcvn9rLElP7-0P96OdJhGDDtnJWo%3D).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's Big Lie (How we stop it)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We must put an end to these disgusting attacks on our democracy.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/0L6vHwNaPXc-/eDRaWmZORXgxbDZ6TkJlVjNuTFIrRkVtQnhzQVpETTkwV0o3VDZHM1VhUXVWY1R0TnpVMWVvZjZ1Rlk5STcwZnRxak45UHF1Z1l5QlRUWjZ5bzNyUE9iSDhOcCtIbkxhRnpBa3ljRGtCM2c9S0/THlaN1pKUmFCVjVycm54SEN2SWxVMGM1c3BURkxJU1pvWjRqUk45eEl6OD0S1) Friend -- On January 6, 2021, Donald Trump used lies and conspiracy theories to incite a violent attack on the United States Capitol. Unfortunately, Trump and his allies -- including here in Washington state -- are continuing to spread his Big Lie: that we can't trust our democracy to accurately count votes. This rhetoric isn't just untrue -- it's dangerous. **That 's why I strongly support SB 5843, which would make it illegal for elected officials or candidates for office to knowingly spread lies about election results.** To get this crucial bill through the legislature, we'll all need to speak out. [**_Will you add your name right now in support of this legislation that will hold politicians accountable for maliciously lying about the result of an election?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/Z6qLH9bZa-TY/eDRaWmZORXgxbDZ6TkJlVjNuTFIrRkVtQnhzQVpETTkwV0o3VDZHM1VhUXVWY1R0TnpVMWVvZjZ1Rlk5STcwZnRxak45UHF1Z1l5QlRUWjZ5bzNyUE9iSDhOcCtIbkxhRnpBa3ljRGtCM2c9S0/THlaN1pKUmFCVjVycm54SEN2SWxVMGM1c3BURkxJU1pvWjRqUk45eEl6OD0S1) January 6 was not an isolated incident -- nor was it limited to the nation's capital. Here in the other Washington on that day, I was forced to leave my house in Olympia after anti-democracy protestors gathered on my front lawn. This ongoing effort to undermine our democracy and incite violence exists right here in Washington state. In fact, just last summer, three Republican state lawmakers used taxpayer dollars to attend a "symposium on election fraud," which peddled dangerous and debunked conspiracy theories. Just like there are consequences for lying under oath, I believe there should be consequences for willfully lying about election results. The bill would make doing so in Washington state a gross misdemeanor. But before I can sign this legislation into law and hold the politicians and elected officials who are endangering our democracy accountable, we have to get this bill through the legislature. [**_Add your name right now in support of SB 5843 to join me in protecting our state and nation from future violence._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/Z6qLH9bZa-TY/eDRaWmZORXgxbDZ6TkJlVjNuTFIrRkVtQnhzQVpETTkwV0o3VDZHM1VhUXVWY1R0TnpVMWVvZjZ1Rlk5STcwZnRxak45UHF1Z1l5QlRUWjZ5bzNyUE9iSDhOcCtIbkxhRnpBa3ljRGtCM2c9S0/THlaN1pKUmFCVjVycm54SEN2SWxVMGM1c3BURkxJU1pvWjRqUk45eEl6OD0S1) Together, we can put an end to these disgusting attacks on the foundations of our democracy. Very truly yours, Jay | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/4Ee7h7PaD3fY/eDRaWmZORXgxbDZ6TkJlVjNuTFIrRkVtQnhzQVpETTkwV0o3VDZHM1VhUXVWY1R0TnpVMWVvZjZ1Rlk5STcwZnRxak45UHF1Z1l5QlRUWjZ5bzNyUE9iSDhOcCtIbkxhRnpBa3ljRGtCM2c9S0/THlaN1pKUmFCVjVycm54SEN2SWxVMGM1c3BURkxJU1pvWjRqUk45eEl6OD0S1)

The bill would make doing so in Washington state a gross misdemeanor. But before I can sign this legislation into law and hold the politicians and elected officials who are endangering our democracy accountable, we have to get this bill through the legislature. Together, we can put an end to these disgusting attacks on the foundations of our democracy. Very truly yours, Jay |

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Petition signatures needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Can you help get John’s name on the ballot?
#
**Derek, we need your help.**
As you may know, candidates running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania are required to submit a bare minimum of 2,000 petition signatures in order to appear on the ballot.
That’s why Team Fetterman is launching a *huge* 67 Counties push to collect more than enough signatures to secure John Fetterman’s spot on the 2022 Democratic primary ballot.
[**_We need your signature, and we need your help! Will you complete our volunteer interest form to let us know how you can help get John’s name on the ballot?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220203-4449&t=1&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)
**[Sign Up](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220203-4449&t=2&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)**
Our goal is to collect as many signed nomination petitions from PA voters as possible to ensure validity and get John’s name on the 2022 Democratic primary ballot. **There are a lot of ways you can help make a direct and immediate impact:**
* Sign a nomination petition
* Circulate a petition
* Host a Petition Party
* Be a Petition Captain in your County

[**_So, can we count on your help? Let us know how you can contribute, and we’ll send you the next steps to get started._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220203-4449&t=3&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)
**[Sign Up](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/jf-petitions/?refcode=em20220203-4449&t=4&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)**
We’re so grateful to have your help getting John’s name on the ballot!
— Team Fetterman
**PLEASE NOTE: The petition period is planned to start on February 15, 2022 with petitions due on March 8, 2022. However, it is possible that these dates may change due to statewide redistricting.**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220203-4449-footer&t=5&refcode2=4449_434096_U9eZjm&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4449%2E434096%2EU9eZjm)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Texas schools are banning books in record numbers](https://links.e.dccc.)**_

We need to move NOW.

Across the country, far-right Republicans are banning important books in record numbers.

It's despicable. While many of these books touch on sensitive subjects, they're essential to the education of our children - _and they should NEVER be erased._

Democrats are committed to fighting back against these attacks on education and defeating the Republicans who support them...

name: John James
subject: Only in America…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
From poverty to prosperity in one... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](%7b%7bunsubscribeUrl%7d%7d) [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f8838b5ee7be4291a4de41b565f85c17&_e=I-EYdTVXp9kLeK20H20YdPErx8-AVghM58oAcVYwTnahQ-hozF0QU9K85ZrwATb2rc_cC9TRmHxznmi9cRjibSSWwFRtCgxipKv5idDj1uGVENmHVyxDNw6WgZehT_E1kWwejExIewGC617v-dEzAoNYYuGbYUCH01f0B8OqyG1oGdx4qZOxLHnAVvoBGWU3iJN-jmP7hihoCDEt3jVeTWw0EFMFVXnLHuatiSrc2rkJMYjkxQk4-isz5X19fWTc06bmr68yHMvJiV4tV-UeoTQsAMd1ECQq4SK7eTXj_gTjZrNHiZhiM-qcg9mguRk-tgT9pInQ9GEd0GLUQgZAZX-2XKW2RryoJa26WOkTFE7dmLE8zBlNCL9xAidXCnKa2ruZIRH70s7seQFWFA3GzugkIUixm1RpVRYzjXxtO9Ueq9JmQp7qsrhy4I9d4iBKCl4Lg6ATajpXRCNwBSvyCJ3-bQ81oaHrfnc9yklMrq0s_2bNDpZAPTEYybyjlchs) | |
---
Hi Peter,

Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notー _because I’m not a career politician, and I have zero intention of spending the rest of my life in Washington. _
I'm John James, and long before I decided to run as a conservative for Congress in Michigan, I served our country honorably as an Apache Pilot and U.S. Army Ranger.

At age 17, I signed up, determined to serve my country, graduated from West Point, served as a pilot in _Operation Iraqi Freedom_ , leading two Apache platoons.

After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f8838b5ee7be4291a4de41b565f85c17&_e=I-EYdTVXp9kLeK20H20YdPErx8-AVghM58oAcVYwTnahQ-hozF0QU9K85ZrwATb2rc_cC9TRmHxznmi9cRjibSSWwFRtCgxipKv5idDj1uGVENmHVyxDNw6WgZehT_E1kWwejExIewGC617v-dEzAoNYYuGbYUCH01f0B8OqyG1oGdx4qZOxLHnAVvoBGWU3iJN-jmP7hihoCDEt3jVeTWw0EFMFVXnLHuatiSrc2rkJMYjkxQk4-isz5X19fWTc06bmr68yHMvJiV4tV-UeoTQsAMd1ECQq4SK7eTXj_gSsBEtHNMvpX1-LJ7JuZCd0ngTj8ao-dbwTVR9bSRN8B5JaoBWRPrFLv2OQZ68oZ60AJZtJkAnMSsFrIKA3Zj3ReGytSkTQt1xm-PupdulIAXgMlDfurhxeq0eyQj2O5X_Wz2uS3ienr_zMhP31Z7vP97xtK82UQgc7P5cSOVL2ZUr-z9ZvZ69-7cX19GsNS37LG7BEj-bAQPLzIWx4a_f5)

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f8838b5ee7be4291a4de41b565f85c17&_e=I-EYdTVXp9kLeK20H20YdPErx8-AVghM58oAcVYwTnahQ-hozF0QU9K85ZrwATb2rc_cC9TRmHxznmi9cRjibSSWwFRtCgxipKv5idDj1uGVENmHVyxDNw6WgZehT_E1kWwejExIewGC617v-dEzAoNYYuGbYUCH01f0B8OqyG1oGdx4qZOxLHnAVvoBGWU3iJN-jmP7hihoCDEt3jVeTWw0EFMFVXnLHuatiSrc2rkJMYjkxQk4-isz5X19fWTc06bmr68yHMvJiV4tV-UeoTQsAMd1ECQq4SK7eTXj_gRAspKwCXiR25sp3kmU4HHf6UASBUJOrtPD0oviGXNcRttYPHIzRWp8xVld63MDxmxQ91VL6H8aqDD2Z8n-AiN6KDQ25fIL_1B5-yoy7DPe_2APhThl1jm-ALpGBxDGaQnevg-gRrZZVhu4AGRK_pnqm7MvbnKqhEhQYjFGg4bHBObslBDiCbTXxaD5K8tqBeMo-nCsAqTji-cM3sL9mgxM)
I went to work in the family small automotive supply chain business, eventually working my way up to running the company, _where I’m proud to have created over 100 jobs in Michigan and across the country. _

You see, my family’s story is living proof that the American way of life works. In 4 generations, we went from _slave to sharecropper, sharecropper to mason, mason to truck driver, and poverty to prosperity in 1 generation._
**Only in the United States of America is that possible! **

These days, my wife, Elizabeth, and I are busy raising our three sons, active members in our local church, and enjoying the great Michigan outdoors.

Peter, I often think about how far my family has come through sheer will, hard work, and determination, and **I worry about the America that my sons and the next generation will grow up in.**

We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who can prosper are a little wealthy elite in Washington._
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f8838b5ee7be4291a4de41b565f85c17&_e=I-EYdTVXp9kLeK20H20YdPErx8-AVghM58oAcVYwTnahQ-hozF0QU9K85ZrwATb2rc_cC9TRmHxznmi9cRjibSSWwFRtCgxipKv5idDj1uGVENmHVyxDNw6WgZehT_E1kWwejExIewGC617v-dEzAoNYYuGbYUCH01f0B8OqyG1oGdx4qZOxLHnAVvoBGWU3iJN-jmP7hihoCDEt3jVeTWw0EFMFVXnLHuatiSrc2rkJMYjkxQk4-isz5X19fWTc06bmr68yHMvJiV4tV-UeoTQsAMd1ECQq4SK7eTXj_gSNxeQ_T3iuBYoa_tb4h7ybWtSwvki0Tgw5Pc0Ga7T8H9wPMsU9MeZqDj2qN_YMsdkLVqOmpdzRj91XZdJ99rhtGbPvcpuV5Cgj262gq44VL7Cd2Ob2wJbh7fOOSW5jRPFaoPiSGRFlCS9GjEgR10BBU_15N690dLrC_vcUqdgqo3vU385AlhdgCP15HnB-NAuVp9HLNlwFx-i0gbk_SvGO)
We are at what President Reagan referred to as _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.
**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**
**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**

**Now, I’m asking YOU to choose to preserve the American Dream and pass it onto the next generation or watch it disappear and fade with ours**.

clean_body: From poverty to prosperity in one... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this %7b%7bunsubscribeUrl%7d%7d | | Hi Peter, Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notー because I’m not a career politician, and I have zero intention of spending the rest of my life in Washington. I'm John James, and long before I decided to run as a conservative for Congress in Michigan, I served our country honorably as an Apache Pilot and U.S. Army Ranger. At age 17, I signed up, determined to serve my country, graduated from West Point, served as a pilot in Operation Iraqi Freedom , leading two Apache platoons. After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me. I went to work in the family small automotive supply chain business, eventually working my way up to running the company, where I’m proud to have created over 100 jobs in Michigan and across the country. You see, my family’s story is living proof that the American way of life works. In 4 generations, we went from slave to sharecropper, sharecropper to mason, mason to truck driver, and poverty to prosperity in 1 generation. Only in the United States of America is that possible! These days, my wife, Elizabeth, and I are busy raising our three sons, active members in our local church, and enjoying the great Michigan outdoors. Peter, I often think about how far my family has come through sheer will, hard work, and determination, and I worry about the America that my sons and the next generation will grow up in. We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and where the only people who can prosper are a little wealthy elite in Washington. We are at what President Reagan referred to as ‘A Time for Choosing,’ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow. I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... I choose achievement over apathy... I choose freedom over socialism... I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else. Now, I’m asking YOU to choose to preserve the American Dream and pass it onto the next generation or watch it disappear and fade with ours. Thank you, John James | | | Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc. | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Write letters with Beto for Texas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need all hands on deck.
#
I have really exciting news to share from our campaign:
**Team Beto is setting a goal to reach at least 2 million Texas voters this month!**
It’s a big goal to match Beto’s big vision for Texas, and few organizing programs would ever aim this high this early in the cycle. I’m so proud that we’re building a grassroots team of volunteers powerful enough to set our voter contact goals in the millions.
But the truth is, we’re going to need everybody’s help, including yours, to reach 2 million Texans in the next 25 days (February is a short month!).
**W****ill you write letters to Texans to build support for Beto?** Our letter writing parties are a great place to meet other supporters and write letters together after a brief training. They’re hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere. [Click here to sign up or learn more!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52218?t=1&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)
**[Write letters for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52218?t=2&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)**
We’re facing a lot of challenges in this race, including extreme voter suppression laws and Greg Abott’s $62 million in campaign cash.
That’s why it’s critical we use every tool we have to reach eligible voters with Beto’s vision and help folks all across Texas participate in this election.
[Will you sign up to write letters with Team Beto? This is a critical way you can help Beto build a winning campaign.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52218?t=3&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)
Thanks for your help,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52216?refcode=ema20220203-174584&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220203-174584-footer&t=5&refcode2=174584_444211_LVJOqb&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=6&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=174584%2E444211%2ELVJOqb)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

subject: Defending the Senate only happens with you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/6118?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF)
---
team,

Senate Democrats just launched an _amazing_ new resource, [**DefendTheSenate.org**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6118?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF), a hub for grassroots supporters like you to get involved in defending and expanding our Democratic Senate majority this year.

It's a one-stop shop where you can learn about races and candidates in our battleground states, donate directly to campaigns, and learn all of the ways you can get involved! **To celebrate this launch and show Senate Republicans how serious we are about defending our majority, Senate Democrats set an urgent goal to raise $100,000 in the next five days.**

[**Please, will you click here to head over to DefendTheSenate.org and get involved?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/6118?t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF) We need you to join the fight and keep power out of Mitch McConnell’s hands.

Our Democratic Senate majority has been fighting for working families, from delivering pandemic relief to cutting taxes for over 35 million families, and growing millions of good-paying jobs by rebuilding our nation’s infrastructure. This fall, all of that and more is at stake. _But we can’t defend and expand our majority without your support._

We know Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies will funnel MILLIONS into attacking our candidates and trying to flip the Senate. That's why it's so important that we help Senate Democrats raise $100,000 in the next five days. It’s ambitious, yes. But it's absolutely crucial and only possible with your help!

**So please, head over to[DefendTheSenate.org](https://go.dscc.org/go/6118?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220203-SenateUpdate-DefendTheSenate-Pros-sl1&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF), pick the race you're most passionate about, and chip in a few dollars to defend and expand our critical Senate majority!**

Thank you,

Team DSCC
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=5&refcode2=2831_9716520_9gkzuF&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2831%2E9716520%2E9gkzuF)** to unsubscribe.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=104e165dd7&e=4712f71bea)

|
---
| Friends,

I am just so sick of politicians like Ronny Jackson, the worst kind of hypocrite.

Here he is belly-aching about how**the bipartisan infrastructure bill** is such a **TERRIBLE** thing.
---
| [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=f5460983fe&e=4712f71bea)
---
| But then here he is sending out emails bragging that he and Cancun Ted brought home some of the money appropriated by the very same bill he just called "TERRIBLE"!
---
| [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=6411881adc&e=4712f71bea)
---
| I mean, what would Donald Trump say if he saw this? He might just disown Ronny on the spot - ha!

My word is my bond. I'll tell it to you straight, and stick to my promises. We need to get rid of slick politicians like Ronny Jackson.

Can you help me do it?

Thanks,
Kathleen.

FORMER VIRGINIA SECRETARY OF EDUCATION _GERARD ROBINSON_ AND FORMER VIRGINIA EDUCATION EXECUTIVE _BEN HOWERTON_ ENDORSE TINA RAMIREZ FOR SENATE
Friend,

The support for Tina Ramirez's campaign for Senate is overwhelming, not only has she already received over _**50 endorsements across the district and Virginia.**_

After last week's first round of strong endorsements, now two GIANTS in the education field endorse Tina.

These endorsements from two prominent and highly respected education leaders further demonstrate Tina's expertise and leadership in the area of education.

She has spearheaded the fight again Critical Race Theory in Virginia by signing the 1776 Pledge, and will always continue to stand up against radical agendas in Virginia Schools.

subject: Joe Kent Joins President Trump At Mar-a-Lago

body:
Beutler has failed our district, recent media hits and local townhalls | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/joekentforcongress/joe-kent-joins-president-trump-at-mar-a-lago-2z64ikx98w?e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend,

# Jaime Herrera Beutler has proven time and time again that her interests are not your interests!
❌ Voted to terminate President Trump’s border wall emergency declaration
❌ Voted to preserve Obamacare
❌ Voted for amnesty for illegal immigrants
❌ Voted for a vaccine tracking database
❌ Supports foreign labor to serve the corporate donor class
❌ Voted against sending in the National Guard to protect our district and your family

Jaime Herrera Beutler is unfit and has **FAILED** to do her duty of protecting our district.

All signs point to us taking back our district and our country. Last week, I brought the [fight against vaccine mandates to Clark County](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=c6a16a35e6&e=00856e661d), and showcased the type of leadership that is **REQUIRED** in Washington. When the radical left tries to infringe on your rights, you can TRUST that I will fight for you and your family.
---
| [ ](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=47c53e37c0&e=00856e661d)
---
|
---
|
## Why is the establishment scared of me?
**✅ **January 24th: [Joe Kent joins Dr. Sebastian Gorka for a discussion on Ukraine](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=69589bbfc9&e=00856e661d)
**✅ **January 25th: [Joe Kent hosts townhall in Camas, Washington](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=12f9b994d6&e=00856e661d)
**✅ **January 26th: [Joe Kent joins Steve Bannon to discuss defeating the mandates](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=768b0b5b25&e=00856e661d)
**✅ **January 28th: [Joe Kent leads the fight against mandates in Clark County](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9ad4abeeba&e=00856e661d)
**✅ **January 29th: [Joe Kent endorsed by Skamania County GOP](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f376ce5311&e=00856e661d)
**✅ **January 30th: [Joe Kent interviewed by KOIN 6](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4e08dd372e&e=00856e661d)

Joe speaking at Mar-a-Lago February 1st, 2022
"It was an amazing night. Thank you [@DonaldJTrumpJr](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=5d40bb4d41&e=00856e661d), [@kimguilfoyle](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=6012594de9&e=00856e661d) & President Trump! The momentum is gathering, we are taking our country back!"

name: GOP Polling
subject: Revive Iran?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
|

**BIDEN'S BRINGING BACK THE BAD:
[Don't trust the Iran deal to keep us safe »](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=53766b77baac49f3bf7ba9d0cd0432c4&_e=9p20X4b5dyqYmgmEV5DsVp9mMGHJCJI51vYs08ZDYOxShE3vZwcql9JaHzoiklYx_1qDC2tlijd9g-2cUgOUACy6-Ki7zORTKB-JqlvvgZPMUM69ZSZ9JVhuWFk7O6w37Px7gqKLpXb2-GMmd0rD0_2_F6Rsya2YB78f4NOTgFwg9fKax923I1yh00nmhDW00oVKE15u0UDL1hEs86d0pReCXNfxwniutOb_648TAHimq_iJluu_QQOaXIToRw_1WeAsB29TaU76u0pvhnfAeB-BCmfN7M5mbsIdSW8fBBsoYn8SrpcYFVsOfys31xmcLsquQtkcMpl5akkgU_wL8C1lzqkEg_xTnZT3y4C_TeYzowEKr-xkM6KYRE3XLO4qFoWo2z6sgaOErRaFACQYv8yMUCDKXD3TO1os-oZJhZ2frHZvvZUa7txHdb7wZ6YHvGvEjCbLIrfgy2TslEvrNg%3D%3D) **
---
Peter,

President 45 knew the deal with Iran was bad news. That's why he ended it.

Now, Biden's all over the headlines working to "quickly" get it back in place. Even now, Iran is dictating the terms indirectly through mediators...

That is not what a strong America does.

So, Peter, [**will you follow this secure link and demand an end to Bumbling Biden's begging?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=53766b77baac49f3bf7ba9d0cd0432c4&_e=9p20X4b5dyqYmgmEV5DsVp9mMGHJCJI51vYs08ZDYOxShE3vZwcql9JaHzoiklYx_1qDC2tlijd9g-2cUgOUACy6-Ki7zORTKB-JqlvvgZPMUM69ZSZ9JVhuWFk7O6w37Px7gqKLpXb2-GMmd0rD0_2_F6Rsya2YB78f4NOTgFwg9fKax923I1yh00nmhDW00oVKE15u0UDL1hEs86d0pReCXNfxwniutOb_648TAHimq_iJluu_QQOaXIToRw_1ri0pDaDFxHGSTT71mZk2c4O5Ns5xbd5v1LxRGk9V0pxQ1ZP7fMU7TAy272N3BrGKWl1bT8m1JYH_Nc0387dbzNo9O33-agyl_rdy4b-reD-cMjM69Wk_o0J5px3mKG9kHQMDAOyU8ActK3cNahueDUbMP13yEkyaj_aJy5L8-l2gCmRGtGCQ4NZ7thGgrDtoFY1ihU9XTduSMATQMmSesg%3D%3D) Iran is in the driver's seat, and that is never safe for America.

Awaiting your response,
\- Senate Republicans

name: Captain Jesse Jensen
subject: Task Force Argo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
We stood up when President Biden failed us, this is our story. Peter, While the Taliban was on the rise and thousands of Americans and allies were stranded in Kabul, Joe Biden’s first instinct was to blame President Trump. My first instinct was to get those left behind out and back home to safety. At one point, we evacuated nearly TWO-THIRDS as many people as the federal government. clean_body: We stood up when President Biden failed us, this is our story. Peter, While the Taliban was on the rise and thousands of Americans and allies were stranded in Kabul, Joe Biden’s first instinct was to blame President Trump. My first instinct was to get those left behind out and back home to safety. At one point, we evacuated nearly TWO-THIRDS as many people as the federal government. For the first time in my adult life, I was truly embarrassed by my government , however, I have also never been more proud of my fellow Americans who stepped up, like I did, to save our fellow countrymen. BOOTS, not suits, built this country, and it’s time to get rid of feckless leaders and replace them with men who know how to serve. Because for me, serving my country and fellow Americans is not just something I do, IT'S WHO I AM. In service, Captain Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. subject: Hamilton, Jay, and Madison
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs_fH6cHQN

You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how
our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed
and outdated. It may..
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_fH6cHQN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day today.

You may have heard a lot of talk in the media
lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding
Fathers, is flawed and outdated.

It may make you wonder, as it does me: How
should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges?

Well, a few early defenders of the
Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-have
given us the guide: The Federalist Papers.

These essays were written between October
1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist
Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials
intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.

Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist
Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government
which ever was written."

There is no better guide to understanding the
principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through
the words of the Founders themselves. That's why I'd like to give
you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale's free online course, "The
Federalist Papers," today.

Taught by Hillsdale College's politics
faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of
this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of
majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the
nature of the three branches of government, and the argument
concerning the Bill of Rights.

Thanks for reading my email, and I hope
you'll activate your free enrollment in "The Federalist Papers"
today.

Activate your free course now »

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning

Hillsdale College

"Hillsdale College's online offerings have
deepened my education and enriched my life."
- Fred D.
"Extraordinary in their simplicity and so
fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue
to knowledge."
- John C.

subject: Let’s UNMASK AMERICA
body:
The Democrats want us to hide behind our masks forever... ... but I stand with loyal patriots across the country when I say tha
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdllmsg2pg00ha8d5h1mteqbvrjbm8a2bii7fd5g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbd1keup6bdlgsloe8db7cuq64s34sup7epb3mgpnct5mccr3edpgcsqm9d1ke3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8pmcclimmomfchgcpob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmcp77c9gm1p324no)
Fellow Conservative,
The Democrats want us to hide behind our masks forever...

... **but I stand with loyal patriots across the country when I say that it’s time to UNMASK AMERICA once and for all.**

Senate Republicans are listening to what you have to say, fellow conservative. We know you’re sick of endless mandates, school closures, lockdowns, and senseless COVID rules that do _nothing_ to keep Americans safer or healthier.

_**I’m working with Republicans in the Senate to STOP the Democrats’ COVID madness, but first, we need to take back our Senate majority this November.**_

**We _must_ take back our Senate majority if we’re going to stop Joe Biden and Dr. Fauci from closing our schools and keeping America under permanent lockdown, and we can’t do it without your support.**

**[Pitch in today so we can TAKE BACK THE SENATE with a Republican majority that will STOP THE COVID MADNESS.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3b9dmv9kciike8i2n07qdk8otj6mnjfl5vgkang_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob0shh2bs)** [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8tgi75sdg8jc2n4v15c2hn4ljij4u1qpkm7h57g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob0shh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs7imeohos5ce3356c4g7o5fqfn5riv9mfgj4vr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob0shh2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zour30gmlp23ih280m6fr8v3hh0a1qjrdk9r0b6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob0shh2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z6n1mduh4m5hj6c0prhoelum9a06v1g4dk9g5dn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob0shh2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9pqcghs0grpfktc5skjlou8frpmfkmneflnds3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob0shh2bs) Thank you,

Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. . Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ch1jvrbtn28ipvcbql1pja0ah4b2pugrpj3qmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s37c6qb9cbkmapj8sth68oj3dhh6pp68cpkcdo64cb26uq38s75clg68dtjeeo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljcjg74sj66lhb6phnm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhic82oo04e0dbr7jlqpdbpshkgcelqjhtvs9q3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob6cph2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcvm4a1kiap99cbke02vkdr3ooqvo1ept2ha9du0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob6cph2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z76e8bh20a927m9gs6l22ofk4a1tsvlfnps2rb70_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob6cph2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjmbutotanlc32p7mqbpsoia8jecm0oi8hmlau5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob6cph2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zraa87f6e1isk16eh2g1f66c66go8fitp15ge0vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm4ob6cph2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. body:
This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis. Friend, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will never change: Our in

---
| | | This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

Friend, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**
---
**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.
---
| | | ❌Vaccine passports

❌Business shutdowns

❌Mask mandates for _children_

---
| ❌Big Tech censorship

❌Woke curriculum in our schools

❌Unemployment & inflation
---
But this Pandemic Power-Grab only targets _real Americans_. The rules don't apply to liberal elites at the Met Gala, illegal migrants flooding our border, or rioters at BLM protests.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**
**[CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvjg805alugnjm58bup7f10c7qh7fvfkopl55ug8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm6o30s1h2bs)**
While other states have closed schools, businesses and churches--trampling citizens' personal freedoms--Florida and Conservative state leaders remain the LAST line of defense, safeguarding the Constitutional rights guaranteed to all Americans.

Friend, America can never be allowed to become a woke, leftist utopia -- **[which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs2dhr9c0rvn5b2himl92h9vudd2opt6q2fc591g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm6o30s1h2bs)**

[$75 TO SAVE OUR STATES](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4sgvvrcq5u9345q8al57luff5gvu364urmsh9g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm6o30s1h2bs)

[$50 TO SAVE OUR STATES](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z78gjptjmju023grdtd746shuh4nilh59mipa598_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm6o30s1h2bs)

body:

| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ffrz-1wj2w-4qqlpo9/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ffrz-1wj2x-4qqlpo0/ "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away? ")**

---

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ffrz-1wj30-4qqlpo9/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ffrz-1wj31-4qqlpo0/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ffrz-1wj32-4qqlpo1/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ffrz-1wj33-4qqlpo2/ "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**

name: John James
subject: Only in America…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notーbecause I’m not a career politician, and I have zero
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo0k1bilbslpvfia1c8gqth9bmr0s25ind6tev68_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn2o5m6uo7ac9jcjir1dpkmli62pr4elp68cticaqn4s3mmlq7ddr2cji68t9gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj35cllmjjr4sr666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j69pr4sdj6aoh5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zukmpkj0170ea491tngm1d85or74qdkleg19qq5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs) | |
---
Hi Co-Pilot,

Before you think this is a run-of-the-mill political email, it’s notー _because I’m not a career politician, and I have zero intention of spending the rest of my life in Washington._
I'm John James, and long before I decided to run as a conservative for Congress in Michigan, I served our country honorably as an Apache Pilot and U.S. Army Ranger.

At age 17, I signed up, determined to serve my country, graduated from West Point, served as a pilot in _Operation Iraqi Freedom_ , leading two Apache platoons.

After 8 years of service, I returned home, but that passion for serving my country and community never left me.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkkc1nt3ianbf4ghasss6gr268ssspqqv97aaq28_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zor2mkn0uhodeeijb8eupdkv6h1nseja1g3h8118_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
I went to work in our family's automotive supply chain business, eventually working my way up to running the company, _where I’m proud to have created over 100 jobs in Michigan and across the country._

You see, my family’s story is living proof that the American way of life works. In 4 generations, we went from _slave to sharecropper, sharecropper to mason, mason to truck driver, and poverty to prosperity in 1 generation._
**Only in the United States of America is that possible! **

These days, my wife, Elizabeth, and I are busy raising our three sons, active members in our local church, and enjoying the great Michigan outdoors.

Co-Pilot, I often think about how far my family has come through sheer will, hard work, and determination, and **I worry about the America that my sons and the next generation will grow up in.**

We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who can prosper are a little wealthy elite in Washington._
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuobdtm9qe1nthk06efb9j3ufc2hemkg1ohue3eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
We are at what President Reagan referred to as _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.
**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**
**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**

**Now, I’m asking YOU to choose to preserve the American Dream and pass it onto the next generation or watch it disappear and fade with ours**.

**[Co-Pilot, send this Combat Veteran to Congress, and I’ll fight with everything I possess to preserve the American Dream >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5rgs1jnl39solbfe7u808rag5m7q0jiuh7v768g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)**
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $10**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zki0voolp0tqa2n8jkhn17sv2dgkfpubj4c3ihug_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $25**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpcr7tmi3fna68ushbl0n07n3oqhn8p573vdk86g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfnt1fdd39c4a86r0pb3kn66b9kpqhjngbgvava8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $75**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fg810oa1bel72mmrd9tvbc4p287b2kv7e5tsvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
[**LET’S FLY: INVEST $100**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfp9h390oe81rr20k2c661htdiqpqfs6mkp3ogn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)
Thank you,
John James
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlitn9mj6cvtaoibnjegjepo04j5cusgca5v6bbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cjjm9or6clh2bs)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: My thoughts on energy independence
body:
| | | | |
---
| | Hey Peter,

On Hank's Think Tank podcast, I was asked my thoughts on energy independence.

The first thing that came to mind was a story my cousin told me. As a truck driver, he delivered batteries made in China to a windmill farm here in Texas, and was met by a Russian engineer who assembled them.

We have got to stop giving money to our enemies. It's not just about energy independence, it's also a matter of national security.

Oh... and taxation is theft.

Tap below to watch a short snippet from the interview.

subject: , This is our latest news from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Good morning, , I thought I'd share through e-mail what we've discussing on social media this week as we've been traveling across the state. **Weekend update from the campaign trail** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413862/328705895/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=) _**We've been traveling across the Northern Lower Peninsula this week on a town hall tour, and planning for another across the Upper Peninsula for March.**_ [HELP FUND OUR TOWN HALLS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413863/328705896/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413864/328705897/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=) [**MAKE A DONATION**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413865/328705898/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413866/328705899/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=) On Saturday, Peggy and I enjoyed lunch at the Apache Trout. During the height of COVID in 2021, employees at the Apache Trout Grill in Traverse City were able to pick up food, gift cards and supplies at the restaurant. Management supported staff and local charities even when they made the voluntary decision to close last Spring. "I have some savings I can live on, but a lot of restaurant workers don’t. They put their passion into their job every day and it’s important we take care of them." —Jeff Lobdell. I admire that. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413867/328705900/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=) Sunday, we met with local elected officials and prepared for our Traverse City town hall. We're holding six town halls this week throughout Northern Michigan. My opponent, the sitting Representative, has held one since 2017. We filled the room to our COVID capacity and even gathered several drive-thru petition signatures. **[Photo in e-mail header]** | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413868/328705901/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=)
I talked a lot about [civic virtue](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413869/328705902/517180582?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) and how we often forget about a principle equal to liberty. We have a responsibility to grow and nurture democracy. It's not just a gift, it's something we need to protect and care for.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413870/328705903/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=)
|
---
**Every small business is an American Success Story**

Sunday evening, we held a successful fundraiser at Mimi's Taqueria. Great place. Great people. We're grateful for Mimi and Angel Sanchez and the family and staff for hosting our fundraiser. **Service industry workers and local restaurants deserve our patronage, appreciation, and patience** , especially through the pandemic.

Thank you to all attendees, Harold Lassers, Susan LeMoine and the Numerick family for your generosity in sponsoring 's events.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413871/328705904/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=)
Monday, we were in Missaukee. Thank you to the
[@MissaukeeCoDems. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413872/328705905/-1651750235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427)for hosting us. This was a great conversation about the future of Northern Michigan. Welcome to the district, Missaukee.

This was a more intimate setting. It was great to get one-on-one time with leaders in the area.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413873/328705906/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=)
Tuesday, we were in Iosco County, where we recieved a warm welcome yesterday in Tawas. We're excited you're now part of Michigan's First District and I'm grateful for the opportunity to earn your vote.

Iosco Democrats are a passionate, involved group with a really impressive headquarters.
Iosco County is new to Michigan's 1st District. Learning the lay of the land from locals like Richard Douglass — our gracious host in Tawas — is critical to understanding the issues.

Richard and I discussed the importance of rural healthcare and how to get Northern Michigan's economy moving again. We're engaging with folks about education, childcare, job training, rights, freedoms, civic virtue and so much more.

I'm looking forward to many more productive conversations with everyone as we unite under new representation for all.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413874/328705907/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=)
Wednesday, we were in Roscommon for a town hall in Houghton Lake.

Mark Vick (pictured above), the owner of [The Northern Center](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413875/328705908/-689465912?__cft__\[0\]=AZUzPHmRIjlZcwsd3uGPCakjmbUzaYkVdT0SM1ADp7V0Grdt7eJdzPWf7m3RzcIHF7iJfLp6Y8TCedmj6W9TA7BlRrVnpDGZKsmYo02Gm73hTvJiIxLjxw7z38jUV-OjUtf0rXaybWvAU1VHtTtVIGVo&__tn__=kK-R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427), his family and staff are committed to the well-being of where they live and work. They treated us like royalty, and the best part — they treat everyone like that. Fantastic facility for a wonderful community.

"We deserve nice things, Houghton Lake, Northern Michigan. **We work hard. We play hard. We deserve nice things.** " — Vick

I agree.

We're grateful to all who came out to the town hall in Roscommon County with intelligent, thoughtful questions. Most notable was everyone's dedication to their community.

There's nothing quite like Northern Michigan hospitality. Thank you, Houghton Lake. We'll be back.
Thursday morning, Peggy and I caught up with [#Veterans](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413876/328705909/1942824995?__eep__=6&__cft__\[0\]=AZXpfNYKsI6b8P-Ik5nvWRJ-QSMYW1Bv7DxliGVM-BxAhKQ8ZfhvP_zCtBWNCirDxad0UNuEKVfVhQJXhIm3dbN43JKugntIcrN4oqFbO0j0kCDgCQJtk6jpXGCBD2AYaP3_YqEeXbm3jIf9RBary7Wc&__tn__=*NK-R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) of Roscommon this morning for coffee. There are approximately 62,000 Veterans of all ages and ranks who live in Michigan's First Congressional District and they deserve appreciation, respect and **better policies. **
Thursday evening, we held a town hall in Standish. We're optimistic about Arenac County joining our district. It's time we use Democracy to unelect divisive politicians. **We need a change of guard.** We need you, and it will be my honor to represent of us in Congress.

Yesterday evening Peggy caught up on the Olympics and had popcorn for dinner in the hotel - [Three athletes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413877/328705910/435380102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) from the First District are competing and we couldn't be more proud to call Northern Michigan home.

[Tonight, we're in Cheboygan. Tomorrow, we're in Alcona and Alpena.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413878/328705911/687116130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) Some members of our team will also be visiting constituents in the Soo for the i500 and in Iron Mountain for the Pine Mountain ski jumps. If you see them, tell them you want to sign my petition.

Thank you, everyone. Have a great weekend. I hope to see you on the trail soon.

– Dr. Bob

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41413879/328705912/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=)

clean_body: Good morning, , I thought I'd share through e-mail what we've discussing on social media this week as we've been traveling across the state. Weekend update from the campaign trail = We've been traveling across the Northern Lower Peninsula this week on a town hall tour, and planning for another across the Upper Peninsula for March. = = = = On Saturday, Peggy and I enjoyed lunch at the Apache Trout. During the height of COVID in 2021, employees at the Apache Trout Grill in Traverse City were able to pick up food, gift cards and supplies at the restaurant. Management supported staff and local charities even when they made the voluntary decision to close last Spring. "I have some savings I can live on, but a lot of restaurant workers don’t. They put their passion into their job every day and it’s important we take care of them." —Jeff Lobdell. I admire that. = Sunday, we met with local elected officials and prepared for our Traverse City town hall. We're holding six town halls this week throughout Northern Michigan. My opponent, the sitting Representative, has held one since 2017. We filled the room to our COVID capacity and even gathered several drive-thru petition signatures. [Photo in e-mail header] | | = I talked a lot about and how we often forget about a principle equal to liberty. We have a responsibility to grow and nurture democracy. It's not just a gift, it's something we need to protect and care for. = | Every small business is an American Success Story Sunday evening, we held a successful fundraiser at Mimi's Taqueria. Great place. Great people. We're grateful for Mimi and Angel Sanchez and the family and staff for hosting our fundraiser. Service industry workers and local restaurants deserve our patronage, appreciation, and patience , especially through the pandemic. Thank you to all attendees, Harold Lassers, Susan LeMoine and the Numerick family for your generosity in sponsoring 's events. = Monday, we were in Missaukee. Thank you to the hosting us. This was a great conversation about the future of Northern Michigan. Welcome to the district, Missaukee. This was a more intimate setting. It was great to get one-on-one time with leaders in the area. = Tuesday, we were in Iosco County, where we recieved a warm welcome yesterday in Tawas. We're excited you're now part of Michigan's First District and I'm grateful for the opportunity to earn your vote. Iosco Democrats are a passionate, involved group with a really impressive headquarters. Iosco County is new to Michigan's 1st District. Learning the lay of the land from locals like Richard Douglass — our gracious host in Tawas — is critical to understanding the issues. Richard and I discussed the importance of rural healthcare and how to get Northern Michigan's economy moving again. We're engaging with folks about education, childcare, job training, rights, freedoms, civic virtue and so much more. I'm looking forward to many more productive conversations with everyone as we unite under new representation for all. = Wednesday, we were in Roscommon for a town hall in Houghton Lake. Mark Vick (pictured above), the owner of \[0\]=AZUzPHmRIjlZcwsd3uGPCakjmbUzaYkVdT0SM1ADp7V0Grdt7eJdzPWf7m3RzcIHF7iJfLp6Y8TCedmj6W9TA7BlRrVnpDGZKsmYo02Gm73hTvJiIxLjxw7z38jUV-OjUtf0rXaybWvAU1VHtTtVIGVo&tn=kK-R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427, his family and staff are committed to the well-being of where they live and work. They treated us like royalty, and the best part — they treat everyone like that. Fantastic facility for a wonderful community. "We deserve nice things, Houghton Lake, Northern Michigan. We work hard. We play hard. We deserve nice things. " — Vick I agree. We're grateful to all who came out to the town hall in Roscommon County with intelligent, thoughtful questions. Most notable was everyone's dedication to their community. There's nothing quite like Northern Michigan hospitality. Thank you, Houghton Lake. We'll be back. Thursday morning, Peggy and I caught up with \[0\]=AZXpfNYKsI6b8P-Ik5nvWRJ-QSMYW1Bv7DxliGVM-BxAhKQ8ZfhvPzCtBWNCirDxad0UNuEKVfVhQJXhIm3dbN43JKugntIcrN4oqFbO0j0kCDgCQJtk6jpXGCBD2AYaP3YqEeXbm3jIf9RBary7Wc&tn=NK-R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y4OGQxNC1jMDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-9FaYLi8qjT9SFsjpWnbLqFWHob2-8TIzeorowiTkQo=&emci=1251bf14-b885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=23f88d14-c085-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427 of Roscommon this morning for coffee. There are approximately 62,000 Veterans of all ages and ranks who live in Michigan's First Congressional District and they deserve appreciation, respect and better policies. Thursday evening, we held a town hall in Standish. We're optimistic about Arenac County joining our district. It's time we use Democracy to unelect divisive politicians. We need a change of guard.** We need you, and it will be my honor to represent of us in Congress. Yesterday evening Peggy caught up on the Olympics and had popcorn for dinner in the hotel - from the First District are competing and we couldn't be more proud to call Northern Michigan home. Some members of our team will also be visiting constituents in the Soo for the i500 and in Iron Mountain for the Pine Mountain ski jumps. If you see them, tell them you want to sign my petition. Thank you, everyone. Have a great weekend. I hope to see you on the trail soon. – Dr. Bob = = = PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. | | Folks, The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just announced their list of Frontline Democrats – Democrats whose seats are _vital_ to maintaining our House majority in 2022. I’m one of them. Being a Frontliner means winning VA-02 is absolutely essential to keeping our Democratic House majority. But Republicans know this too, so they’ll stop at nothing to defeat me. I’m reaching out today because we need to send a strong message that we’re ready to defend this seat – no matter what. [**Will you let me know that I can count on you by being one of the 1,000 folks I need to personally endorse my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41414545/328708889/1873833232?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjZiYWViZi1jMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ft4bTNiGf8CjeL0QPCsB8SQgwPlPufPTVa5nFBitZMg=&emci=b2232ff9-b082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=bf6baebf-c285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=7932963) | | | [Endorse Our Campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41414552/328708894/1873833232?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjZiYWViZi1jMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ft4bTNiGf8CjeL0QPCsB8SQgwPlPufPTVa5nFBitZMg=&emci=b2232ff9-b082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=bf6baebf-c285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=7932963)

Thanks to redistricting, VA-02 just got _a lot_ more competitive. **In fact, it’s the most competitive House race in the entire country.**
Some folks don’t believe that we can hold this seat – but those are the same folks who thought this team couldn’t flip VA-02 back in 2018.
The support of everyone on this grassroots team made the difference in that race, and we ended up winning by less than 6,000 votes. This time around it could be even closer.
That’s why I need to know that this grassroots team is ready to defy the odds again – [**will you let me know that I have your support by personally endorsing my re-election campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41414556/328708900/1873833232?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjZiYWViZi1jMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ft4bTNiGf8CjeL0QPCsB8SQgwPlPufPTVa5nFBitZMg=&emci=b2232ff9-b082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=bf6baebf-c285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=7932963)

Elaine

clean_body: | = | | Folks, The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just announced their list of Frontline Democrats – Democrats whose seats are vital to maintaining our House majority in 2022. I’m one of them. Being a Frontliner means winning VA-02 is absolutely essential to keeping our Democratic House majority. But Republicans know this too, so they’ll stop at nothing to defeat me. I’m reaching out today because we need to send a strong message that we’re ready to defend this seat – no matter what. | | | Thanks to redistricting, VA-02 just got a lot more competitive. In fact, it’s the most competitive House race in the entire country. Some folks don’t believe that we can hold this seat – but those are the same folks who thought this team couldn’t flip VA-02 back in 2018. The support of everyone on this grassroots team made the difference in that race, and we ended up winning by less than 6,000 votes. This time around it could be even closer. That’s why I need to know that this grassroots team is ready to defy the odds again – | | Thank you, Elaine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Joe Cunningham
subject: Thanks for joining my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| Thank you for joining my campaign for governor of South Carolina.

The pandemic has knocked people across South Carolina down: lives have been lost, businesses closed, jobs gone.

Despite how hard this year has been, Governor McMaster and our leaders in Columbia would rather focus on scoring political points than helping our families.

**That’s why I am running for governor — to help our state get back up. I am excited to have you with us as we build up momentum to win. Here’s how you can get more involved:**
1. Our campaign is funded by small dollar donors like you. **[Click here to donate to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41415857/328713282/-672843543?amount=20&contactdata=s%2Fhzp0vmmTuXHMtDqGkvczi3oUGtIguV4V0kJVOz9xX8WV6JXvf2ZCNQWRziMEtE1ie7ajXD6O3PCfat9SndiShzBqWqCJ9cjpfE963ZuQQ%3D&refcode2=1aae86a4-c385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&source=JC_EM_WL_NTL_20220118_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWFlODZhNC1jMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbKluWr25I5S7TamjCL5_9neYCgo06MPJ-9LS34OSg8=)**

3.
