Some of my biggest priorities include expanding Medicaid, paying our teachers what they deserve, making it easier (not harder) to vote, and fixing our damn roads! We can make these needed changes, but I need you to stay with me.

**It’s gonna be all hands on deck.**

Some people will say a Democrat can’t win in South Carolina — but we’ve heard that before.

We made history once and with your help I know we can do it again. Because we don't need to change South Carolina. We need to change the types of leaders we send to Columbia.

It's time to get back up. It's time to win. Let's go.

— Joe

name: Josh Riley
subject: Onward! An update on redistricting & our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Peter,

This week, New York enacted new congressional districts for the 2022 election. While the districts' boundaries have changed, the key issues have not, and our campaign is moving forward full-steam ahead.

Upstate New Yorkers have been sold out by a political and economic system that rewards special interests and hurts working families. Upstate New York has experienced a generation of job losses while Wall Street has seen corporate profits soar. Many Upstate New Yorkers are living paycheck-to-paycheck while the top 1% have accumulated more wealth than the entire Middle Class combined. And politicians continue to receive payouts from corporate PACs while everyday Americans are left to foot the bill.

It’s time for change, and I have the experience to deliver. I’ve spent my career taking on big fights for the little guy in court, breaking through partisan gridlock to get things done in Congress, and standing up to the Trump Administration’s discriminatory immigration policies.

I believe that all Upstate New Yorkers deserve a Square Deal: if you work hard, play by the rules, and treat others with decency, then you should have a fair shot at the Middle Class. When I’m elected to Congress, I will work every day to create new jobs and economic opportunities that lift everyone up and bring everyone along.

With gratitude,

Josh Riley

Josh Riley is a Democrat running for Congress to bring Upstate New York Square Deal values to Washington. If you would like to chip in to support our campaign you can click here! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-jrfc-22q1-em?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220204-1-EM]

Friend, since the beginning of the COVID nightmare I have been asking the tough questions.

* When did Dr. Fauci and others in our government first know about COVID-19?
* Did they suppress evidence to support lockdowns, mask mandates, and 24/7 media hysteria?
* How much did our government fund the Wuhan labs who probably created the pandemic?
* What did they do to hide it all?

At every point, Fauci has lied to us about all of it. We have the documents that prove it - and he STILL won't retract his testimony. And it's very clear the so-called investigations being run on Fauci's corrupt department now aren't willing to do what it takes to reveal the truth to the public and FIRE FAUCI.

That’s why I’m stepping up to do what it takes and I need your support now.
__

Friend, we know these Washington elites don’t want us to know what really happened.

But that’s exactly why we’ve got to get to the bottom of it.

They’ve used COVID-19 as an excuse to mislead the people, control the masses, and virtually suspend the Constitution...

And they don’t even think we deserve the answers on WHY.

It’s unacceptable. I will not stop fighting till we get to the bottom of it because I know that these bureaucrats cannot be trusted to investigate themselves.

_I promise, if you help me today:_

* _I will subpoena every last document of Dr. Fauci’s unprecedented cover-up._
* _I will invite non-partisan scientists to inform America of the risks of creating viruses that don’t exist in nature._
* _I will make sure we FIRE FAUCI so he can never do this to America again. _

Because I know this is too important to let go.
_ _

Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3fgii--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8e-4qqlpo3/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we’ve seen yet. This sets the stage for what’s to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8f-4qqlpo4/ "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8g-4qqlpo5/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

You’ve fought with us for two consecutive years, and we need you to stick back our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t win this fight without you. **[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8h-4qqlpo6/ "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8i-4qqlpo7/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
Date: Wed, Jan 14, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: **We hate to see you go.**
**[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8j-4qqlpo8/ "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8k-4qqlpo9/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8l-4qqlpo0/ "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8m-4qqlpo1/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8n-4qqlpo2/)
---

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8o-4qqlpo3/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8p-4qqlpo4/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8q-4qqlpo5/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8r-4qqlpo6/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fgii-1wk8s-4qqlpo7/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: You need a passport to walk freely in our nation’s capital
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q6NFpggXsP_6VWF-HsjDqej0xJYYvDiEimebLbtIc581wXdqLDzHKUN4bTzSrnpgUzqLcLlUIMPhiG5F0YVb53cc3F8oJrz1S-i28Vz15mNPKj7gwOZ29Uuf-yjjd-pyipqRHbtW-yUWAy3A1-MJkKywwWxsPYx_j_UfhVLMsk0=&c=jkNhwGP4nPRg5lWkhH5dSPMBxxdyUxXhNTFR3Ci3d2C0j2BAdYwkIA==&ch=dij1Q-HfS4mW0ForECHaTbs3sFrHwGJ17mpKkq60-6JqaKclmjCrUQ==)
---
| Peter -
---
| The Left is trying to turn our nation's capital city into a left-wing hellhole on the Potomac...
Recently, they've been enforcing a vaccine mandate onto all citizens and visitors in Washington, D.C.
---
| | | [FIGHT THE VAX PASSPORTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q6NFpggXsP_6VWF-HsjDqej0xJYYvDiEimebLbtIc581wXdqLDzHKUN4bTzSrnpgUzqLcLlUIMPhiG5F0YVb53cc3F8oJrz1S-i28Vz15mNPKj7gwOZ29Uuf-yjjd-pyipqRHbtW-yUWAy3A1-MJkKywwWxsPYx_j_UfhVLMsk0=&c=jkNhwGP4nPRg5lWkhH5dSPMBxxdyUxXhNTFR3Ci3d2C0j2BAdYwkIA==&ch=dij1Q-HfS4mW0ForECHaTbs3sFrHwGJ17mpKkq60-6JqaKclmjCrUQ==)
---
| The only reasonable response from patriots to this authoritarian medical apartheid is simple... [DO NOT COMPLY!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q6NFpggXsP_6VWF-HsjDqej0xJYYvDiEimebLbtIc581wXdqLDzHKUN4bTzSrnpgUzqLcLlUIMPhiG5F0YVb53cc3F8oJrz1S-i28Vz15mNPKj7gwOZ29Uuf-yjjd-pyipqRHbtW-yUWAy3A1-MJkKywwWxsPYx_j_UfhVLMsk0=&c=jkNhwGP4nPRg5lWkhH5dSPMBxxdyUxXhNTFR3Ci3d2C0j2BAdYwkIA==&ch=dij1Q-HfS4mW0ForECHaTbs3sFrHwGJ17mpKkq60-6JqaKclmjCrUQ==)
Nowhere in America should governments or businesses have the power to medically segregate based on vaccination status. That's why I recently cancelled my membership at the Republican Capitol Hill Club as a result of their compliance requiring vax papers for entry.
As America First legislators, we have a duty to mandate freedom \- not forced injections - and Republican organizations should be pillars of the values we fight for.
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q6NFpggXsP_6VWF-HsjDqej0xJYYvDiEimebLbtIc581wXdqLDzHKUN4bTzSrnpgUzqLcLlUIMPhiG5F0YVb53cc3F8oJrz1S-i28Vz15mNPKj7gwOZ29Uuf-yjjd-pyipqRHbtW-yUWAy3A1-MJkKywwWxsPYx_j_UfhVLMsk0=&c=jkNhwGP4nPRg5lWkhH5dSPMBxxdyUxXhNTFR3Ci3d2C0j2BAdYwkIA==&ch=dij1Q-HfS4mW0ForECHaTbs3sFrHwGJ17mpKkq60-6JqaKclmjCrUQ==)
---
| | |
---
| The regime is trying to force us to choose between compliance and survival.
Notice how they don't push vaccine mandates for things like food stamps and welfare... That's how you know this isn't about health - it's about POWER!
We're failing the country if we do anything less than fight this with everything we've got. I'm not surrendering our freedom to the Washington tyrants... [And you don't have to either.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q6NFpggXsP_6VWF-HsjDqej0xJYYvDiEimebLbtIc581wXdqLDzHKUN4bTzSrnpgUzqLcLlUIMPhiG5F0YVb53cc3F8oJrz1S-i28Vz15mNPKj7gwOZ29Uuf-yjjd-pyipqRHbtW-yUWAy3A1-MJkKywwWxsPYx_j_UfhVLMsk0=&c=jkNhwGP4nPRg5lWkhH5dSPMBxxdyUxXhNTFR3Ci3d2C0j2BAdYwkIA==&ch=dij1Q-HfS4mW0ForECHaTbs3sFrHwGJ17mpKkq60-6JqaKclmjCrUQ==)
---
| | | [DO NOT COMPLY: FIGHT VAX PASSPORTS HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q6NFpggXsP_6VWF-HsjDqej0xJYYvDiEimebLbtIc581wXdqLDzHKUN4bTzSrnpgUzqLcLlUIMPhiG5F0YVb53cc3F8oJrz1S-i28Vz15mNPKj7gwOZ29Uuf-yjjd-pyipqRHbtW-yUWAy3A1-MJkKywwWxsPYx_j_UfhVLMsk0=&c=jkNhwGP4nPRg5lWkhH5dSPMBxxdyUxXhNTFR3Ci3d2C0j2BAdYwkIA==&ch=dij1Q-HfS4mW0ForECHaTbs3sFrHwGJ17mpKkq60-6JqaKclmjCrUQ==)

| Thanks for the support, Matt Gaetz

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Our Pathway to Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

We need a nontraditional candidate and campaign in order to replace Ron Johnson in the U.S. Senate. History shows us that the President’s political party typically loses seats in the midterm following their election. Fortunately, I’m not the typical person to run for office and we’re not running a traditional campaign. We’re building diverse coalitions across Wisconsin’s racial, geographic, ethnic, and political lines.

Photo of Steven Olikara with voters: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/Hmong_New_Year_Steven_2people.jpg]

Our campaign welcomes Democrats, Republicans, Independents and people from all walks of life. We’re reaching out and connecting with voters who are exhausted and disillusioned by the political process as it currently stands. We’re traveling all over Wisconsin talking with people from diverse backgrounds, listening to their needs and their vision for our state’s future. This is a winning strategy and it’s also what’s needed to successfully pass meaningful legislation in the U.S. Senate once elected. Please chip in to help us win in 2022!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email]

Button that says, "Donate $25" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email&amount=25]
Button that says, "Donate $50" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email&amount=50]
Button that says, "Donate $100" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email&amount=100]
Button that says, "Donate $250" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email&amount=250]
Button that says, "Donate $500" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email&amount=500]
Button that says, "Other Amount" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email&amount=other]

Your contribution gives us the resources needed to win this election and bring Wisconsinites together in an inclusive movement centered around one goal - Dignity for All . Your investment in our campaign shows the world that a different kind of politics is possible, and it begins in Wisconsin. Please donate today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email]

Many Thanks,
Steven

If you’re ready to replace Ron Johnson with honest and compassionate leadership, please contribute to our campaign for U.S. Senate.
We can meet this moment and change how we do politics.
Button that says, "DONATE NOW" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0204email]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Paid for by Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: Invite to John Selker’s Feb 8th Social Justice Conversation with Jason Dorsette
body:
John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He will be hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s position on key issues.

The Policy Conversation series begins on Tuesday February 8th at 7 pm on Zoom with the topic of Social Justice. Jason Dorsette, new Executive Director for Institutional Equity, Diversity & Inclusion at Linn-Benton Community College, will kick off the discussion. Jason has a history of working for social justice in the Willamette Valley through his work at OSU and as the local chapter president of the NAACP. Jason will briefly introduce the topic of social justice. John will then take a few minutes to explain his policy ideas on the topic, and then open the floor for Zoom participants to share their thoughts with him.

To register for the Policy Series and receive a Zoom link and passcode, go to [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwvcuisrT4pE9H1neFvyYsnJ2r56laN9v0X](https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwvcuisrT4pE9H1neFvyYsnJ2r56laN9v0X).
See the attached document for more details on registering for the Policy Conversations.

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

John will then take a few minutes to explain his policy ideas on the topic, and then open the floor for Zoom participants to share their thoughts with him. To register for the Policy Series and receive a Zoom link and passcode, go to . See the attached document for more details on registering for the Policy Conversations. Melanie Place Data and Communications Manager mailto:communication@selker4congress.org Cell: 541-286-0109 John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat <>

subject: Ramping up to WIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e997458a6d4b11f9/f611f41bd1584924c3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
Peter, A few weeks back I officially launched my campaign for Congress, and we’re not letting up for a minute. I’m running to fight for our families, our small businesses, and America’s future.... And we have a lot of hard work ahead of us to build our momentum and come out on top! **Today, we’re launching our FIRST “$5 Friday”** **grassroots fundraising drive.** I’m asking every single supporter to step up and pitch in $5 to sustain our critical efforts.
---
[**DONATE $5**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e997458a6d4b11f9/4b66693ec2941ca4c3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
I’ve served our great nation in the War on Terror. Today my wife Ornit and I run a small business in the home health care field, as we raise three amazing young children. I’m FED UP with this extreme-left agenda we’ve seen from the Democrats in Washington, and I’ve seen firsthand how the anti-growth policies of Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill have stifled opportunity and are holding us back. **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** Take a stand today as we ramp up to win. The primary election is now just over four months away, and the Democrats will pull out all the stops to protect their grip on this seat. Every donation makes a difference, and our goal today is 100% participation. **[Thank you in advance for making a $5 contribution today, or more if you can!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/e997458a6d4b11f9/f6b0f10d86832903c3d6b838967d376c/38863)** Toby Anderson Republican Candidate for Congress (NJ-11)

clean_body: | | | Peter, A few weeks back I officially launched my campaign for Congress, and we’re not letting up for a minute. I’m running to fight for our families, our small businesses, and America’s future.... And we have a lot of hard work ahead of us to build our momentum and come out on top! Today, we’re launching our FIRST “$5 Friday” grassroots fundraising drive. I’m asking every single supporter to step up and pitch in $5 to sustain our critical efforts. I’ve served our great nation in the War on Terror. Today my wife Ornit and I run a small business in the home health care field, as we raise three amazing young children. I’m FED UP with this extreme-left agenda we’ve seen from the Democrats in Washington, and I’ve seen firsthand how the anti-growth policies of Joe Biden and Mikie Sherrill have stifled opportunity and are holding us back. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! Take a stand today as we ramp up to win. The primary election is now just over four months away, and the Democrats will pull out all the stops to protect their grip on this seat. Every donation makes a difference, and our goal today is 100% participation. Toby Anderson Republican Candidate for Congress (NJ-11) id:2022-01-31-14:21:28:023t | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc. | |

name: Val Arkoosh
subject: Why I’m stepping out of this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Arkoosh for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41425766/328751897/2058529741?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzcwMGI4Ny1kMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMVXGHH3mvr16G2YYxZ0Gwea5T1tzRrvjBEFccOGIFk=&emci=aff5f7cb-ce85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b7700b87-d385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640)
---
Peter, Each step I’ve taken in my life has been inspired by the people I've met along the way. As a physician, it was the patients I saw each day on the labor and delivery floor – pregnant moms managing diabetes without access to a grocery store in their neighborhood. Dads who had to miss the birth of a child for fear they’d lose their job. People denied insurance for a pre-existing condition. There was just nothing I could do as a doctor to address those problems. That’s why I took my fight for my patients outside the exam room and became a physician advocate for the Affordable Care Act. That fight has continued each day since. It is why I became the Chair of the Commonwealth’s third-largest county, and it’s in large part why I got into this race – because there is so much work that needs to be done to lift up Pennsylvania families. Since launching this campaign, we’ve logged a lot of miles. I have met with workers, families, and small business owners. I’ve heard concerns from child care workers about how critical tackling our child care crisis is to our entire economy. I have met with families impacted by fracking and the climate crisis hurting Pennsylvania communities. And I’ve listened to the stories of Pennsylvania women on just how important it is they have access to abortion care. **For each of those Pennsylvanians, we cannot let anything stand in the way of a Democrat being elected to the U.S. Senate. The stakes are just too high. And it’s become clear to me that the best way I can ensure that happens is to suspend my campaign today and commit to doing whatever I can to help ensure we flip this Senate seat in November.** I want to thank you sincerely for your support and all that we have accomplished – and we’ve accomplished quite a lot:
* We helped make sure issues like abortion rights and climate change were part of the conversation around flipping this critical seat.

* We earned support in every corner of the Commonwealth, with more than 40 local endorsements behind this campaign.

* And importantly, we’ve used each day of this campaign to hold Republicans, like Dr. Oz, to account – for spreading misinformation about COVID-19, undermining our democracy by denying the results of the 2020 election, and opposing policies that will help Pennsylvania families like the Child Tax Credit and bipartisan infrastructure law.

**That work remains so important. And it will continue today, tomorrow, and the next day.** My name may not be on the ballot, but make no mistake, I will still be fighting every day to help win this election. There’s too much at stake. I said from the beginning we would build a campaign about Pennsylvanians and for Pennsylvanians, and I will keep fighting for you each and every day. Know I am humbled by your support in this campaign and appreciate your being a part of our team. It has meant so much to me. And I will see you soon. With determination, Val
Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate
P.O. Box 627
Norristown, PA 19404
United States **[www.valarkoosh.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41425768/328751899/509241870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzcwMGI4Ny1kMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMVXGHH3mvr16G2YYxZ0Gwea5T1tzRrvjBEFccOGIFk=&emci=aff5f7cb-ce85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b7700b87-d385-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5086640) | [info@valarkoosh.com](mailto:info@valarkoosh.com)** | Paid for by Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate
---

name: Latham Saddler
subject: Celebrities Can't Save Us
body:
Georgia Voters Need Someone They Can Count On
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,
It has been a busy and exciting start to the Election Year! Our campaign hasn't slowed down since we started the New Year. In fact, we've been working even harder to fight for Georgia and our country, and to make the case that I'm the only candidate who can defeat Raphael Warnock in November.
We are at a critical moment in our nation's history. The Joe Biden & Raphael Warnock agenda has led to record inflation, major supply chain shortages, and the very real threat of a new conflict with Russia. This moment calls for experienced leadership from someone who has been in the fight, not just overseas in uniform, but on the front lines in Washington, D.C. working to implement the America First agenda. The truth is, celebrities can't save us. [While Herschel Walker skips a debate, avoids media interviews, exits events without taking questions and sidesteps discussions on policy issues](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a8bBjB0mM0oTlmaMm0fBv-brNP0f78GYseiS1i5K3wogk8Alpb394bc1Wuvj7FZ-A_Qb_NJ0oXwgiaeBxD9Xm5r4FlLe7sDJ_qhmUo768WUvimegB6T3f_gBougwf2qrX81Sz16raJ7KT-FSIuZaVHMYZzi1pmFZZBLJTRT6NmdkM1CpD91EU_kpuLDnLJOeg38ghZyc8r3G-KUXtZBisy5OiHlCzxL25eEyRMt7leOcNWOKhST0U3zvkemyDPj4Bj-dSDWmADpW_cGbljuUG8g9t9eG-CssRZOQ5dVL7oo=&c=bBjqVsgRvPAnHUes9I_HlI0wQ4IAsr5X7A2DTebNDh1Z0Xh98guicg==&ch=ogoT1qQTDWr9pZE3iQ58w68xm8oSAbwCw3WXvPlIy_bgHyVkgJUwaw==), I am meeting with voters, conducting interviews and [talking about specific solutions to the problems our country faces right ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a8bBjB0mM0oTlmaMm0fBv-brNP0f78GYseiS1i5K3wogk8Alpb394bc1Wuvj7FZ-f3TbjBtxUrUvJY61PSJA7tEE5kFCu-Qn_Xcwz75LWQJ59Lmm-tbum8sj4KJafmmY-f07tdHXYkNn1NOldQ00HZXkOeeZjxIGDO3UMlOW9ZXRjqgMAvZAoUYtm8oYJgzmgbYMcCwS0UMj01RBL-k1LGx7BJprA1yviOacMEorpWM4eRcfqzhkzNd4aIfaWho0PVFwdT3EUL7XzIc-6RXy1mI4M7aDx7RjEOhMpAAf6hzn7XmrfIzX5ESDK-4urhg3GM5GUSY0Ubg=&c=bBjqVsgRvPAnHUes9I_HlI0wQ4IAsr5X7A2DTebNDh1Z0Xh98guicg==&ch=ogoT1qQTDWr9pZE3iQ58w68xm8oSAbwCw3WXvPlIy_bgHyVkgJUwaw==)[now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a8bBjB0mM0oTlmaMm0fBv-brNP0f78GYseiS1i5K3wogk8Alpb394bc1Wuvj7FZ-f3TbjBtxUrUvJY61PSJA7tEE5kFCu-Qn_Xcwz75LWQJ59Lmm-tbum8sj4KJafmmY-f07tdHXYkNn1NOldQ00HZXkOeeZjxIGDO3UMlOW9ZXRjqgMAvZAoUYtm8oYJgzmgbYMcCwS0UMj01RBL-k1LGx7BJprA1yviOacMEorpWM4eRcfqzhkzNd4aIfaWho0PVFwdT3EUL7XzIc-6RXy1mI4M7aDx7RjEOhMpAAf6hzn7XmrfIzX5ESDK-4urhg3GM5GUSY0Ubg=&c=bBjqVsgRvPAnHUes9I_HlI0wQ4IAsr5X7A2DTebNDh1Z0Xh98guicg==&ch=ogoT1qQTDWr9pZE3iQ58w68xm8oSAbwCw3WXvPlIy_bgHyVkgJUwaw==). Which is what a United States Senator should do.

body:
Some MAJOR news coming out of Missouri!
---
| | | | | |
---
| Peter,
You're going to want to see this.
A trial date has been set for the ex-FBI agent that worked with Soros-funded prosecutor Kim Gardner to bring a false case against me! (It's March 28th in St. Louis.)
A Missouri grand jury indicted William Tisaby for SEVEN FELONY CHARGES for committing perjury and evidence tampering!
Then in April, Soros-funded prosecutor Kim Gardner faces a hearing to LOSE HER LAW LICENSE for over 68 instances of prosecutorial misconduct during their false case against me.
Now it's clear: they attacked me because I was fighting for the people of Missouri and I wouldn't just go-along to get-along as Governor.
Anyway... just wanted to make sure you saw this MAJOR news.
Stay warm! Eric

clean_body: I simply cannot afford to fall short | | | = I know you’ve heard from me a lot, friend,but I had to reach out as soon as I saw that I'm falling $8,110 short of tonight’s fundraising goal. = In a race this close – with expanding Senate control riding on Florida – I simply cannot afford to fall short. Polling has me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and CNN analysts say Florida is one of the states most likely to flip blue. If I win, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority, which is why national Republicans have already poured $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizing to stop me from flipping Florida blue in November. Experts say my biggest barrier to winning is resources. Every dollar will matter in my race because Florida's last Senate race was decided by less than one percentage point. So I'm worried that if I don't hit my grassroots fundraising goal tonight, I won't have the resources I need to surge ahead. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Chief Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: urgent news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter, I had to reach out:
**FIRST:** My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R) just announced that he's raised nearly **$10 MILLION to defeat me** and retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell.
**THEN:** A new poll just came out that **shows me one point down** – in the race experts say could decide Senate control.
**NOW:** Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice and more – is on the line in this race. But if we fail to fight back now, we could risk handing this seat and our critical Senate majority right back to Mitch McConnell.
**That's why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP spending, pull ahead, and win this race. But time is running out, and we're still falling short.**
**[Please, Peter, I'm counting on you: Will you rush $20 or more right now to split between Dick Durbin and my campaign so we can win in Georgia and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41426454/328755494/-968946016?refcode=dd_em_220203_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk1MzU1NC1kNTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LChZUh1-AeqOHFrYx3tNeQz33Abqlr3KpOcqrlYR1PU=)**

name: Team Gearing
subject: 10 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

With only 10 days left until Texans start heading to the polls, the work we do every day to reach voters is more important than ever.

Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us reach more voters? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Charlie is running to build a Texas that works for everyone regardless of their political party. Extremists in Austin have put their political agendas ahead of the needs of Texas families and its time we put an end to their games. As our next State Representative, Charlie will work tirelessly to deliver results to the people here at home and throughout the state by building consensus where it can be found. Ambassador Ron Kirk called Charlie a “coalition builder” and he’s joined former State Senator Wendy Davis and Dallas City Council Members Paula Blackmon and Chad West in endorsing Charlie as the next representative for HD 114!

Your donation helps us buy the campaign literature, yard signs, direct mail, and digital advertising we need to reach voters and win this race.
Every bit helps, can you chip in anything you can afford today >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]

Charlie is running to build a better Texas where all our neighbors can thrive. We hope you’ll join us!

Team Gearing

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90675/images/Gearing_SHLogo_blueonlightblueDEM.png]Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427313/328759556/130719921?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJhYmNjNC1kNzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqpIDW0JI0MRr3kh-JvzhgXgvGOhOUeeRdfwafTqnTc=&emci=b6ae1fce-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3fbabcc4-d785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)** Republicans in Wisconsin are fast-tracking bills that were released on Tuesday, which will restrict who can obtain absentee ballots, give power to the GOP to eliminate staff and cut funding to state agencies, and force the elections commission to obtain legislative approval before spending federal funds. This not only affects elections here in Wisconsin, but Republicans nationwide are making similar moves to change elections after President Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the 2020 election. The bills were circulated with a one day deadline, and are extremely likely to be vetoed by Gov. Tony Evers if passed. However, this is foreshadowing the plan of Republicans if Evers does not get re-elected in November.

* * *
## **[U.S. Added 467,000 Jobs Despite New Covid Variant Surge](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427314/328759557/1798931666?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJhYmNjNC1kNzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqpIDW0JI0MRr3kh-JvzhgXgvGOhOUeeRdfwafTqnTc=&emci=b6ae1fce-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3fbabcc4-d785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427315/328759558/1798931666?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJhYmNjNC1kNzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqpIDW0JI0MRr3kh-JvzhgXgvGOhOUeeRdfwafTqnTc=&emci=b6ae1fce-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3fbabcc4-d785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)** Some good news - Nonfarm payrolls rose 467,000 in January which is greater than the Wall Street estimate. Covid cases have also dropped more than 50% since their peak in the middle of last month. The largest employment gains were seen in leisure and hospitality with 151,000 hires (108,000 from bars and restaurants), professional and business services with 86,000 hires, and retail increased 61,000. These job gains brought employment back to about 1.7 million below where it was in February 2020, a month before the pandemic declaration.
* * *
## [**ISIS Leader killed Wednesday**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427316/328759559/-918513241?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJhYmNjNC1kNzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqpIDW0JI0MRr3kh-JvzhgXgvGOhOUeeRdfwafTqnTc=&emci=b6ae1fce-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3fbabcc4-d785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427317/328759560/-918513241?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmJhYmNjNC1kNzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nqpIDW0JI0MRr3kh-JvzhgXgvGOhOUeeRdfwafTqnTc=&emci=b6ae1fce-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=3fbabcc4-d785-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9315441)** President Joe Biden announced thursday that ISIS leader Abu IBrahim al-Hashimi al-Qurayshi was killed during a counterterrorism raid in northwest Syria. This was the biggest US raid since the 2019 operation that kilied ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi. It was reported that Qurayshi blew himself up as US forces approcahed his compound. Good news to share with you, Derek — **Today, the United Steelworkers Local 1088 just endorsed Chris for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 17th Congressional District!** Chris is the first candidate in the race to pick up a union endorsement, and our team is so proud to have this key endorsement. Here’s what the President of USW Local 1088 had to say about Chris: _“Because of his efforts and support for workers in higher education to unionize, we stand in solidarity with Chris Deluzio. We need allies like Chris to continue our fight for dignity and respect for all workers.” - Rich Schiavoni_ This is a major step forward for our grassroots team. Chris is committed to fighting for every Pennsylvania worker so they have a seat at the table — including the right to unionize, higher wages, stronger benefits, and building worker power through collective bargaining. [**Our movement is here to stay. Thanks for being part of the fight for our common good. ✊
Team Deluzio

clean_body: Today, the United Steelworkers Local 188 just endorsed Chris for Pennsylvania’s 17th Congressional District! | = Good news to share with you, Derek — Today, the United Steelworkers Local 1088 just endorsed Chris for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 17th Congressional District! Chris is the first candidate in the race to pick up a union endorsement, and our team is so proud to have this key endorsement. Here’s what the President of USW Local 1088 had to say about Chris: “Because of his efforts and support for workers in higher education to unionize, we stand in solidarity with Chris Deluzio. We need allies like Chris to continue our fight for dignity and respect for all workers.” - Rich Schiavoni This is a major step forward for our grassroots team. Chris is committed to fighting for every Pennsylvania worker so they have a seat at the table — including the right to unionize, higher wages, stronger benefits, and building worker power through collective bargaining. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Chris stood with the Steelworkers when he fought for a union at Pitt last fall, and he will continue to stand with workers across Western Pennsylvania in Washington. Thanks for being part of the fight for our common good. ✊ Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. It’s Dan Crenshaw. I’m reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1. Beating Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes – it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---

---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed.**But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fhly-1wlhj-4qqlpo7/ "RENEW NOW")

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time – but it’s critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| |
* * *

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3fhly-1wlhn-4qqlpo1/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

subject: Will you personally endorse my campaign?

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427881/328762372/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhmMDljYi1kOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k__WMDtKZCpZ6a1Wi4BJ9mSJe2UoN2BFBVITaZ3R0cY=)
Friend,

It's been a busy couple of weeks on the campaign trail here in NC-14. We're officially in an election year, so we've been ramping up our outreach efforts.

I'm so proud that I've been able to run an issues-focused campaign centered on the needs of Western North Carolina. We're not shying away from tough conversations, and we won't write off anyone because they're “too conservative” or disillusioned with the process.

**That's the difference between me and guys like Madison Cawthorn. For them, winning means dividing our community and riling up the extreme-right of their party. For us, winning means uniting our community so we can get back to work for Western North Carolina families.**

**[I have a special request today: Will you add your name to say you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? Now that we are entering the next phase of our campaign, we're hoping to lock in 500 grassroots endorsers to kick off the election year with strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427882/328762373/1791157811?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhmMDljYi1kOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k__WMDtKZCpZ6a1Wi4BJ9mSJe2UoN2BFBVITaZ3R0cY=&emci=b7dfc6fa-4d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=dc8f09cb-d985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=18459276)**

Eric Gash **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41427884/328762375/1573964380?refcode=em-2.4.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhmMDljYi1kOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k__WMDtKZCpZ6a1Wi4BJ9mSJe2UoN2BFBVITaZ3R0cY=)**

We're not shying away from tough conversations, and we won't write off anyone because they're “too conservative” or disillusioned with the process. That's the difference between me and guys like Madison Cawthorn. For them, winning means dividing our community and riling up the extreme-right of their party. For us, winning means uniting our community so we can get back to work for Western North Carolina families. | I hope you're as fired up for the months ahead as I am. In the meantime, help us kick off 2022 with strength by adding your personal endorsement today. Sincerely, Eric Gash = | = Eric Gash is a teacher, pastor, former professional football player, and high school football coach running to flip NC-14 blue. Please consider = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Eric Gash for Congress PO BOX 543 Hendersonville, NC 28793 United States | Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: 5 things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41428508/328765870/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzVmMTBlNS1kYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pccAnG-OdVsYLbiSK5ndy2wemYUlaa_HRzFDCXsxYU0=&emci=4f933bc6-4a85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=775f10e5-db85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41428510/328765872/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzVmMTBlNS1kYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pccAnG-OdVsYLbiSK5ndy2wemYUlaa_HRzFDCXsxYU0=&emci=4f933bc6-4a85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=775f10e5-db85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When a candidate for office asks you to lend them your support — you should be confident about what they stand for.
[**After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, I'm home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa — and I'm writing today to ask you to become a 2022 donor to this campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41428512/328765874/-42398318?refcode=em20220204mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzVmMTBlNS1kYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pccAnG-OdVsYLbiSK5ndy2wemYUlaa_HRzFDCXsxYU0=)
So, here's some substance about where I stand on the issues:
* Every American should enjoy comprehensive healthcare. That includes dental, mental, and preventive care, and ultimately, Medicare available to all who need it.

* The threat posed by the climate crisis is enormous, but so are the benefits we can enjoy by addressing it. That’s especially true in Iowa thanks to renewed leadership in agriculture and bioenergy.

* It's appalling that large corporations and the very wealthy pay a lower tax rate than ordinary Iowans. It's time to stop giving working families a raw deal and start eliminating loopholes for the ultra-rich.

* Too many of our students right here in Iowa don't get the quality of education they deserve. We need to pay our teachers what they're worth, and we can take steps to improve education in rural areas by making sure they get their fair share of per-student spending.

* And finally, I believe that Americans deserve a movement of steel-jawed Democrats who win with the first punch and don't back down. We don't need to coddle Chuck Grassley and others who were aware of attempts to overthrow our democracy; we need to show them the barn door.

[**If all of this sounds right to you, then there is something you can do about it: Chip into our campaign today. clean_body: Hello, When a candidate for office asks you to lend them your support — you should be confident about what they stand for. = So, here's some substance about where I stand on the issues: Every American should enjoy comprehensive healthcare. That includes dental, mental, and preventive care, and ultimately, Medicare available to all who need it. The threat posed by the climate crisis is enormous, but so are the benefits we can enjoy by addressing it. That’s especially true in Iowa thanks to renewed leadership in agriculture and bioenergy. It's appalling that large corporations and the very wealthy pay a lower tax rate than ordinary Iowans. It's time to stop giving working families a raw deal and start eliminating loopholes for the ultra-rich. Too many of our students right here in Iowa don't get the quality of education they deserve. We need to pay our teachers what they're worth, and we can take steps to improve education in rural areas by making sure they get their fair share of per-student spending. * And finally, I believe that Americans deserve a movement of steel-jawed Democrats who win with the first punch and don't back down. We don't need to coddle Chuck Grassley and others who were aware of attempts to overthrow our democracy; we need to show them the barn door. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I've said this before, but I'll repeat it here. I think you deserve a Senator who is pragmatic enough to achieve what’s achievable, but bold enough to aim for what we haven't yet been able to achieve. It's my sincere hope I can be that Senator for you. Thanks for your support, and thanks for doing what it takes to win this election. Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Shannon Sneed, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Hi there, team
body:
I’m Shannon – Tom’s running mate and candidate for Lieutenant Governor. I can’t tell you how excited I am to meet you and work with you to build a better future for Maryland alongside Tom.
#

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41428483/328765762/-954075203?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220203-LtGov2-ND&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjVmMTBlNS1kYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3XhTjZsybPhkZ_xVIoxBjjRuumE28mMcTEmcjZgsx8=)
Hi team,

I'm Shannon – Tom's running mate and candidate for Lieutenant Governor. I can't tell you how excited I am to meet you and work with you to build a better future for Maryland alongside Tom.

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **_[pitch in to support our historic ticket](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41428485/328765764/-954075203?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220203-LtGov2-ND&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjVmMTBlNS1kYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3XhTjZsybPhkZ_xVIoxBjjRuumE28mMcTEmcjZgsx8=)_** , but I hope you'll give me a moment to introduce myself and explain why I'm so excited to join Tom in the fight for Maryland's future.

Maryland has my heart. I've called this state home for more than 20 years. It's where I found lifelong sisterhood as a soror of Alpha Kappa Alpha. It's where I started my family, and it's where I served the people of Baltimore's 13th District on the City Council – uplifting working families and neighborhoods, helping victims of police brutality heal from their trauma, and fighting for working moms – just like me.

**I'm joining Tom because like me, he has spent his entire career working to uplift working communities and families.**

Like me, Tom knows what it's like to be raised by a single parent, working hard to make ends meet – just like so many Marylanders.

Like me, Tom is an experienced leader who doesn't just have a vision for Maryland's future, but the skills and will to get it done.

**Together – I know we can build a Maryland that delivers for our people and sets a national example as a provider of jobs, justice, and equal opportunity for everyone.**

But we need your help, team. **Candidates in this crowded primary field have spent months fundraising alongside their running mates, and we need to catch up.**

**_[Please chip in $3 or whatever you can now to help us kick off our partnership with a surge of grassroots momentum.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41428487/328765766/-954075203?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220203-LtGov2-ND&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjVmMTBlNS1kYjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p3XhTjZsybPhkZ_xVIoxBjjRuumE28mMcTEmcjZgsx8=)_**

name: Jessica Mason
subject: URGENT: All hands needed on deck.
body:
Team New Deal, I need your help with phone banking and knocking doors.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41429652/328770548/-1288899752?refcode=220204_CLTV_volunteerphonebankrecruit_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGVlMjQ5Mi1kZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bFo7q69NW_g8gRhAvTkm1fooGXWg5WL1rHjIvoli2Q4=)
---
**URGENT ACTION NEEDED: With less than 2 weeks until the Primary Election Day on March 1, we need all hands on deck immediately.**

Sorry to come at you like this on a Friday, Team New Deal. But this is really serious, and there's no time to waste._ _ If we are going to win, we need to immediately ensure that NO voter in TX-30 is left behind.

Let’s get people excited and hopeful about the future of our district, our state, and our country by personally talking to them about what we can achieve if we elect a real working-class leader who won’t give up on the fight for bold progressive change. _**Our campaign is currently in urgent need of volunteers to help our team with phone-bank voter outreach to help boost our message before Election Day.**_

**Believe it or not, people want to hear from YOU as a grassroots supporter. **They want to know why you are on Team New Deal and want to talk to you about the changes you want to see in our communities. **Can I count on you today to sign-up for at least two short phone-bank shifts below?**
**[For WEEKDAY phone-banking opportunities sign-up clean_body: Team New Deal, I need your help with phone banking and knocking doors. | | | = URGENT ACTION NEEDED: With less than 2 weeks until the Primary Election Day on March 1, we need all hands on deck immediately. Sorry to come at you like this on a Friday, Team New Deal. But this is really serious, and there's no time to waste. If we are going to win, we need to immediately ensure that NO voter in TX-30 is left behind. Let’s get people excited and hopeful about the future of our district, our state, and our country by personally talking to them about what we can achieve if we elect a real working-class leader who won’t give up on the fight for bold progressive change. Our campaign is currently in urgent need of volunteers to help our team with phone-bank voter outreach to help boost our message before Election Day. Believe it or not, people want to hear from YOU as a grassroots supporter. They want to know why you are on Team New Deal and want to talk to you about the changes you want to see in our communities. Can I count on you today to sign-up for at least two short phone-bank shifts below? __ __ It is absolutely critical in these final days that we keep knocking on doors, dialing numbers, and talking to voters if we’re going to get them to the polls. And you can have a major impact by volunteering your time to make just a few phone calls. Thanks for being there for me, Jessica = ********************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress******************** ********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = ____= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

---
Hey friend, My name is Hannah, and I’m Ashley Ehasz’s campaign manager. As a woman and a Pennsylvania Democrat, I was thrilled to join this campaign to elect Ashley, a Democrat and combat veteran who would be the first woman in this seat, to replace Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and finally flip PA-01 blue. Ashley is bold, caring, and unafraid to stand up for our democracy and fight for our best interests in Washington, D.C. As someone who grew up in a financially unstable household that was impacted by substance abuse and mental health issues, Ashley knows what it's like to struggle, and how critical our government can be in providing a safety net to lift us up. Ashley will do what it takes to bring good-paying union jobs, affordable healthcare and low prescription drug prices, and high quality public education to our communities — and she’ll do it while defending our right to choose and our voting rights from GOP attacks. Unlike Brian Fitzpatrick — who’s put partisan interests above the needs of his constituents — Ashley will be a true fighter for PA-01. But first, we need to get her on the ballot for the primary election in May! **This is a people-powered campaign, and that means we’re counting on volunteers to help us spread the word about Ashley through activities like collecting nomination petitions, knocking on doors, making phone calls, signing postcards, and more!** [**You can make a huge difference on this campaign. Sign up to volunteer today and we’ll be in touch with opportunities to get involved!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41429963/328772052/128909031?refcode=fl_email_vol_20220204vol_hj_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcwODgyYy1kZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ek1I_mE_OYTdJ3d7smJc_fpPOjOHdSYnHbUBZDgazo=&emci=e0f910f6-1885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=0a70882c-df85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643323) | [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41429964/328772053/128909031?refcode=fl_email_vol_20220204vol_hj_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTcwODgyYy1kZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ek1I_mE_OYTdJ3d7smJc_fpPOjOHdSYnHbUBZDgazo=&emci=e0f910f6-1885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=0a70882c-df85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=5643323)

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, we know we are stronger as a team. That’s why we’re asking you to help us MATCH | BREAKING: $50,000 of Attack Ads Launched Fellow Conservative - I'll be quick because I wanted to share some breaking news... We learned that $50,000 in online attack ads were launched against our campaign. Yes, you read that right - $50,000 in digital ads! This comes just a week after finding out that our Democrat opponent has $23 million in the bank. Can you imagine the attack ads that will be coming our way over the next 9 months? Fellow Conservative, we know we are stronger as a team. That's why we're asking you to help us MATCH the amount being spent against us in this first barrage of attacks. We appreciate the support that so many patriots have already provided since we launched Team Herschel in late August. Recent polls confirm the race is a dead heat, but we must make sure we have the funds to talk directly to the people of Georgia and set the record straight. Help us FIGHT BACK. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Trump for Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Peter --

FIRST: Polls show a red wave building to
sweep Democrats out of power.

THEN: The American people fire Nancy Pelosi.

NEXT: An America First majority elects Donald
Trump the Speaker of the House.

Would you like to see Nancy Pelosi out of a
job in 2022?
Would you like to see Donald Trump wielding
the Speaker's Gavel leading an America First majority that slams
the breaks on Joe Biden's socialist agenda?
If you agree, I hope you will chip in a
contribution right away to help me elect America First
conservatives across the country and send Nancy Pelosi packing.

With Speaker Donald J. Trump leading the way,
conservatives can force the FBI to answer real questions about
the "FEDSURRECTION" that took place on January 6.

No more ducking, dodging and hiding behind
Never Trump sellouts Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger and the rest
of Nancy Pelosi's January 6 witch hunt committee.

An America First majority will demand the
truth about the FBI having informants and agents in the crowd
that day and if they conspired or incited violence.

I want to find out what role the Federal
government, specifically the FBI and DOJ, had in instigating the
events of that day.
Firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker this November
and replacing her with Donald Trump is step one in getting those
answers.
And that's why I am leading the charge to
FIRE Nancy Pelosi and replace her with President Trump.

That's I hope you will support my campaign to
elect an America First majority by chipping in a contribution of
$10, $25, $50, or $100 right away.

However, unraveling the Biden regime and fake
news media lies about January 6 is just the start.

An America First majority led by Speaker
Donald Trump will:

Shine a light on Hunter Biden's corrupt
business dealings in Ukraine and Communist China.

Hold Joe Biden accountable for the illegal
alien invasion on the southern border.

Expose the Big Tech censors covering up for
Dr. Fauci's lies about funding dangerous coronavirus research at
the Wuhan Institute of Virology.

I know I want to see Nancy Pelosi surrender
the Speaker's Gavel to Donald Trump.

My first vote in the next Congress will be
firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House and replacing her
with Donald Trump.

But I need your help to send Pelosi packing
and elect in America First majority.
So please help me fight to end Nancy Pelosi's
reign by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250,
$100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,900 today.

Together I know that America First Patriots
will take our country back this November.

Sincerely,

Matt Gaetz

Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz

On January 17, Mark Pukita began airing eight radio ads on iHeart and Salem talk stations in Ohio. His ads are different from those of other candidates. Mark Pukita "says the quiet part out loud." Pukita calls out other candidates who are caricatures and facades. He blasts the WOKE culture at home, at school and at work. Pukita zeroes in on real policy. Pukita calls on us, as a state and a nation, to have the honest conversations that are so desperately needed right now. Listen to Mark Pukita's eight new ads below or by clicking on the button.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: It’s time for racial justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**Black History Month is important for so many reasons, but recently I’ve been reflecting on how timely it is this year. **
After a 2020 filled with worldwide protests against police brutality that started right here in America, and a 2021 where we saw major voting rights legislation stalled, our work for racial justice feels more urgent than ever.
**It is our duty to look out for one another, to practice true solidarity and build a better world together. **
That means considering the systemic toll of racism that Black Americans face. **It also means following the advice of many Black leaders, activists, and thinkers with the policies we promote.**
Most progressive policies that are popular today can be traced back to Black organizers. The Black Panthers supported free K-12 education and laid the groundwork for our present-day movement for free college. The Civil Rights Movement created equal voting rights as we know them today. And Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. regularly championed a living wage for all.
**[Every policy that’s part of my platform contributes to racial justice, because we must build a future that is more equitable. You can read about them here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41431266/328777815/-324758284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2I4M2Q0Ni1lNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WlfE-SW84FYQXOumaP9jJXwqGyn8Ml0UhrUKON28mM=&emci=c9fbc591-3985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=73b83d46-e485-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=21617867) **
Housing justice, environmental and climate justice, gender equality, LGBTQ+ rights, healthcare, canceling student debt, infrastructure, public transit, COVID relief: every single one addresses the impacts of racism across society.
**I’m committed to a better version of this country, one where we experience true equality and support each other across our differences.**
That future can only be achieved when we center and uplift Black voices. **This month and every month, we honor Black history, but also listen to Black Americans who are speaking and organizing and leading now. **
Together, I believe we will win that better future.

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *

name: Great America Update
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6780%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=BVxROxd4ABCzONuXEPcTHw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69801%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qT4SlYD%2b0TRla2ig7sbrKA&sysid=1) Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69801%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qT4SlYD%2b0TRla2ig7sbrKA&sysid=1) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69802%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fTNQB0B2BWgo54RvralGmg&sysid=1) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism --especially among our young people--that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69802%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fTNQB0B2BWgo54RvralGmg&sysid=1) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69803%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2jKlMAPrcqvRoWZhHXgWmA&sysid=1) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

1) **Revive our Economy** by creating a workforce development pipeline, encourage new development, and pushing for less taxes and regulations.

3) **Restore Voting Rights**. Joe Biden and the Democrats in D.C. want a federal takeover of state election systems and Lisa Murkowski was the only Republican who supported their efforts! I support a transparent state-based election system that will guarantee one citizen, one vote.

clean_body: | | | | I am. | Peter, Did you know that 72% of Americans say the country is headed in the wrong direction? Don’t believe me, take a look for yourself... Thanks to Joe Biden and the Democrats, Americans are struggling every day. Just here in Alaska, over the past year gas prices have risen $1.10 per gallon, or an extra $28 every time you go to fill up. We cannot continue to live like this. It’s time for leadership that focuses on policies that work and that actually puts Americans first. This is why I am running against Liberal Lisa Murkowski to be the next United States Senator from Alaska. As your next Senator, I promise to: 1) Revive our Economy by creating a workforce development pipeline, encourage new development, and pushing for less taxes and regulations. 2) Reclaim our rights! The Left is constantly attacking our Second Amendment rights, our rights to free speech and religious liberty, and our rights to resources and land. I will fight for our rights and ONLY vote for judicial nominees that are constitutionalists. 3) Restore Voting Rights. Joe Biden and the Democrats in D.C. want a federal takeover of state election systems and Lisa Murkowski was the only Republican who supported their efforts! I support a transparent state-based election system that will guarantee one citizen, one vote. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka Candidate for United States Senate FROM ALASKA. FOR ALASKA. ⭐️CONSERVATIVE⭐️PRO-LIFE⭐️PRO-2ND AMENDMENT | | | | ==

Team,

**Conor Lamb is a Pennsylvanian through and through.**

He grew up in Pittsburgh and went to college and law school in Philadelphia. He served in the Marines, then came back to Pennsylvania to serve as a federal prosecutor, and now as our Representative in Congress. He knows us, and he knows the issues that matter most to working families in Pennsylvania.

**On the other hand,** Dr. Oz grew up in Ohio, lives in New Jersey, and only became a registered voter in Pennsylvania in 2020 – **using his in-laws’ address.** To make himself seem like he cares about our local economy, Dr. Oz even photoshopped himself in front of the Bethlehem SteelStacks – **a steel plant that closed in 1995** – to try and suggest it was _President Biden’s_ fault. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41431622/328779123/1085202693?refcode=em22_220201_oz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGY4OWVmNy1lNDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xyfqiDN83zkAkTT5pOkg_soXIs21PtPh9SG-zXG7ij8=)

clean_body: | = Team, Conor Lamb is a Pennsylvanian through and through. He grew up in Pittsburgh and went to college and law school in Philadelphia. He served in the Marines, then came back to Pennsylvania to serve as a federal prosecutor, and now as our Representative in Congress. He knows us, and he knows the issues that matter most to working families in Pennsylvania. On the other hand, Dr. Oz grew up in Ohio, lives in New Jersey, and only became a registered voter in Pennsylvania in 2020 – using his in-laws’ address. To make himself seem like he cares about our local economy, Dr. Oz even photoshopped himself in front of the Bethlehem SteelStacks – a steel plant that closed in 1995 – to try and suggest it was President Biden’s fault. | = Talk about phony. = = This is a serious moment for our country, and we need a serious leader who will put in the work to actually get things done for working families in Pennsylvania. Dr. Oz and several other candidates in this race are not serious leaders – Conor Lamb is. Conor Lamb is ready to put in the work for us and for all working families around the country who want affordable health care, safe infrastructure, fair wages, and voting rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for stepping up, Team Lamb *

body:
Peter :
We’re excited to invite you to a Get Out the Vote rally in San Antonio, hosted by Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio]Here are the details:
Who: AOC, Greg, Jessica + you, Peter!
What: Get Out The Vote Rally with AOC!
When: Saturday, Feb. 12 at 12:00 PM CST
Where: Paper Tiger, 2410 N St Mary's St., San Antonio, TX 78212
Texans are hungry for change. That’s why we’re excited to have AOC in Texas hosting a Get Out The Vote rally ahead of early voting. If you’re free on February 12, please join us at Paper Tiger at 12:00 PM so we can bring the progressive wave to South Texas. RSVP here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio]
RSVP NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio]Unable to attend? Can you make a contribution to support my campaign instead? We only have 10 days until early voting starts and we’re going to need as many grassroots supporters as possible. CLICK HERE to make a contribution . [https://bit.ly/casar-aoc]
Let’s get this done,
Greg Casar

subject: China is Not a Normal Business Partner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress
body:
During the Olympics, don't overlook the atrocities of the Chinese Communist Party | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dellickerforcongress/china_is_not_a_normal_partner?e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Dear Neighbors,

Today is the Opening Ceremony for the 2022 Winter Olympics in Beijing. As the world's top athletes compete, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) will use the Games to present China as a normal partner to the international community -- a benevolent host, a peaceful neighbor, a trusted associate.

Don’t believe it. It's all a facade.

Peel back the curtain and we see plainly how China is oppressing its people, threatening its neighbors, and stealing our technology. They continue to lie about the origins of COVID-19, send fentanyl across our borders, and launch cyberattacks against American institutions.

This is a threat to our nation and to our community. Ordinary Americans understand that. But many elitists in Washington and on Wall Street continue to look the other way. It’s time to hold the CCP and its unwitting enablers accountable.

Throughout the Games, I’m going to use the occasion of the Beijing Olympics to expose the top ten reasons why the CCP is anything but normal. For each reason, I’ll identify the issue, explain how it affects us here in the Lehigh Valley, and offer a pragmatic solution. After all, we can't just talk about China, we must act.

So go ahead and cheer for Team USA and support local athletes -- like Pat Nagle of the Lehigh Valley Phantoms -- as they compete for the gold.

But amid all the pageantry and happy veneer, let's not overlook the rot under the surface. The Communist Party of China is not our friend. We must act now to counter the threat before it’s too late.

Stay tuned.

Sincerely,

Kevin Dellicker

---
|
---
