clean_body: During the Olympics, don't overlook the atrocities of the Chinese Communist Party | | | | | | Dear Neighbors, Today is the Opening Ceremony for the 2022 Winter Olympics in Beijing. As the world's top athletes compete, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) will use the Games to present China as a normal partner to the international community -- a benevolent host, a peaceful neighbor, a trusted associate. Don’t believe it. It's all a facade. Peel back the curtain and we see plainly how China is oppressing its people, threatening its neighbors, and stealing our technology. They continue to lie about the origins of COVID-19, send fentanyl across our borders, and launch cyberattacks against American institutions. This is a threat to our nation and to our community. Ordinary Americans understand that. But many elitists in Washington and on Wall Street continue to look the other way. It’s time to hold the CCP and its unwitting enablers accountable. Throughout the Games, I’m going to use the occasion of the Beijing Olympics to expose the top ten reasons why the CCP is anything but normal. For each reason, I’ll identify the issue, explain how it affects us here in the Lehigh Valley, and offer a pragmatic solution. After all, we can't just talk about China, we must act. So go ahead and cheer for Team USA and support local athletes -- like Pat Nagle of the Lehigh Valley Phantoms -- as they compete for the gold. But amid all the pageantry and happy veneer, let's not overlook the rot under the surface. The Communist Party of China is not our friend. We must act now to counter the threat before it’s too late. Stay tuned. Sincerely, Kevin Dellicker | | "Learn More" | "Donate" | | KEEP AMERICA FREE Visit www.dellickerforcongress.com | mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com "Contact Kevin" | | | | | | | | | | | Neither military information nor photographs of Kevin in uniform imply endorsement of Kevin Dellicker for Congress by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. | | | Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Kevin Dellicker for Congress 1400 N Providence Rd Ste 1040 Media, PA 19063-2079 * USA

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
Since day one, we’ve been committed to fighting racial injustice in our state, especially when it comes to voting rights.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41433594/328788071/1946438321?refcode=EM_C_220204BlackHistoryMonth_H_MTO_30DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZkMDBhNi1lYzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5g7y07PZUFWAlAKQKuwCeUofO20XKqzrK81d0jFG6xI=&emci=6a41e0ee-3585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=206d00a6-ec85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)
Team,

February is Black History Month. The past few years have made the scale of injustice against Black Americans all too clear, especially when it comes to voting rights. Modern-day Jim Crow voter suppression laws have been passed in state legislatures all across the country.

**We must work together to identify, develop, and promote solutions to further achieve equality in our great state of New Mexico. Equality is achieved through the power of our vote.**
Since day one, we’ve been committed to making New Mexico a more equitable place. This starts with a commitment to expand voter access for everyone. When dangerous threats to our democracy arise, we need to fight back with full force. From voter suppression to racist rampages from public servants, we will not allow any attacks on fair elections to take place.

We’re on the front lines letting everyone know that their voices matter whether they’re voting in a school board election or a presidential one. We all have a chance to make a difference through the power of our vote.

**Thank you for being a part of it all – and I hope you have a wonderful start to Black History Month.**
Thank you,

Maggie
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy!**_ _**______[FIND OUT MORE!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41433595/328788072/1946438321?refcode=EM_C_220204BlackHistoryMonth_H_MTO_30DO_5_NG_N_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDZkMDBhNi1lYzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5g7y07PZUFWAlAKQKuwCeUofO20XKqzrK81d0jFG6xI=&emci=6a41e0ee-3585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=206d00a6-ec85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3583156)**_

clean_body: We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. | Fellow Conservative, What if I told you we have a chance to... ...defeat one of the most liberal Democrats in the Senate? ...take back the Senate by winning just ONE race in Georgia? ...elect a conservative superstar and football hero to the United States Senate? What if I told you we can do ALL THREE? That's why I'm endorsing my friend, Herschel Walker. From crushing it on the college and professional football fields to owning a successful business and being a spokesman for an organization that provides mental health services for our troops, Herschel Walker has done just about everything. Now, he's taking on his next challenge and facing his biggest race yet by running for Senate. We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. His Democrat opponent Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraising senator in the entire country. In fact, he raised $9.8 million in the past three months alone! If we're going to help Herschel win in Georgia and flip the Senate Majority red, he's going to need the critical resources to fund his campaign. That's where you and I come in. My very best, Nikki Haley | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I’m proud to endorse Senator Michael Bennet for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Add your name today to support Michael’s efforts to fight gun violence in our communities. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434307/328791104/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUyNzdjMi1lZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ushIsX9qKM720cQP60RZ7oViyfCJhl76BxeTt554rXU=)
Hello there, I’m Gabby Giffords, and I’m from Tucson, Arizona. On January 8, 2011, my life changed forever. I was a congresswoman meeting with my constituents in a shopping center when I was shot in the head. 18 other people were shot that day and 6 lost their lives. I had to relearn how to walk and talk again. As I healed, I watched shooting after shooting wreck families and terrorize communities across our country. I decided that enough was enough, so I founded my organization Giffords to save lives from gun violence. **As part of my fight to end gun violence, I am proud to endorse Senator Michael Bennet for re-election.** Michael understands just how important it is to protect Coloradans from gun violence. He has acted on this conviction by working to pass universal background checks and close the loopholes that allow convicted domestic abusers to access guns. I know Michael will continue to stand up to the gun lobby and put the safety of our communities first because he has always been a clear and consistent voice for change. We are at a crossroads in our nation between allowing gun violence to ravage our communities and taking action to protect our future. So, I hope you’ll join me in this fight and support Michael’s re-election campaign today. **Add your name to join me in supporting Michael Bennet’s work to keep our communities safe by passing universal background checks and closing dangerous loopholes in our gun laws.** | | **[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434308/328791105/1134103465?refcode=AU_MFB_PET_GEN_GEN_AC_20220204_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDUyNzdjMi1lZDg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ushIsX9qKM720cQP60RZ7oViyfCJhl76BxeTt554rXU=&emci=61651de6-e585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=0d5277c2-ed85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1295540)**
---
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
---
Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
subject: We hate to see you go.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
For the last 2 years, you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpbk143i5l2abt3qqfje57fu8o9nt1tduq0u22qo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrm4ddgc2qe7cb7cir61d5iejj76tr568p78cdlmiq77d71cloe9clkcmqb4stgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6hj38ppjc3g74db666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gm0o34climaoh5u)

| |
---
| | | **ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen, **but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrhvh0qu6oh75j3d6ct0kktld81snh86l809kcco_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")**

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustaining Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq3q1jsvcepfki3c1245qu1573pna6q202b7pb0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc10vhakbtvubmu7rv4m9pmr7uanuc99vu50b9bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z67s1ejfc9d5tojshm7jtetn812cglpjbi004tno_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs)
---

We're approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we've seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We're already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0t90215v56c5nmh3a326b9n1g1hoirn096n3ob0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi6tu1ar3ocsp212d3tahgvevpb8ff4ul8dr13j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs)**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdhlu0iikn5gqtqle8c2le0f0oe3mqkruetmik58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5p903ps6m0fneoafdbte65er6gctupv1n0rhou8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "Fellow Conservative, can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoq3jmgnfb6ccjc4utnmduv4hhgg6srqavt90vs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6e0bv1kh6kppb5ulidbeebsk1qe96skevsmo8ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g68pb5clh2bs)

subject: UPDATE: War with Russia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
Biden put us in a dangerous position with this one |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=1458a394247d453db55c5ca2ac1b46a2&_t=EYntqKImUI4xJNN5szqf7CknvjPElyIsdmaNLfq5aHV8bZuCLJRA-DI3_s13B6X7FTI6eV_6BZRhyjeNSMmtbaUzW1Sm5rCcLLQWt0LJ4G8I1hRMeo35BTIGzBmq4wLhYrNKa501s8WUZKo6FobW3D4KDrWVTlRH_JZXSOo_qTE%3D).

[](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)

---
Fellow American,

President Biden is weak. He’s weak at home and he’s weak abroad, at least that’s how Putin sees him and that’s what matters right now because Putin is now beginning to wage war on Russia’s neighboring countries with a ferocity resembling that of the Cold War era. He’s trying to create a buffer of non-democratic countries surrounding Russia.

And now, Biden’s lackluster response to his aggressions has us on the verge of a war that could cost American lives.

President Biden and the Left don’t care about blue collar Americans; they don’t care about Americans at all and that’s not what we want from our elected officials. **[Do you think Biden is doing enough to protect the American people from Putin or is he being too nice to Putin?](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)**

[**YES -> **](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)
[**NO -> **](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)

What just baffles me is the reason we now rely more on Russian oil is because Biden terminated the US keystone Pipeline. This action by the Left also cancelled thousands of American jobs when we needed them most.

**Now, that we’re at risk of going to war with Russia, I want answers from the Biden administration, where will our oil come from?** **Why won’t Biden take a stronger stance against Putin so that we can end a war before one starts?**

It’s clear to me that Biden and the Left care more about lining their own pockets than they do about the well-being of the American people and a quote comes to mind here: “The best fight is the fight not fought.” We need to let Biden know that a slap on the wrist is not going to be enough, **we need him to take a stronger stance against Putin.**

We need President Biden to stand up for America and not allow Putin to get one country closer to attacking an ally that we are treaty bound to defend.

**[Please, Friend, I need you to let me know if you think that President Biden is doing enough to protect us from Putin and what could be a second coming of the cold war. Do you think Biden is doing enough?](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)**

[**YES -> **](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)
[**NO -> **](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)
For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](hhttps://support.electroddorilas.com/ukraine-survey/?pid=&iter=&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=putin-survey&utm_medium=hf&sc=20220203_DORILAS_E_ITE_Putin_Survey_HF_HF&mid=3647134&sid=ite&bundlerid=&cat=&winred=https://secure.winred.com/rod-dorilas-for-congress/putin-survey-h/)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

When I think about my most important supporters, I don’t think about the ones who are the biggest donors.
#

Friends —
I want you to know how important you are to this campaign.
When I think about my most important supporters, I don’t think about the ones who are the biggest donors.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election.
But now that we’re in the election year and attack ads are running, I need you more than ever.

Folks,

My team put together a list of my latest donors, and I saw you were on it.

It has been on my list of to-do’s this week to reach out and say thank you. So, I just wanted to extend my gratitude for your support of my re-election campaign. It means so much to me that you would contribute, truly.

With a new far-left opponent in the mix, I need your help more than ever. I want to make sure that each and every person who has donated **[$5, $10, or even $100](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1eq0kef9cmoca4nntbk2lk8rb0lvufqqqf3ik88_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g64o37chh2bs)** knows that they are very important to me.

I could not do this without your support. I know you have already been so generous with your time and money, but I have to ask: **[_would you consider donating again?_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh7ajd93fr1qlo941s3s71mscog7pasujbsh43v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1g64o37chh2bs)** I wouldn't ask if I really didn’t need it.

---

Thank you again for your support. I thank my lucky stars that I have you on my side.

God Bless,

subject: What We Stand For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Joe Biden acts like he wants to know. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/what-we-stand-for?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| | **The Chairman's Note**
---
|
---
| _RNC National Committeewoman Anne Hathaway (L) and Chairman Kyle Hupfer (R) stand on the floor of the Vivint Arena in Salt Lake City, Utah. This is one of the final four sites being considered to host the 2024 Republican National Convention._
---
| **_What We Stand For_**
---
| It's been a busy week at the Republican National Committee's annual winter meeting in Salt Lake City, Utah, so this note is a little shorter than normal, but its message is still important.

Joe Biden, in an attempt to place blame for his floundering far-Left agenda, has been asking the rhetorical question: "What are Republicans for?"

Of course, he doesn't _really_ want to know, but I'm happy to fill him in with just a brief list of what we stand for and believe in:
* American exceptionalism
* The U.S. and Indiana Constitutions and the rights they preserve
* Limited, responsible, and transparent government
* Free, fair, and secure elections
* Individual liberty and freedom
* The sanctity of life
* Equality of opportunity, not equality of outcome

[P](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ca158ccdd1&e=1acd9bb3d6)[oll](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6265749c29&e=1acd9bb3d6) after [poll](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8f150dcd63&e=1acd9bb3d6) has shown that voters know _our_ beliefs align with theirs more so than the Democratic Party. And we'll make sure that more and more voters know just what we stand for as we work to take back the U.S. House and Senate this year.

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_Another Record-Breaking Year for Economic Development_**
---
|
---
| On Monday, **Gov. Holcomb** was joined by Secretary of Commerce Brad Chambers to announce the end of a fifth consecutive record-breaking year for economic development in Indiana. Nearly 300 companies committed to locate and expand in Indiana, investing more than $8.7 billion in their operations, a 56% increase from 2020, with an increasing average wage of $28.49 per hour.

This marks the highest capital investment and annual record for average wages since the Indiana Economic Development Corporation (IEDC) was established in 2005.

“IEDC’s success is vitally important in revitalizing and connecting our communities,” said **Gov. Holcomb**. “By strengthening our economy, reskilling our workforce, and building up and out infrastructure network, we are simultaneously enhancing our quality of place and life.”
---
| [Read More](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a842226c0e&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Read More")
---
|
---
| **_National Freedom Day_**
---
|
---
| Thanks to the work of Mjr. Richard R. Wright, a former slave and Republican activist, every February 1—the first day of Black History Month—we honor the passage of the 13th Amendment signed into law by President Abraham Lincoln in 1865.

The Republican Party is proud of our legacy of **freedom**!

You can read more about the life of Mjr. Richard R. Wright [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=61c7b23d51&e=1acd9bb3d6). **P.S.:** Throughout the month of February, we'll be highlighting Black Hoosier Republican trailblazers on our social media pages. Be sure to follow us on Facebook and Twitter so you don't miss a thing!
---
|
---
| **_Sen. Braun Releases "Groundhog Day Report"_**
---
|
---
| On Tuesday, Sen. Mike Braun released his "Groundhog Day Report"—a look at how the D.C. swamp keeps coming back again and again—with a call for White House staff “term limits."

In part, the welcome message reads: "Before I ran for U.S. Senate, I ran a business for 38 years. I know from experience: your operation is only as good as the people you hire. That’s why we shouldn’t be surprised by the poor product we get out of Washington. They keep hiring the same people, and expecting different results ... Your operation is only as good as the people you hire, and based on the results we’ve been getting out of the federal government, I think it’s time we pass out some pink slips."

You can read coverage of the report [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=43aa924666&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| _**2022 Congress of Counites**_
---
|
---
| Registration is **open** for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties!

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic [French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5af787589b&e=1acd9bb3d6) in French Lick, Ind.

**Thankfully** , general admission for the event was **not** impacted by **Bidenflation** and remains at [$100 per person](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d9efcb03a3&e=1acd9bb3d6).** **

You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county party **win** and keep Indiana on the **right** track.

**You can find updated overnight accommodation information** **[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3c932fc109&e=1acd9bb3d6)**.
**> > The last day to register is Monday, February 21—don't miss out! <<**
---
| [Register Now](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8a40a35f24&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Register Now")

---
|
---

For hotel accommodation information and delegate counts by county, click the button below.

Sunday, February 6: [The Great Chili Out (Jefferson County)](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a260e900eb&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: Joe Biden acts like he wants to know. | | | | | | | The Chairman's Note | | RNC National Committeewoman Anne Hathaway (L) and Chairman Kyle Hupfer (R) stand on the floor of the Vivint Arena in Salt Lake City, Utah. This is one of the final four sites being considered to host the 2024 Republican National Convention. | What We Stand For | It's been a busy week at the Republican National Committee's annual winter meeting in Salt Lake City, Utah, so this note is a little shorter than normal, but its message is still important. Joe Biden, in an attempt to place blame for his floundering far-Left agenda, has been asking the rhetorical question: "What are Republicans for?" Of course, he doesn't really want to know, but I'm happy to fill him in with just a brief list of what we stand for and believe in: American exceptionalism The U.S. and Indiana Constitutions and the rights they preserve Limited, responsible, and transparent government Free, fair, and secure elections Individual liberty and freedom The sanctity of life Equality of opportunity, not equality of outcome after has shown that voters know our beliefs align with theirs more so than the Democratic Party. And we'll make sure that more and more voters know just what we stand for as we work to take back the U.S. House and Senate this year. Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Best, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | Another Record-Breaking Year for Economic Development | | On Monday, Gov. Holcomb was joined by Secretary of Commerce Brad Chambers to announce the end of a fifth consecutive record-breaking year for economic development in Indiana. Nearly 300 companies committed to locate and expand in Indiana, investing more than $8.7 billion in their operations, a 56% increase from 2020, with an increasing average wage of $28.49 per hour. This marks the highest capital investment and annual record for average wages since the Indiana Economic Development Corporation (IEDC) was established in 2005. “IEDC’s success is vitally important in revitalizing and connecting our communities,” said Gov. Holcomb. “By strengthening our economy, reskilling our workforce, and building up and out infrastructure network, we are simultaneously enhancing our quality of place and life.” | "Read More" | | National Freedom Day | | Thanks to the work of Mjr. Richard R. Wright, a former slave and Republican activist, every February 1—the first day of Black History Month—we honor the passage of the 13th Amendment signed into law by President Abraham Lincoln in 1865. The Republican Party is proud of our legacy of freedom! You can read more about the life of Mjr. Richard R. Wright . P.S.: Throughout the month of February, we'll be highlighting Black Hoosier Republican trailblazers on our social media pages. Be sure to follow us on Facebook and Twitter so you don't miss a thing! | | Sen. Braun Releases "Groundhog Day Report" | | On Tuesday, Sen. Mike Braun released his "Groundhog Day Report"—a look at how the D.C. swamp keeps coming back again and again—with a call for White House staff “term limits." In part, the welcome message reads: "Before I ran for U.S. Senate, I ran a business for 38 years. I know from experience: your operation is only as good as the people you hire. That’s why we shouldn’t be surprised by the poor product we get out of Washington. They keep hiring the same people, and expecting different results ... Your operation is only as good as the people you hire, and based on the results we’ve been getting out of the federal government, I think it’s time we pass out some pink slips." You can read coverage of the report . | | 2022 Congress of Counites | | Registration is open for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties! This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic in French Lick, Ind. Thankfully , general admission for the event was not impacted by Bidenflation and remains at . You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county party win and keep Indiana on the right track. You can find updated overnight accommodation information . > The last day to register is Monday, February 21—don't miss out! << | "Register Now" | "View the Tentative Agenda" | | 2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention | | The 2022 Indiana Republican Party State Convention will take place on Saturday, June 18, 2022 , at Indiana Farmer's Coliseum in Indianapolis, Ind. for the purpose of nominating a candidate for secretary of state, auditor of state, and treasurer of state. For hotel accommodation information and delegate counts by county, click the button below. | "More Information" | | | Chairman Hupfer's Social Media Highlights | | Stay up-to-date on the latest from Chairman Kyle Hupfer by following him on Facebook and Twitter. This week: Gearing up for the 2022 election cycle and reminding Joe Biden and the Democrats that while they downplayed inflation, Americans suffered. | | | | | | | | | | Upcoming Republican Events Sunday, February 6: Saturday, February 19: Thursday, February 24: Friday, February 25 \- Saturday, February, 26: Friday, March 4: Friday, March 4: | | mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20Local%20Republican%20Event&body=Name%20of%20Event%3A%0ADate%3A%0ALocation%3A%0ATime%3A%0APrice%3A%0AGuest\(s\%20of%20Honor%3A%0AContact%3A%20%0A%0AOther%20Information%3A%20 "Submit Your Event") | | News You Can Use | | | Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434718/328793099/224193491?refcode=jtk438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhMDE3Mi1lZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FStw-I5oaSYVcYXp0wPoFe5ORLcKapz2zVZ6c0pbrA0=&emci=95c608cb-4a84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=6e3a0172-ef85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6085109)

**I need to ask for your help with something absolutely critical, friend, but let me quickly explain why.**
I'm running for governor because democracy isn't a toy, and we can't afford to let the Arizona GOP keep playing with it. We can't afford another failed Republican governor like Doug Ducey repeating the same old mistakes – and I'm committed to undoing them, committed to actually listening to voters like you and making the change you need.
**But I can't win if I'm not on the ballot – and Arizona law requires anyone running for governor to submit a nominating petition with signatures from voters like you. That's why I need your help:**
**[If you're ready for change in our state, will you sign my nominating petition right now, and encourage any other Arizona voters you know to sign as well?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434719/328793100/224193491?refcode=jtk438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhMDE3Mi1lZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FStw-I5oaSYVcYXp0wPoFe5ORLcKapz2zVZ6c0pbrA0=&emci=95c608cb-4a84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=6e3a0172-ef85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6085109) **
| | [GET MARCO ON THE BALLOT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434720/328793101/224193491?refcode=jtk438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhMDE3Mi1lZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FStw-I5oaSYVcYXp0wPoFe5ORLcKapz2zVZ6c0pbrA0=&emci=95c608cb-4a84-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=6e3a0172-ef85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6085109)
---
Thank you for having this direct impact on all of our futures. It means the world.

– Marco Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434721/328793102/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhMDE3Mi1lZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FStw-I5oaSYVcYXp0wPoFe5ORLcKapz2zVZ6c0pbrA0=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434722/328793103/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhMDE3Mi1lZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FStw-I5oaSYVcYXp0wPoFe5ORLcKapz2zVZ6c0pbrA0=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41434723/328793104/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk438-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhMDE3Mi1lZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FStw-I5oaSYVcYXp0wPoFe5ORLcKapz2zVZ6c0pbrA0=)

Peter, this will only take a moment of your time.

Last month, Ron Johnson announced his reelection campaign, and now people in Wisconsin are fired up because we know that we can flip this seat blue this November.

Ron Johnson has spent his time in the Senate working for his wealthy donor friends, not Wisconsinites – and it’s time to elect someone who works hard for you. But I can’t do this alone.

I need a strong grassroots army behind me when we take on Ron Johnson in November, and I want to make sure that the issues I’m focusing on in my campaign align with what you want to see get done.

name: Derek Kilmer for Congress
subject: Building economic opportunity for all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

One-sixth of the U.S population live in economically distressed communities where workers experience significantly higher unemployment rates than the national average. For too long, these communities have been left behind - and they've lacked the help they need to create jobs. As a consequence, economic opportunity - for too many Americans - depends upon their zip code.

That's why today, Derek joined the Democratic House majority in forwarding legislation that will create more economic opportunity for more people in more places. The House just passed the America Competes Act of 2022 to ensure our economy stays competitive globally, and it includes a pilot version of Derek's bipartisan RECOMPETE Act in the legislation.

[**Investments in creating economic opportunity are the best investments we can make. Sign on to become a citizen co-sponsor of the America Competes Act >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/sup4CMw-XdVajJ6fhb3m1WTp3J4nXwXcvLA0Ame_BoQ=/ZyxezFBJ9-uuNrFkwNTMZvpg4UprWiylJWryk-TR720=?ms=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Derek's Recompete Pilot Program will provide distressed local labor markets, local communities, and Tribal governments with flexible grants to develop and implement 10-year economic development plans to increase economic development and create jobs.

As someone who grew up on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek is committed to making our economy work for working people and ensuring people have access to good-paying jobs. That's why Derek has fought for the RECOMPETE Act to ensure everyone has the opportunity to thrive, regardless of their zip code or where they live.

[**Join Derek in the work to secure economic opportunity for all Americans. Add your name to show support for the America Competes Act >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/sup4CMw-XdVajJ6fhb3m1WTp3J4nXwXcvLA0Ame_BoQ=/ZyxezFBJ9-uuNrFkwNTMZvpg4UprWiylJWryk-TR720=?ms=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/sup4CMw-XdVajJ6fhb3m1WTp3J4nXwXcvLA0Ame_BoQ=/5s5zMSL3JFtwCl5Ujic2AiiS97WbkkW7gW920IfYVto=?refcode=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220203_compet_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sup4CMw-XdVajJ6fhb3m1WTp3J4nXwXcvLA0Ame_BoQ=/YIXcdq__TEYuTVJL1F3uLpVbDv1KZnrE85n8tewi4bY=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sup4CMw-XdVajJ6fhb3m1WTp3J4nXwXcvLA0Ame_BoQ=/3R-nlyh9Uj6z1MKx7PkQgbhVzlJgM9e-C33Z_L3WsF8=)

Tacoma WA 98402 United States

| Friends,

Yesterday, I sent a letter to Superintendent McDade and the Prince William County School Board. I stand with the teachers and officers of Prince William County Schools (PWCS) in opposing outrageous mandates that keep teachers & support staff away from the classroom and away from their jobs.

We must support getting our kids back in school, without distractions, and with proper in-person instruction.

subject: The new year is off to a great start!

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Truck Yeah!
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T8QH0K2mib9M7BbRUqI0warUTXFJ-76P97DZ-3p8R3HugPfxF0fto0kWhdRWzO-m1nYLCtgruqgx6NpaqDOLLs0rkC8agW2vleV3qMJUNydhpIwCmL2gDRTXdmcIFk1kKeuqgsK7ZJRWgc9TemJr_upixbe90jr5MWGEJm-zByIFUkoJWse0GfFi6LkquISA4AIZYX8qWAU=&c=QCUfiNIy--HkFJmbacc-oORe8XFBiOaR29-HwDNGFdKwbSuj9KG3JQ==&ch=ZVTuYDDIbwfC8o5xdtv6PIxM49DFJjanim5c0Ar9rlM4M2pWR7aRRA==)
---
| Peter,
People across the world are finally standing up and fighting back. In protest of a vaccine mandate imposed on unvaccinated truckers in Canada, the 'Freedom Convoy' was formed. Truckers are driving cross-country to protest the authoritarian edicts. People have realized if they don't speak up and demand their freedoms, these tyrants will never give back the power they have seized. I can tell you this: we stand with freedom fighters everywhere. I am inspired by those who join me in defending their God-given freedom and liberty. As we see people waking up - leaders are responding. Countries in Europe and around the world have started removing their remaining COVID restrictions. Yet, American cities and states run by hypocritical Democrats seem to be going backwards. For its part, the corrupt corporate press in America has resorted to smearing the truckers, calling them a cult. As a mouthpiece of Democratic ideology, the corporate press will attack anyone who refuses to bend the knee to Democrats' oppressive COVID fear agenda. Florida has been standing strong from day one. We didn't cave to the pressure from the corporate press, and we've rejected the oppressive policies that have done nothing to combat the virus and left a trail of destruction. We're never backing down, and we'll always be there to support all those around the world in pursuit of the same freedoms we have in Florida. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Ron DeSantis
---

| | [Friend, it felt like a punch to the gut when we hit one dozen Democrats retiring from the House of Representatives...then, we hit TWO dozen, and now, we’re up to **_29 Democrats who have decided NOT to run for reelection._**

To make matters worse, several of these Democrats come from competitive swing seats:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41435423/328795786/-1643652341?refcode=20220203_em_f_2L_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDg0MTQ4Mi1mMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_f7jGsDe_bDhdj7LzjCxA6r14kVXbeh9JbVFwOXPU8=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41435424/328795787/-1643652341?refcode=20220203_em_f_2L_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDg0MTQ4Mi1mMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_f7jGsDe_bDhdj7LzjCxA6r14kVXbeh9JbVFwOXPU8=)

[Remember, last November, both Virginia and New Jersey swung toward Republicans by DOUBLE DIGITS, which means _any_ district Democrats won narrowly was ALREADY going to be a battleground in November. **Without these experienced Democrats running, it’s going to be _that much_ harder to keep their seats blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41435426/328795789/-1643652341?refcode=20220203_em_f_2L_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDg0MTQ4Mi1mMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_f7jGsDe_bDhdj7LzjCxA6r14kVXbeh9JbVFwOXPU8=)

**_[But we HAVE to keep them blue -- every last one of them!! Republicans only need to flip _five seats_ to win back the House Majority, so we can’t afford to let even one of these swing seats slip away. That’s why we’ve activated an emergency 9X match to help us DEFEND vulnerable seats like these and save our Majority. Please, donate now >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41435427/328795790/-1643652341?refcode=20220203_em_f_2L_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDg0MTQ4Mi1mMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_f7jGsDe_bDhdj7LzjCxA6r14kVXbeh9JbVFwOXPU8=)_**

[We know this sounds bad...but it gets worse. **Experts predict at least _70 seats_ are going to be competitive in November, and, as of right now, we just DON’T HAVE THE RESOURCES to fight for every one of them.** That’s because we missed three fundraising goals in a row last summer, and our online fundraising took a _nosedive_ again at the beginning of the new year:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41435428/328795791/-1643652341?refcode=20220203_em_f_2L_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDg0MTQ4Mi1mMzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_f7jGsDe_bDhdj7LzjCxA6r14kVXbeh9JbVFwOXPU8=)

We’re building this movement brick by brick. One volunteer, one donation, and one vote at a time. Every single one of them matters.

This is how we will win and pass Medicare for All, enact a Green New Deal, eliminate ALL medical and student loan debt, secure a living wage of at least $15 an hour, and so, so much more.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Legalizing Cannabis in 2022
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
If you support cannabis legalization , then I encourage you to read this excellent Op-Ed [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2022/01/28/marylands-communities-color-need-swift-end-cannabis-criminalization] in the The Washington Post written by my friend, Delegate Darryl Barnes.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/DB_1200x1200.png]I agree completely with Delegate Barnes that any framework of legal cannabis in Maryland must include reparative justice, social equity, and community reinvestment from the outset.
Black Marylanders have suffered disproportionately due to cannabis prohibition. That’s why if I’m blessed to be Maryland’s next Governor, I’ll make sure the legalization of cannabis contributes to economic growth in our communities of color. As part of my plan, we’ll lead the nation in participation for our Minority Owned Businesses (MBEs). I’ll create a simple and accessible application process for cannabis licensing to ensure that our MBEs do not face significant obstacles to participation.
Additionally, I’ll help create vertical opportunities within the legal cannabis industry through growing, processing, and dispensing, to ensure that small businesses who invest in one aspect of production are not boxed out of the marketplace by larger operations. Our small businesses employ the majority of employees in our state, and form the backbone of our economy. I'll make sure they have the opportunity to thrive in this exciting new industry.
Socio-economic disparities do not fix themselves on their own. They require thoughtful, deliberate, and proactive policy action to address them. We must level the playing field for Black Marylanders – legalizing cannabis right, and with equity at the forefront, should be a part of that effort.
If you agree with my vision, then I invite you to join the conversation. Click here to read Delegate Darryl Barnes’ Op-Ed about why cannabis legalization in Maryland must include social equity, reparative justice, and community reinvestment for Black Marylanders. [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2022/01/28/marylands-communities-color-need-swift-end-cannabis-criminalization]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e551424e-d285-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/ff3d320a-f585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNkMzIwYS1mNTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6qNACfC-EMIvBqECDhqW8QwkLoIxR0DncE89x7pBNI=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

We just made it through our first end-of-month deadline of the year. We understand that times are tough and the fact that you chose to put some of your hard-earned money toward this campaign means the world to Michele and the entire team.

This deadline was extremely important – it sets our pace leading up to both the primary and Election Day.

I know it's hard to believe but the countdown to the primary is on and in order to get Michele successfully across the finish line, we have to raise even more in the upcoming months. Republican front-runner, Anna Paulina Luna, is backed by Trump and dark money groups that are spending big bucks to help her win, but we won't let that phase us – we have a grassroots team we can count on.

This campaign isn't funded by corporate PACs or dark money groups because Michele can't be bought. Instead, we rely on people power to keep our grassroots campaign going. We've built an amazing coalition of people that are growing week by week and day by day.

I can't thank you enough for all of your support Peter. When Michele gets elected, it'll be all because of your hard work and dedication to this campaign.

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Breaking this glass ceiling will require all of us to play a part
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We’ve got to fundamentally change who represents us in the Senate
#

Friends,
I want to thank my friend Val Arkoosh for the powerful voice she added to this race.
She brought attention to the issues important to so many Pennsylvanians, and I know she will continue to do meaningful work for Montgomery County and our commonwealth.
I know from personal experience that stepping up to break big glass ceilings takes a lot of courage. And I’m grateful for the courage Val showed in running to be the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania history.
Over the last 200 years, Pennsylvania has elected 57 United States Senators. Every single one of them had something in common — they were all white men.
Our remaining opponents represent more of the same.
But if we’re going to build a future where working families finally get in on the deal, we’ve got to fundamentally change who represents us in the Senate.
That means the same old, same old won’t work. And that’s why I need your support today.
[If you’re able, please make a contribution to help me bring real change working families can count on to the United States Senate. Breaking this glass ceiling will require all of us to play a part, so I’m hoping I can count on you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436201/328801661/-358086307?refcode2=02e4b4c3-f585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220204-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmU0YjRjMy1mNTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lTDe5ECgtdyzF_HezgFIycXca0j0yGZi-JCyi__uw9o=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436202/328801662/-358086307?refcode2=02e4b4c3-f585-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&refcode=em220204-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmU0YjRjMy1mNTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lTDe5ECgtdyzF_HezgFIycXca0j0yGZi-JCyi__uw9o=)**
Thanks in advance for anything you’re able to pitch in today. When we win this race, know it was your support that helped make history.
Thank you,
Malcolm

| | Fellow Patriot:

They say you can know a man best by his enemies.

And boy, do we have enemies.

Just like President Trump, all of the right ghouls are trying to silence me, from Big Tech to the totally corrupt Republican Establishment.

I've been thrown offstage at GOP events, banned from social media, and banned from 2 payment processors--I was even banned by my old barbershop.

Last fall, the Republican Party of Arkansas called me a "racist, sexist, bigot," and disavowed my campaign. What was my crime?

I want to end the Invasion on our Southern Border by building the Wall and imposing a Total Immigration Moratorium. America is full.

I'm also a proud Southerner.

Now, the evil ADL, along with the Guardian---Communist smear operations---put me at the very top of their list of the most "extreme" candidates in America.

According to these cretins, I'm a "racist White Supremacist." Of course, the absurdity of calling a mixed-race, Indian-American individual like myself a "White Supremacist" is totally lost on them.

What these Communists don't understand is that their slanders and smears don't work on us anymore.

We know their games, and we're not playing along anymore.

All of these attacks are great badges of honor, proof positive that I'm a threat, that I can't be controlled, that I'm not a part of their club.

It's no coincidence that this latest ADL and Guardian attack came just after my campaign posted our strongest fundraising numbers yet.

They know that we're coming for them. They know that their days are numbered.

**[_Show them that their attacks are __toothless. Show them what we think about their lies and slanders of Patriots_ _._

_Do you know why my Deep State RINO opponent doesn't face these attacks? Because he's only a threat to one thing: the people of Arkansas_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=45924a14a8&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me tell the Establishment that the people are DONE with their games_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=13cf77391a&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=efb41d11b4&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=67c41ea5dc&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Defending Our Second Amendment Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 4, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 4, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** The eyes of the world have recently been focused on the border of Ukraine and Russia, and while Joe Biden is saying borders are important in other countries, clearly he doesn’t think our borders are nearly as important. Ken Paxton is committed to securing our border and keeping us safe.

**Link: **[https://americasvoice.news/biden-cares-more-about-ukraine-russia-border-than-he-does-the-us-southern-border/](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=341c97d8089746d69bf9cc7b907482f5&_e=tv_XCWFRpyF_es-kW8DnKVJPrWRW-bE7Q8Cl_dOEQgdBVW2Dv9BqEZdQKaBd-fDeI1EkzEflUh1q1wNyYVOYxBy_OBC87epiMZcqLj1Fi-fXiRPapY4OXwVNytVoDBnh_-F0dxc_SvedvUmWjywSmqocAhKYrbK92ERBvbGvkNKfI1pj_V3E2eS_2NiYoSCamdK2IgHBnReQFS6lMAWZ84c1kVxoJD26_Z1hFB_h5XXp7pQ9x7Whl3H_i8iWCICHJsTHpU2MCNKDnhZJgUQIce_6tui-VcFPF1mqt86KRhznrsj0Ni7Xg8fDmR1VeuOY5flCqT2iY12OhX5JuMMDb3uo838F55oFcMSXFgjgt6ImKdLo9170sngW52n8hKlf)

**Theme of the Day: Defending Our Second Amendment Rights**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Yesterday, in a press conference, Joe Biden once again shared his radical, anti-gun beliefs stating, "there's no amendment that's absolute." Ken Paxton stands ready to defend Texas against any infringement of our Second Amendment Joe Biden's failed administration will throw at us. He'll always defend law-abiding gun owners and our Second Amendment rights.

~ Crime in Texas, like most of the nation, is out of control. In Houston, January proved to be a violent month for the Houston region with the city reporting at least 47 homicides since the first of 2022. Ken Paxton knows the importance of maintaining law and order, and he's always got law enforcement's back. He'll do everything in his power to ensure that criminals are prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law.

body:
When you look at the most far-Left Democrats’ social media, it is absolutely horrifying. Peter, When you look at the most far-Left Democrats’ social media, it is absolutely horrifying.

They post messages saying that the Republican Party is a “threat to Democracy.”

They defend _terrorists who proudly kill Jews in Israel._

They even complain about Republican leaders _being able to give interviews._

**The radical Left wants to put power in the hands of unelected bureaucrats rather than the American people - they want to censor their way into a socialist, one-party state that prioritizes terrorists over our allies in Israel.**

This kind of radical and disgusting behavior isn’t just lying on the outskirts of the Democrat party - **it’s accepted, encouraged, and rewarded by the most powerful Liberal elites.**

**Mike put my life on the line fighting for this country as a Green Beret, and watching radical socialist politicians want to throw away the freedom that millions of soldiers gave their lives for makes us absolutely sick.**

The only way to save our country is to take back the House with a Republican majority and show the far Left that America won’t stand for their extremist agenda, but [I need your help](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=16160016305b44a58fdea106d1b4bf15&_e=75-19tWyKVcK2cSOSmKH9VhXJPHHmokA3i7-90t52ssZ9lKso_ofl_VGgg4VeaW8yi6-rgNf5tH8wUHejjCr8T3kRKuZA2Q-l_WA7OgrQ15nrqfRNcgfHzzRH2BywEZJPYacfkgC9yqRFy7yk-IA0kcd3KiBzkDr5p0TTCuHcBvleq7Sp5s2atNqix5ctUCAqmEu_I6jZO8sIyUGrJkwYT3W_cKWUJd4sOo-qXdyHhcL3gBRtR1eovA67P75SoIer_Pm9IhhdnQY3Q-JXhDzcIcL7sJ1rrQFV23nddM-6ALh47EdTBsp91B9K-eklY5d9WvpJ4KIomnyJMIFWdYMyZIZb7QqbvSQdLzbfGEeoUQXwqgcU5Q_Hu3Dk3YgaHhoHKYNCPQV12_2B9IZo6qp5b_Pe3YjiOzXU04kbidIqyDVQ59UWWyG9okY_I1SCR9nvZJeYurpZiLcx6-70YGWpg%3D%3D).

clean_body: When you look at the most far-Left Democrats’ social media, it is absolutely horrifying. Peter, When you look at the most far-Left Democrats’ social media, it is absolutely horrifying. They post messages saying that the Republican Party is a “threat to Democracy.” They defend terrorists who proudly kill Jews in Israel. They even complain about Republican leaders being able to give interviews. The radical Left wants to put power in the hands of unelected bureaucrats rather than the American people - they want to censor their way into a socialist, one-party state that prioritizes terrorists over our allies in Israel. This kind of radical and disgusting behavior isn’t just lying on the outskirts of the Democrat party - it’s accepted, encouraged, and rewarded by the most powerful Liberal elites. Mike put my life on the line fighting for this country as a Green Beret, and watching radical socialist politicians want to throw away the freedom that millions of soldiers gave their lives for makes us absolutely sick. The only way to save our country is to take back the House with a Republican majority and show the far Left that America won’t stand for their extremist agenda, but . This year’s elections are set to be the most competitive in HISTORY, and we can’t win without your grassroots support. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Truck Yeah!
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FZ259GJYySsae9LlQ4bvcygMF9vXWzRSDA0-vbxqP6r2NIVrzpAjYCn9mNXdAWlixdaa5kbuOt5Q76RXq5neRKiJ1g48gfXMjnDjioQL78_vW9H5SeD_Ro6xRcctSl5z7_uUId76TpMUIIw1X-6SYczFcZPLFo4hG4fU8AjRi0qh4pvTgIezwLr7UGjczj0mLNTNKtTD69Y=&c=oHVYLSPbM0hJVCw7IpYTf9iSnrht18idcMssi7ov0wyg_CIe9L2PkA==&ch=iHt1Ee3bOFd40IZN7tWNU6a8ajc-7-BdI5YZ9MBmc6nzgBftIBcIxA==)
---
| Peter,
People across the world are finally standing up and fighting back. In protest of a vaccine mandate imposed on unvaccinated truckers in Canada, the 'Freedom Convoy' was formed. Truckers are driving cross-country to protest the authoritarian edicts. People have realized if they don't speak up and demand their freedoms, these tyrants will never give back the power they have seized. I can tell you this: we stand with freedom fighters everywhere. I am inspired by those who join me in defending their God-given freedom and liberty. As we see people waking up - leaders are responding. Countries in Europe and around the world have started removing their remaining COVID restrictions. Yet, American cities and states run by hypocritical Democrats seem to be going backwards. For its part, the corrupt corporate press in America has resorted to smearing the truckers, calling them a cult. As a mouthpiece of Democratic ideology, the corporate press will attack anyone who refuses to bend the knee to Democrats' oppressive COVID fear agenda. Florida has been standing strong from day one. We didn't cave to the pressure from the corporate press, and we've rejected the oppressive policies that have done nothing to combat the virus and left a trail of destruction. We're never backing down, and we'll always be there to support all those around the world in pursuit of the same freedoms we have in Florida. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Ron DeSantis
---

name: Team Nikki
subject: Getting a head start
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter — It’s a bit early to talk about deadlines and fundraising goals, we know. But it’s a short month, so we’re getting a head start. **Unlike Ron DeSantis, we don’t have millionaire donors or special interests padding our pockets. We’re depending on our grassroots supporters to help us win this race, defeat DeSantis, and bring something new to Florida. ** [**To stay on track towards our February goal, we need to raise $5,853 by Monday night. body:

---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=eb8cb0e8fb&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Peter, I've got GREAT news.

**The Party Brass in D.C. have named THIS DISTRICT in the top ten flip seats they're targeting to flip from Blue to Red in 2022**!

Read on, and I'll explain exactly why this seat -- as long as a conservative wins the nomination -- _WILL be a red U.S. House seat when the next Congress is sworn in_.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=48f9184c1a&e=af4b86f5c6)
1\. Virginia's historic 2nd district helped elect Donald Trump by a WIDE margin in 2022.

2\. This district is also home to the James River and Chesapeake Bay, where some of the first Americans founded this great nation.

3\. Sadly, because of the poor decisions made by Party brass, Democrats have held this district since 2018.

4\. This district, which Trump won by DOUBLE DIGITS in 2016, is now EVEN REDDER after redistricting finished in Richmond.

_**The Democrat control of Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia's 2nd district stops NOW**_.

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=2b03e484fe&e=af4b86f5c6)

America is our **_home_** and we cannot let it be torn apart by people who **_hate_** us.

I’m running for Congress so I can lead a fight against the Democrats so we can make America what it is supposed to be.

_The land of the free is not free if the Democrats continue to bow down to the Chinese and globalists._
[_Chip in $50 today!
Chip in $150 today!
Chip in $250 today!
Chip in $500 today!
Chip in $1000 today!_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=75f46616e8&e=af4b86f5c6)
Support my campaign so we can finally stand up and make our public schools pro-America, make our sports leagues pro-America and strengthen our military’s leadership.

[**_We need to take a stand now or else America, as we know it, is gone_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=52be996fe0&e=af4b86f5c6)!

Thank you for your support,
**Jarome Bell
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=1b8d478d2b&e=af4b86f5c6)

Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate

P.S.**: It's time to FLIP THIS HOUSE seat from Blue to RED.

name: Angela Angel
subject: 152 years later
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436803/328804904/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=&emci=7bd7b188-4684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=4f66623a-f985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)
---
Friend,

**“The right of citizens of the United States to vote shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of race, color, or previous condition of servitude.”**

These are the words that marked the ratification of the 15th Amendment to the Constitution 152 years ago today. While the passing of the 15th Amendment marked a milestone in the long struggle for Black equality, 152 years later, we are still not close to its full realization.

Since the 15th Amendment was ratified, coordinated efforts to keep Black people from the ballot box have been successful. Southern states passed laws that required literacy tests and poll taxes to vote, while Jim Crow made the act of voting wholly dangerous and nigh impossible for Black Americans.

While the passage of the 1965 Voting Rights Act was monumental in re-enfranchising millions of Black voters, the teeth that gave it power was recently gutted by the Supreme Court.

**Folks, our democracy is at a critical crossroads.** After historic voter turnout that unseated Donald Trump and flipped the Senate, Republicans and GOP-led legislatures have doubled down on undemocratic voter suppression tactics. Meanwhile, Democrats in the Senate have yet to prove capable of passing even the most basic voter protections to fight back.

**[That's why, today, on the anniversary of the ratification of the 15th Amendment, I'm asking you to raise your voice with me and demand Congress pass critical voting rights legislation now – our democracy is too precious to remain silent.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436804/328804925/1596394520?ms=em22_220204_15thAmendment&refcode=em22_220204_15thAmendment&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=&emci=7bd7b188-4684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=4f66623a-f985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436805/328804936/1596394520?ms=em22_220204_15thAmendment&refcode=em22_220204_15thAmendment&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=&emci=7bd7b188-4684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=4f66623a-f985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825) GOP-led efforts to suppress the right to vote through gerrymandering, the banning of early and absentee voting and egregious voter ID laws have no place in a modern democracy. We cannot afford to let them get away with these blatant assaults on our constitutional rights and risk turning back the clock.

The fundamental right to vote is about more than one candidate or one election – it is our power and our strength. Voting is how we represent ourselves, our experiences, and our values in government. As a Maryland House Delegate, I've seen the power it has to transform and uplift communities.

**[That's why I will always do everything in my power to protect the sacred right to vote. Add your name alongside mine and demand the Senate pass the Freedom to Vote Act immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436806/328804948/1596394520?ms=em22_220204_15thAmendment&refcode=em22_220204_15thAmendment&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=&emci=7bd7b188-4684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=4f66623a-f985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825)**

These threats to democracy are scary, but I've never underestimated the power of people and grassroots activism to create change. Together, we will get it done.

– Angela

[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436809/328804962/-1610819762?refcode=em22_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=) [ [](https://www.twitter.com/AngelForCongressMD04) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41436819/328804993/615677664?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=&emci=7bd7b188-4684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=4f66623a-f985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=8410825) PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
District Heights, MD 20753
240-293-2552 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
You can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7bd7b188-4684-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/4f66623a-f985-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjY2NjIzYS1mOTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwU4hd9rkj5lRI4UHKOskJtE-w2Qom8bBwlwEXV7rys=&id=110829508).

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: NC-Sen is make-or-break for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
All of these nonpartisan experts say North Carolina is one of the top three pick-up opportunities for Democrats.
#

Yesterday, CNN released their newest Senate race analysis, and their experts say once again that North Carolina is one of the seats “most likely to flip.”
This comes right after NBC and FiveThirtyEight reported that control of the Senate could come down to our race too.
**[If you want to flip this seat and expand Democrats’ majority, please make a $3 donation right now to bring new leadership to North Carolina. This is a make-or-break race for Democrats and our ability to make real progress in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220204-1-subs&refcode2=350.357359.JwAMtv&t=1&akid=350%2E357359%2EJwAMtv)
All of these nonpartisan experts say North Carolina is one of the top three pick-up opportunities for Democrats.
That leaves no room for error or risk if we are going to hold and expand our Senate majority.
But if we all do our part, then together we can expand our majority and break through Washington’s obstruction and gridlock. That is the only way we can finally deliver change and progress for our families — from voting rights to climate action to a living wage and beyond.

All of these nonpartisan experts say North Carolina is one of the top three pick-up opportunities for Democrats. name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Help Elect "A Champion Who Can Make Pennsylvania Proud"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=81b7d79fbc&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b1bc5898a4&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| As the only openly LGBTQ+ State Senator currently serving in the Massachusetts Legislature, Senator Julian Cyr has a track record of championing issues important to the community, ensuring equality, and freedom for all in the Commonwealth. Julian has served in the State Senate for six years, where he sits on committees with oversight of health care policy, public health, municipalities and regional government, and education. He has also been a trailblazer, on the ground doing the work in his community, and that’s why his endorsement means so much to me.

**[We are building a coalition from coast to coast for historic representation in Pennsylvania and beyond! Will you join us?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=3835f9c17d&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

**Help Get My Name on the Ballot**
Next month, we need to collect hundreds of petition signatures in the 182nd District in order to get my name on the ballot – and we need your help!
[Sign up today](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=34ff1bd4c6&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for a quick tutorial on signature collection - even a couple of hours of your time would go such a long way in helping us in our movement for historic representation!
**[Petition Training for Deja for PA Historic Campaign!](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c221faad47&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**
---
|
**Wear a Piece of History!** Check out our [Swag Shop](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=6625a86a97&e=3f8e2ea1e3) where your donations will get you stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign!
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=3e1dc2264d&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e61e226166&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=f5924d1340&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

body:
