| | | Dear Peter,

I am under attack for fighting to free political prisoners.

Instead of covering the repeated and gross violations of the Constitution, the left wants to make those fighting AGAINST those violations out to be villains.

They are desperate to try to label us as outside the norm, or as somehow "extreme."

But the truth is, THESE COMMUNIST DEMOCRATS are extremists.

_**As you can see above, they are desperate to kick me out of office.**_

_**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4f91e59048&e=645b3b1338)**_

_**That's why I need your immediate support to continue fighting back. **_

As President Trump once said, I'm an America First warrior, and I never give in to the Communist Democrats.

_**I am proud to be 100% Trump Endorsed**_.

_**[Send the left a message that I'm not going anywhere by contributing to my reelection campaign today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fb0770d52b&e=645b3b1338). **_

The left can't STAND the idea that conservatives are taking power in Congress.

[**_Help me reshape the GOP into the party of America First by donating to my reelection campaign today_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6293803cee&e=645b3b1338).

I bring accountability to BOTH parties. And I'm unafraid about it.

[That's why I need your generous support today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ad4edb418c&e=645b3b1338).

In 2022, we must make a it abundantly clear: America First is the only path forward.

Together we can make that goal a reality, but I can't do it without your support.

[_**Help me whip the GOP into shape and fight the Communist Democrats by contributing $25 or $50, or even $100 or $250 to my reelection campaign today**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5e8e53a47b&e=645b3b1338).

clean_body: This is AMERICA! We don't do political prisoners. | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, I am under attack for fighting to free political prisoners. Instead of covering the repeated and gross violations of the Constitution, the left wants to make those fighting AGAINST those violations out to be villains. They are desperate to try to label us as outside the norm, or as somehow "extreme." But the truth is, THESE COMMUNIST DEMOCRATS are extremists. As you can see above, they are desperate to kick me out of office. That's why I need your immediate support to continue fighting back. As President Trump once said, I'm an America First warrior, and I never give in to the Communist Democrats. I am proud to be 100% Trump Endorsed. . The left can't STAND the idea that conservatives are taking power in Congress. . I bring accountability to BOTH parties. And I'm unafraid about it. . In 2022, we must make a it abundantly clear: America First is the only path forward. Together we can make that goal a reality, but I can't do it without your support. . | For America, Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District P.S. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: This Is Radical To Some But ABSOLUTELY Necessary
body:
Addressing The Mess At The Southern Border Currently, we have a HUGE mess at our Southern Border. It's truly an invasion. Unfortunately, weak Republ
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2781.1.d055b453d33b6d4a7e49da0e8dc6e81c) |
---
## Addressing The Mess At The Southern Border
---
Currently, we have a HUGE mess at our Southern Border. It's truly an **invasion**. Unfortunately, weak Republicans like [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2782.1.020e48613ae0cb2e23927e5873207649) have broke their word and failed us. As a **member of the Gang of 8** , [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2783.1.df2f8167f890a2bc16913e73ace9f569) advocated for blanket amnesty of illegals as well as saying that we do not need a wall because "_walls don't work._ " I firmly _disagree_ with [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2784.1.ee425a6274dd1d72a899add3adb7d9cc). Here are my thoughts to **address the mess** of our Southern Border: **1.** Finish the Wall.
**2.** Empower Border Patrol.
**3.** We need an Immigration Moratorium. An Immigration Moratorium means we close off our borders _completely_ for a season. This seems radical to some but is **ABSOLUTELY necessary** given the state of our nation. The Immigration Moratorium needs to be in place _until_ :
1\. We identify who is illegally in our country.
2\. What we are going to do with those individuals illegally in our country.
3\. How we are going to process future immigrants legally into our country. Our Southern Border is a VERY serious matter that not only involves illegal immigration but **Child Sex Trafficking** , **Drugs and Crim** e pouring into the US and **Economic pitfalls**. **A strong nation must have strong borders.** Unlike [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2785.1.c69b870adf686a842d61ebfb7bf82bd5), I will fight for strong borders. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2786.1.3b448972e5805831b6d51544b192588c), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2787.1.bc923cf78f89e29c345f552d1aa64551), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2788.1.bcbcc0ac849818e8182404b293c14e07), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2789.1.c9fcee888a7ecc0a255b7faf512fae34), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3521398.2790.1.d5e0cb64dada48084e9bab831cf9362f)).

Hello,
Have you ever heard the term “tracker?” I know I hadn’t until I decided to run for office.
“Trackers” are what political campaign staff call what are essentially professional stalkers. They’re paid by Republican Super PACs and dark money organizations to follow you around with a video camera literally everywhere you go – yelling ridiculous questions and trying to get you to say something that they can edit up and spin into a fake scandal on Fox News.
Well, the first tracker of the campaign has begun showing up to my events with Iowa voters, hired and paid to be there by the “unofficial research arm of the Republican Party.”
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions lying about me in TV ads. They’re scared because I’m a hard target for Republicans. They know that I can excite Independent voters and maybe even some Republicans to vote for someone who lives a life of Iowa values. **And if I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats will hold onto our Senate majority.**
And we can win: The latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!
**I’m not taking corporate PAC money, so if we’re going to be able to fight back against the GOP’s lies and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on you. We need to raise another $13,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to win, but right now, we’re still $6,494 short.**

Peter,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022.

**[My name is April Becker: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=81a4d3b0ff65460c9b616a90e2b8bc67&_e=_04wMCHeZJpXCJocyIdTFPP-UsTSYjl9j-xsFBy5loLHC17cCTz_TfYNmMcO0XX1ZPyr6uI_CXDIT2FP__Cf1dxJDJRfWHcZOo88CcC9Ss1HINZ-E8u0wcxuA8bEH0AKLr8J7hseiRDWmFYBWSm30Vq1X3AQW9jMNk2Fab1mk9WuK54ioSmXdah2fyY3f-pDbnuhvMxzEXyHvQSNzfEOZ7eYoHNbtxs_7bMeRD86w2GDNwfXg_4bMlj8IEKv412UBrWAqrZ999ncQnOVy6nBKeshxISxd_9Vd9hDouLYN9rZoRMqAcgX8c75rUUcWWX6eCHr40Udv3lV7k9yMHI6qgTpG0XVI8dJOfRQnSosTvNCXAM8Sx5OMVu4R9b2tlsiClUgJSGEO8mMW75PwzeCKNyEUKpbutcjXda92z5pwJYHsZoXIsGNVussJwVviZmNspzfQyg6stYpvzboOvNUQyZxOjxrVqRTi0-GxTkkjcQ%3D)**

I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Peter, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=81a4d3b0ff65460c9b616a90e2b8bc67&_e=_04wMCHeZJpXCJocyIdTFPP-UsTSYjl9j-xsFBy5loLHC17cCTz_TfYNmMcO0XX1ZPyr6uI_CXDIT2FP__Cf1dxJDJRfWHcZOo88CcC9Ss1HINZ-E8u0wcxuA8bEH0AKLr8J7hseiRDWmFYBWSm30Vq1X3AQW9jMNk2Fab1mk9WuK54ioSmXdah2fyY3f-pDbnuhvMxzEXyHvQSNzfEOZ7eYoHNbtxs_7bMeRD86w2GDNwfXg_4bMlj8IEKv412UDH8Fbwba9rCD9ZVy65GJKFqC5COWNA1WTcg-RQcfJLs7Uuviz7PmgW18l6RbyE06vC0-SWiji-W_OBoXf_nf2e-YG07lZ_7azW219QcPzLutNLELdE1tH-xyMZwcLZVJd6CPrlKosIHtoQsjgaZbesd1sX6dQkVfD51BIYiU94Io3RgTt4kaGBomaJ7b_22qqiJ33S8xVHU7bx5f_SxSoROVDzOM08lgWqqEp2QYl1E%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Peter, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=81a4d3b0ff65460c9b616a90e2b8bc67&_e=_04wMCHeZJpXCJocyIdTFPP-UsTSYjl9j-xsFBy5loLHC17cCTz_TfYNmMcO0XX1ZPyr6uI_CXDIT2FP__Cf1dxJDJRfWHcZOo88CcC9Ss1HINZ-E8u0wcxuA8bEH0AKLr8J7hseiRDWmFYBWSm30Vq1X3AQW9jMNk2Fab1mk9WuK54ioSmXdah2fyY3f-pDbnuhvMxzEXyHvQSNzfEOZ7eYoHNbtxs_7bMeRD86w2GDNwfXg_4bMlj8IEKv412U-qLRqWT_kulaemDoKg90w4fNoduysW5OsrqIg7Gee2D4hRStPGcbjLCaj6e7U2A0cIu6YWVgFbZ_Lh7E77wh-6dEN9GSUDp3vEUGRaLlQ5jG8YaOSAIbw87Y2rGLekCAPuRT1t1owRwrsqeRyCmXQgDdzxNXuOw9iCd0_oacCH1cxTTgwURPnSbm8vL0Qpxoob6ezEW1QSCNlUNxyMZZ3qj-bvihTE0oo7hIl4u4l4A%3D)**

But in order to make it happen, we’ll have to ensure that this campaign has the resources to get off to a strong start - [will you help us do just that today?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc4MzQ5OTMzNDMwNDQ2MTgwJmM9ZTJnNSZlPTAmYj04OTU1Njg2NDgmZD1oMWIwZjZy.SoMcLrUWqgabd6_ltxrErH14PW9S4CPwKwe8Bn6YAXY)

| | February is Heart Health Awareness Month. Today is "National Wear Red Day" (not to be confused with Red Nose Day) which occurs on the first Friday of February, each year. Wear a red shirt, jacket, sweater or any article of clothing you prefer. (well, maybe not one of "those" red hats. Whole Person Healthcare is a cornerstone of my campaign. Every day, Americans go undiagnosed or untreated due to lack of access and equity in healthcare. Many die because they don't have access to, can’t afford, or are afraid to seek the potentially life saving medical care they need. THIS CAN AND MUST BE FIXED. I will fight in Congress to do just that!
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=7JvhL8X6yRGQIEQq2DgrTzDitx-gKCfxT4ESxHAwlCM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXdlYXJyZWRkYXk9MTAwIiwiciI6ImI5OWRmOTkzLTZlNDMtNDMxNy01YWJmLWM2NzgxYWNiMzhlMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | Signs and symptoms of Cardiovascular disease can vary based on your race or sex. Not all symptoms "scream" heart attack, especially for women. If you think you're having a possible heart attack, CALL 911 IMMEDIATELY! "Time is muscle" is a common saying among physicians and for good reason. Even if you survive a heart attack, damage to your heart muscle can be debilitating and lead to permanent disability. Please, do not hesitate to seek professional medical care. Some risk factors that greatly influence your susceptibility to heart disease or its severity are:
* High blood pressure (most common warning sign that is often not diagnosed until it's too high)
* High blood cholesterol (due to both genetics and diet)
* Smoking (an easily avoided risk but also a very difficult one to eliminate once started)
* Diabetes (secondary effects of which are vascular disease)
* Obesity (a condition that can be complicated to understand as a form of malnutrition)
* Unhealthy diet (by choice or by limited access to healthier diet options like fresh fruits and vegetables)
* Physical inactivity (sedentary lifestyles of kids become habits for life in many adults)
* Excessive alcohol use (not limited to actual alcoholism)[[source](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=oZQ_E3gvQuLippJxi_8_6Gdx8_E7RatGNHIZ0xvh3R0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi9oZWFydGRpc2Vhc2UvZmFjdHMuaHRtIiwiciI6IjcxODU1MDNiLWVkZTktNDY0Ny0yZGMwLTlkODcyZmFmYWFjYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)]

Some of the best things you can do to care for yourself or loved ones are:
* Understand your risk factors by looking at your family medical history.
* Eliminate or control your risk factors through behavioral changes in your life.
* See a doctor annually for a simple physical, blood pressure screening and cholesterol check.
* Don't be silent. If you have symptoms that you don't understand or that scare you, call your doctor.

---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=xmjVbEIvUWCrk28yeAiI_aHEfRHY-SlK05JDOGjGaR8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPXdlYXJyZWRkYXk9MTAwIiwiciI6IjhhMTM4NDA1LWRhMzktNGMyYi03MTY2LWQxOTRmM2U0NGJjYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | Some more facts about Cardiovascular disease:
* Cardiovascular disease has been the leading cause of death since 1921 for Americans.
* Is responsible for nearly one third of all deaths in the U.S.
* Costs to our healthcare systems are $216 billion annually.
* Losses of $147 billion in job productivity, which includes lost wages, profits and revenue.[[source]](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=ytWqh8s-SdxbbcTsJY2IA6P_-7i1oKr0oiQ1zrZOYjE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2RjLmdvdi9jaHJvbmljZGlzZWFzZS9hYm91dC9jb3N0cy9pbmRleC5odG1dIiwiciI6IjAyZjlmMDk2LTcxMTMtNDk3Yi04NzU2LTdlMDUzNDA2NDdhYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)

Cardiovascular deaths rose in the wake of COVID-19 due to the affect the disease can have on the cardiovascular system. There have also also been collateral deaths because they were unable or scared to make a doctor's appointment for continuing care of their condition or a heart screening physical. [(source)](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=ru33-8hx45ZB68V1T9SGmq1lm5uiX4QuHkyThRWqX-k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmJjbmV3cy5jb20vaGVhbHRoL2hlYWx0aC1uZXdzL2NkYy1maW5kcy1kZWF0aHMtaGVhcnQtZGlzZWFzZS1kaWFiZXRlcy1jbGltYmVkLWFtaWQtY292aWQtdS1uMTI3MDI2MCIsInIiOiIwMmY5ZjA5Ni03MTEzLTQ5N2ItODc1Ni03ZTA1MzQwNjQ3YWIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)

| I want to represent WA-03 to:
* Defend your rights as [working people](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=_8QA-IZ4R14vQQwDv7mr9oIM1fbY9FVuPRfB_1gNxPk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzk4Tmt1NWM4Zj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiZzdGF0dXM9RHJhZnQmY2lkPTAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMCMvbWFpbiIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) and families.
* Aim for the [healthcare we all deserve](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=OtDJRlcJxM13LWPu704fPXztVhfkGe6WsBqxPYCvp8U.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), written into law.
* Protect a [woman's bodily autonomy](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=d0hR8N8IflO6sL8Xjsida-86NJFNintHgG1V4_1RQGs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDMiLCJyIjoiM2ZmNDY0NzAtMWFlZi00ZmVkLTI2YTktMzU0NDRiZTdkOTAyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) with protected reproductive care, written into law.
* Securing our [education system with the teaching](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/a9Nx4uQMT/c?w=I5JsZaudLcnTkf1lBY6W1aT_51u62LozeQFwYrYt6io.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vZWR1Y2F0aW9uIiwiciI6IjNmZjQ2NDcwLTFhZWYtNGZlZC0yNmE5LTM1NDQ0YmU3ZDkwMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) of facts, good or bad.

clean_body: February is Heart Health Awareness Month. Today is "National Wear Red Day" (not to be confused with Red Nose Day) which occurs on | | Can't see this message? | | | | | National Wear Red Day is TODAY! | | | | | | | February is Heart Health Awareness Month. Today is "National Wear Red Day" (not to be confused with Red Nose Day) which occurs on the first Friday of February, each year. Wear a red shirt, jacket, sweater or any article of clothing you prefer. (well, maybe not one of "those" red hats. Whole Person Healthcare is a cornerstone of my campaign. Every day, Americans go undiagnosed or untreated due to lack of access and equity in healthcare. Many die because they don't have access to, can’t afford, or are afraid to seek the potentially life saving medical care they need. THIS CAN AND MUST BE FIXED. I will fight in Congress to do just that! | | | | | Signs and symptoms of Cardiovascular disease can vary based on your race or sex. Not all symptoms "scream" heart attack, especially for women. If you think you're having a possible heart attack, CALL 911 IMMEDIATELY! "Time is muscle" is a common saying among physicians and for good reason. Even if you survive a heart attack, damage to your heart muscle can be debilitating and lead to permanent disability. Please, do not hesitate to seek professional medical care. Some risk factors that greatly influence your susceptibility to heart disease or its severity are: High blood pressure (most common warning sign that is often not diagnosed until it's too high) High blood cholesterol (due to both genetics and diet) Smoking (an easily avoided risk but also a very difficult one to eliminate once started) Diabetes (secondary effects of which are vascular disease) Obesity (a condition that can be complicated to understand as a form of malnutrition) Unhealthy diet (by choice or by limited access to healthier diet options like fresh fruits and vegetables) Physical inactivity (sedentary lifestyles of kids become habits for life in many adults) Excessive alcohol use (not limited to actual alcoholism)] Some of the best things you can do to care for yourself or loved ones are: Understand your risk factors by looking at your family medical history. Eliminate or control your risk factors through behavioral changes in your life. See a doctor annually for a simple physical, blood pressure screening and cholesterol check. Don't be silent. If you have symptoms that you don't understand or that scare you, call your doctor. | | | | | Some more facts about Cardiovascular disease: Cardiovascular disease has been the leading cause of death since 1921 for Americans. Is responsible for nearly one third of all deaths in the U.S. Costs to our healthcare systems are $216 billion annually. Losses of $147 billion in job productivity, which includes lost wages, profits and revenue.[[source]]() Cardiovascular deaths rose in the wake of COVID-19 due to the affect the disease can have on the cardiovascular system. There have also also been collateral deaths because they were unable or scared to make a doctor's appointment for continuing care of their condition or a heart screening physical. | | | If you need or want more information or would like to donate to the ongoing research and care for Cardiovascular disease, click | | | I want to represent WA-03 to: Defend your rights as and families. Aim for the , written into law. Protect a with protected reproductive care, written into law. Securing our of facts, good or bad. | | If a friend forwarded you this email, don't miss the next! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Kayla Hausmann
subject: I wanted to bump this to the top of your inbox.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi there,

I found this email from Deb incredibly moving, and I wanted to bump it to the top of your inbox in case you missed it.

Deb isn’t in this race to play partisan games. She’s running because she believes Wisconsinites deserve dignity and respect. Derrick Van Orden will continue to belittle our community members and degrade our loved ones - but our district deserves better. I’m proud to have been on Deb’s team every single step of the way, and I will be proud to see her through to November.

If you’re with Deb in this fight to bring dignity and respect to Congress, donate $25 or whatever you can today. Here’s the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dmg_em_2022q1?amount=25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438367/328811556/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGZjZDFlNC1mZTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7Pbf2IRJtYSUWLvIQarbhPX4euybAhbYhPGp3dCfc4=)**.

Thank you!

Kayla Hausmann
Campaign Manager

Sent from my iPhone

**\----------Forwarded message----------

From:** [deb.mcgrath@debmcgrathforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438368/328811557/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGZjZDFlNC1mZTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7Pbf2IRJtYSUWLvIQarbhPX4euybAhbYhPGp3dCfc4=)
**Date:** Mon, Jan 31, 2022 at 7:02 PM
**Subject:** Not in Wisconsin, not in Congress
**To:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438369/328811558/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGZjZDFlNC1mZTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7Pbf2IRJtYSUWLvIQarbhPX4euybAhbYhPGp3dCfc4=)

Peter, the race for the open seat here in Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District could determine control of Congress. I know that if we work together, we can keep this seat and ensure equal rights and opportunities.

**Our campaign is about respecting every person, and helping them gain opportunity to thrive.** I believe ‘life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness’ are both responsibilities and imperatives to our way of life. Although our state and nation have made progress towards equality and support for the LGBTQ+ members of our communities, we still have so much work to do.

This is personal to me and many families. One of my children is gay. He came out to me when he was a scared teenager and we were living in Hungary - a country that is now openly hostile to people like him. I never want America to be a country where someone is afraid to be themselves. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438370/328811559/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.e8fcd1e4-fe85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGZjZDFlNC1mZTg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k7Pbf2IRJtYSUWLvIQarbhPX4euybAhbYhPGp3dCfc4=) But our Trump-endorsed Republican opponent Derrick Van Orden doesn’t seem to agree. Van Orden was so upset over a Pride Month book display at the Prairie du Chien library that he made library staff – including a teenager who identifies as a member of the LGBTQ+ community – feel threatened, frightened, and unsafe at work. **The contempt Van Orden displayed has no place in Wisconsin or the halls of Congress.**

If you are with me, I need your support now to close the final gap to our January end-of-month fundraising goal in time. In this critical election year, we must meet every one of our grassroots funding benchmarks to stay on track and keep organizing for victory. **[Please pitch in $5, $10, $25, or the most generous amount you can to make sure we meet our goal by clean_body: | Hi there, I found this email from Deb incredibly moving, and I wanted to bump it to the top of your inbox in case you missed it. Deb isn’t in this race to play partisan games. She’s running because she believes Wisconsinites deserve dignity and respect. Derrick Van Orden will continue to belittle our community members and degrade our loved ones - but our district deserves better. I’m proud to have been on Deb’s team every single step of the way, and I will be proud to see her through to November. If you’re with Deb in this fight to bring dignity and respect to Congress, donate $25 or whatever you can today. Here’s the link: =. Thank you! Kayla Hausmann Campaign Manager Sent from my iPhone \----------Forwarded message---------- From: = Date: Mon, Jan 31, 2022 at 7:02 PM Subject: Not in Wisconsin, not in Congress To: = Peter, the race for the open seat here in Wisconsin’s 3rd Congressional District could determine control of Congress. I know that if we work together, we can keep this seat and ensure equal rights and opportunities. Our campaign is about respecting every person, and helping them gain opportunity to thrive. I believe ‘life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness’ are both responsibilities and imperatives to our way of life. Although our state and nation have made progress towards equality and support for the LGBTQ+ members of our communities, we still have so much work to do. This is personal to me and many families. One of my children is gay. He came out to me when he was a scared teenager and we were living in Hungary - a country that is now openly hostile to people like him. I never want America to be a country where someone is afraid to be themselves. = But our Trump-endorsed Republican opponent Derrick Van Orden doesn’t seem to agree. Van Orden was so upset over a Pride Month book display at the Prairie du Chien library that he made library staff – including a teenager who identifies as a member of the LGBTQ+ community – feel threatened, frightened, and unsafe at work. The contempt Van Orden displayed has no place in Wisconsin or the halls of Congress. If you are with me, I need your support now to close the final gap to our January end-of-month fundraising goal in time. In this critical election year, we must meet every one of our grassroots funding benchmarks to stay on track and keep organizing for victory. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thank you for all you do to protect our democracy, Deb | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/9f841fd8076f5b17c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, This has been a B.I.G. week on the campaign trail. We've continued to crisscross Georgia, talk about the issues, and explain the clear choice in the Republican primary. We're depending on your support more than ever before, so thank you for all that you're doing!
---
---
# **_Criss-Crossing Georgia_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/3798eab5bf7a9b2ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
We've traveled all over Georgia this week, listening to voters, and sharing our message. It's great to see so many friends and to have their support and encouragement. Stay tuned for when we'll be in your area again!
---
---
# **_Back In The Golden Isles_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/5b437ca8d810189fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Stopped by The Brunswick News to discuss our campaign and message during last week's swing through the Golden Isles. Georgians know this isn't a game, and they know I have the trusted experience to win in November and hit the ground running on day one. [**Read more here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/5e100c35e4302ce4c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_"Herschelisms"_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/fe8b0f750a790bc9c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We launched a series of digital advertisements this week that highlight questionable things Herschel Walker has said during his limited campaign appearances. He's told Georgia Republicans to "quit complaining about voter integrity," said that "everything the Democrats want I guarantee it is what I want," and declared it's "totally unfair" to ask how he'll vote on legislation, including Joe Biden's $1.2 trillion "infrastructure" bill. These are important differences between Herschel and me — and they need to be talked about before the primary in May. Our nominee must be ready to defend our values to go toe to toe with Raphael Warnock. Otherwise Democrats will keep the Senate. **Hope you'll watch each of these ads below and share them with your families and loved ones. ** [**"Quit complaining about voter integrity"**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/08a23bc820ed680fc3d6b838967d376c/37793) [**"Everything the Democrats want, I guarantee it is what I want."**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/c6b467e84f0bb9aac3d6b838967d376c/37793) [**"Totally unfair"**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/6db1b85bd24a00f1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_How Many Times Can Herschel Fumble?_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/53610fb0f20ba7f6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Georgia Republicans are noticing that Herschel rarely answers questions or makes appearances — and now the media is too. Articles like this are just a taste of what's to come from Raphael Warnock and the media if Herschel wins the nomination in May. **They want to run against him. ** No matter how much we like Herschel the football legend, we cannot afford this experiment. **[Read more here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/30565ed5ed1bf128c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/748fcf9640041562c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/8f6879751bbe1705c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/a56e9b0f8eccdd3cc3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! We now know that Raphael Warnock has $23 million on hand to keep this seat in Democrat control, and Herschel Walker has amassed $5 million too. [**Every dollar counts, and if you haven't already helped us share our message, I hope you'll do so here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/57715b4227bc3ab2c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/ca6c6d9ed07c75d8c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/62fede5789d06350c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/b5198e5c5948962fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/22385d5a9eb177d0/589c11db170e7bcdc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=22385d5a9eb177d0&d=afafb1edc1cb8402c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=22385d5a9eb177d0).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

subject: MUST WATCH: Our new ad
body:

Liz Cheney has shown her true colors by joining Nancy Pelosi and her radicals.

Republicans must be united to stop the Democrats from destroying our country; we need all hands on deck!

clean_body: | | | | Help us spread it across Wyoming. | Peter, Liz Cheney has shown her true colors by joining Nancy Pelosi and her radicals. Republicans must be united to stop the Democrats from destroying our country; we need all hands on deck! My team launched a BRAND-NEW ad to make sure that our message is loud and clear! The people of Wyoming deserve a representative who actually lives in the state; not someone who bought a “vacation home” so that she could claim to be a resident. I am born and raised on a small ranch outside of Fort Laramie, where I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty. I have dedicated myself to FIGHTING FOR THE PEOPLE of our great state; the people who put food on your table, gas in your car, a roof over your head, and who build our roads. I truly need your support, Peter. Wyoming is the 9th largest state in the country, in order to spread our ad far and wide, I am going to need every supporter to step up! you, Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Wyoming’s at-large Congressional Representative Endorsed by President Trump | | | |

name: Jessica Mason
subject: My team might have had an advantage on the first category 😂😂😂
body:
Virtual trivia was a blast last night!

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438595/328812649/-1288899752?refcode=220204_FR_trivianightrecap_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzU0MDdlYS1mZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eiN05fiVoOjnarM8Shr_erkcATAoTx67qe83xjpocuU=)
---
Last night, we had a virtual fundraiser event, _and it was so much fun, y’all!_

I loved chatting with everyday people about the issues I’m fighting for, while also having a blast with some trivia! Shoutout to the 20 or so of you who were able to join us!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438596/328812650/-1288899752?refcode=220204_FR_trivianightrecap_IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzU0MDdlYS1mZjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eiN05fiVoOjnarM8Shr_erkcATAoTx67qe83xjpocuU=) That’s what this campaign is all about — connecting with and bringing passionate people together on the shared causes that I plan on championing in Congress.

The free grassroots fundraising event was hosted by _Barrier To Entry,_ a small women-owned organization who helps low-income candidates and people of color break the socioeconomic barriers that hold us back from running for public office. (You might remember they officially endorsed me a few months ago!)

When our team isn't knocking on doors or rallying folks in the community, we’re engaging with supporters online, on the phone, and via text. And every dollar we raise goes right back into these outreach efforts.

**Election Day is just around the corner, and early voting starts in less than 2 weeks.** We’re planning on more virtual events to keep building momentum around our campaign and energizing supporters before then. **[Will you rush a contribution today to help us get more events like these on the books right away? clean_body: Virtual trivia was a blast last night! | | | = Last night, we had a virtual fundraiser event, and it was so much fun, y’all! I loved chatting with everyday people about the issues I’m fighting for, while also having a blast with some trivia! Shoutout to the 20 or so of you who were able to join us! = That’s what this campaign is all about — connecting with and bringing passionate people together on the shared causes that I plan on championing in Congress. The free grassroots fundraising event was hosted by Barrier To Entry, a small women-owned organization who helps low-income candidates and people of color break the socioeconomic barriers that hold us back from running for public office. (You might remember they officially endorsed me a few months ago!) When our team isn't knocking on doors or rallying folks in the community, we’re engaging with supporters online, on the phone, and via text. And every dollar we raise goes right back into these outreach efforts. Election Day is just around the corner, and early voting starts in less than 2 weeks. We’re planning on more virtual events to keep building momentum around our campaign and energizing supporters before then. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** = Keep an eye out for upcoming events and opportunities to get involved as we sprint toward the finish line in these last couple of weeks! name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: impeachable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lxS1c4ObYYkgwcunP3iuo3atJfLZBgCS_hMO2iH98ElhoJfTdwjJLZTDwmRioSQD2PlIwg7mOUq5L6ZxKfdeJgEAz78YPotEgc8Y2S1u3cm4kxX6eCcSXeDTdFathjSc76Vq4dcSw6TZwnlZJ-8mxBL_1GyTvCBevPWoLckb7w2gz7p6wIdVqo-6MYRCTe343mqWG7WNe2mf-En-VNADVYWJnE_BpiiPdtv-EBoAs7pfkOGdB-pUj3Uklmp3NJ6wGRfllWO972hUva-RBWCX7Bg3cqmAJNuBaslY99c8vLII6PX-UHTfeXrwIRyT2kwOYgVv75u9cjs=&c=4iFMEXNTy6fpGy4aDffcVQNSYQT4K2mRUy9BCVg_ApYYvjQtPdCK0g==&ch=oGquj3sq70DD7VZxQxhrSJTgVKTdNQL1qefVkBhV1PJJQ5KE9wPSGw==)
---
| |
---
| Peter, the Biden Border Crisis has allowed more than 2 MILLION illegal immigrants to flood across our southern border since Biden took office, impacting my home state of Texas the most.
This illegal immigration crisis has threatened our safety and has allowed dangerous drugs like fentanyl to spread into our communities, killing Americans.
Now, we learned that the Biden Administration has been secretly releasing single adult male illegal immigrants throughout our country. These illegal immigrants cross our border, are dropped off by the government at Texas airports, and then put on flights to communities throughout the United States.
I do not say this lightly: Joe Biden's deliberate refusal to enforce America's immigration laws is an impeachable offense. The most basic duty of the President of the United States is to execute the laws passed by Congress. Joe Biden is flagrantly refusing to uphold his constitutional duty by letting illegal immigrants into our country and then aiding in their release across America.
---
| | | [TELL JOE BIDEN TO SECURE OUR BORDER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lxS1c4ObYYkgwcunP3iuo3atJfLZBgCS_hMO2iH98ElhoJfTdwjJLZTDwmRioSQDqw5BDLLzY0qvGa-PVceUJKccTK0JAN0z97M0M_g4WKlWh2TGHvD-eriYlG2uy1fhswMtDn4BVjIrX3mtNrJZxNhtMh9f5AItS-TnscmLk6-yS6kM64QqNL27vX8zcuTs59dJ3lzQObrNahZqsE43wxF2pezCK3NMKQ9OJrMnwfcf3VGWo908ugx3pnIc6S6l_R_Ab3jM1ORiyZ68fuyxMjJSVnhhUVGd0csHZxv58h9DF3m9mrYQjXKHVRIqkzAy3PJHvkSZ_ds07hjNfmz4Ew==&c=4iFMEXNTy6fpGy4aDffcVQNSYQT4K2mRUy9BCVg_ApYYvjQtPdCK0g==&ch=oGquj3sq70DD7VZxQxhrSJTgVKTdNQL1qefVkBhV1PJJQ5KE9wPSGw==)
---
| And remember, these are not children, these are not family units. These are single adult males, many of whom have criminal records, being transported to the airport by our government and given plane tickets to cities across the country. There is no law justifying this or provision in our immigration code that allows this.
We need an investigation and we need accountability. But Nancy Pelosi refuses to hold hearings to investigate this. She refuses to bring legislation to the floor that would re-implement President Trump's border security policies.
That's why this is the most important midterm election in recent memory.
If Republicans take back the House of Representatives, if we fire Nancy Pelosi, we will investigate the Biden Administration's failure to secure our border. We will pass legislation to undo the damage done by Biden's border crisis.
But we cannot do this without you.
That's why I'm asking for your support, Peter. [Please, donate $100, $50, $25... whatever you can... to our fight to take back the House.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lxS1c4ObYYkgwcunP3iuo3atJfLZBgCS_hMO2iH98ElhoJfTdwjJLZTDwmRioSQD2PlIwg7mOUq5L6ZxKfdeJgEAz78YPotEgc8Y2S1u3cm4kxX6eCcSXeDTdFathjSc76Vq4dcSw6TZwnlZJ-8mxBL_1GyTvCBevPWoLckb7w2gz7p6wIdVqo-6MYRCTe343mqWG7WNe2mf-En-VNADVYWJnE_BpiiPdtv-EBoAs7pfkOGdB-pUj3Uklmp3NJ6wGRfllWO972hUva-RBWCX7Bg3cqmAJNuBaslY99c8vLII6PX-UHTfeXrwIRyT2kwOqmqQtWSfYqRz29calteouQ==&c=4iFMEXNTy6fpGy4aDffcVQNSYQT4K2mRUy9BCVg_ApYYvjQtPdCK0g==&ch=oGquj3sq70DD7VZxQxhrSJTgVKTdNQL1qefVkBhV1PJJQ5KE9wPSGw==) Without your donation, we can't take back the House, fire Pelosi, and finally hold Joe Biden accountable for his open-border policies.
America's sovereignty... the safety of our communities... basic rule of law... there's too much at stake to stay on the sidelines.
We need you. And I know I can count on you.
In service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT TO SECURE OUR BORDER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lxS1c4ObYYkgwcunP3iuo3atJfLZBgCS_hMO2iH98ElhoJfTdwjJLZTDwmRioSQD2PlIwg7mOUq5L6ZxKfdeJgEAz78YPotEgc8Y2S1u3cm4kxX6eCcSXeDTdFathjSc76Vq4dcSw6TZwnlZJ-8mxBL_1GyTvCBevPWoLckb7w2gz7p6wIdVqo-6MYRCTe343mqWG7WNe2mf-En-VNADVYWJnE_BpiiPdtv-EBoAs7pfkOGdB-pUj3Uklmp3NJ6wGRfllWO972hUva-RBWCX7Bg3cqmAJNuBaslY99c8vLII6PX-UHTfeXrwIRyT2kwOHN6XjBWgxuo=&c=4iFMEXNTy6fpGy4aDffcVQNSYQT4K2mRUy9BCVg_ApYYvjQtPdCK0g==&ch=oGquj3sq70DD7VZxQxhrSJTgVKTdNQL1qefVkBhV1PJJQ5KE9wPSGw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | | | Peter, the Biden Border Crisis has allowed more than 2 MILLION illegal immigrants to flood across our southern border since Biden took office, impacting my home state of Texas the most. This illegal immigration crisis has threatened our safety and has allowed dangerous drugs like fentanyl to spread into our communities, killing Americans. Now, we learned that the Biden Administration has been secretly releasing single adult male illegal immigrants throughout our country. These illegal immigrants cross our border, are dropped off by the government at Texas airports, and then put on flights to communities throughout the United States. I do not say this lightly: Joe Biden's deliberate refusal to enforce America's immigration laws is an impeachable offense. The most basic duty of the President of the United States is to execute the laws passed by Congress. Joe Biden is flagrantly refusing to uphold his constitutional duty by letting illegal immigrants into our country and then aiding in their release across America. | | | == | And remember, these are not children, these are not family units. These are single adult males, many of whom have criminal records, being transported to the airport by our government and given plane tickets to cities across the country. There is no law justifying this or provision in our immigration code that allows this. We need an investigation and we need accountability. But Nancy Pelosi refuses to hold hearings to investigate this. She refuses to bring legislation to the floor that would re-implement President Trump's border security policies. That's why this is the most important midterm election in recent memory. If Republicans take back the House of Representatives, if we fire Nancy Pelosi, we will investigate the Biden Administration's failure to secure our border. We will pass legislation to undo the damage done by Biden's border crisis. But we cannot do this without you. That's why I'm asking for your support, Peter. == Without your donation, we can't take back the House, fire Pelosi, and finally hold Joe Biden accountable for his open-border policies. America's sovereignty... the safety of our communities... basic rule of law... there's too much at stake to stay on the sidelines. We need you. And I know I can count on you. In service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | P.S. name: Kina Collins
subject: I was arrested last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Content warning: This email discusses police brutality and murder.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

My name is Kina Collins, I’m a Justice Democrat, and I’m running for
Congress in Illinois' 7th Congressional District. I started out as an
organizer fighting to stop gun violence, pass Medicare for all, and
guarantee the civil rights of all Chicagoans. In 2014 I joined the fight
for accountability in the police murder of 17-year-old Laquan McDonald —
and last night, I was arrested protesting the early release of Laquan’s
killer.

In 2014, a white police officer murdered Laquan McDonald. The officer,
Jason Van Dyke, shot a 17-year-old Black child 16 times, then reloaded his
gun. Then, former mayor Rahm Emanuel tried to cover up the murder. But
finally, after more than 400 days, the police dashcam video was released
and we could all see what really happened.

Van Dyke was convicted but sentenced to just 81 months; yesterday, he was
released from prison early after serving less than half of his sentence.
Think about that. Just three years for the vicious murder of a child.

It shouldn't require a viral consumption of Black suffering and outrage in
order to shame and embarrass this justice system into accountability but
time and again we see that it does. In the wake of Laquan McDonald’s
killing, I joined Black Chicagoans who came out, marched, and demanded
accountability — because justice, at that point, was impossible. Justice
would be Laquan McDonald being alive today. And last night, years later,
we once again came out and protested because Van Dyke serving less than
half of his already sham sentence is not accountability.

That’s why I’m urgently calling on U.S. Attorney General Merrick Garland
to intervene and bring federal charges against Van Dyke to ensure that
there is real accountability in this case.

And that’s why last night, I joined a coalition of groups and local
leaders at the Dirksen Federal Building in downtown Chicago to demand
federal charges against Van Dyke. That’s where I was arrested, calling out
for accountability.

We set out to bring as much attention as possible to Laquan’s story,
because his name is not just a hashtag and this is not the final chapter.
We support all forms of nonviolent civil disobedience. John Lewis and
other civil rights leaders who came before us encouraged us to participate
in good trouble, in necessary trouble. And I’m proud to say that is
exactly what we did last night.

Our fight will continue until there’s accountability in this case AND
serious changes to the justice system and police impunity in America.

And as leaders in Chicago continue to fail Black communities, it’s time
for leaders on the federal level to step up. It’s time for Congress to
address police brutality and ensure we have systems of accountability to
prevent this from ever happening again. This is one of the reasons I’m
running.

It’s time to end qualified immunity and stop investing federal funds in
discriminatory police departments. It’s time to pass the George Floyd
Justice in Policing Act, the Breathe Act, the Ending Qualified Immunity
Act, and the Mental Health Justice Act. It’s long past time for real
leadership and real federal action.

Peter, getting
arrested will not deter me from our fights for accountability and justice.
We need to ensure our voices are heard in Chicago, Washington D.C. and all
across the country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/92467?refcode=em20220204-21820&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21820%2E1203867%2ELwpxLB ]Can you help amplify my calls for justice and help me take our fight
to Congress? Split a contribution to my campaign and Justice Democrats
today so we can demand and get police accountability in this case and end
impunity for police officers in America.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/92467?refcode=em20220204-21820&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21820%2E1203867%2ELwpxLB ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Kina Collins
Candidate for Illinois' 7th Congressional District

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=21820%2E1203867%2ELwpxLB ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=21820%2E1203867%2ELwpxLB ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220204-21820-footer&t=1024&refcode2=21820_1203867_LwpxLB&akid=21820%2E1203867%2ELwpxLB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=21820%2E1203867%2ELwpxLB

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: OH Map Alert via OhioDems.org
subject: Ohio Republicans don't care about fair elections (just look at their maps)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Ohio Republicans are trying to gerrymander their way into winning. The proof is in their actions, take a look:

**FIRST:** The Ohio Supreme Court struck down the first round of maps drawn by the Republican-led redistricting commission -- maps that would have given Republicans a **62-37 advantage in the House and a 23-10 advantage in the Senate.** So the Ohio Supreme Court ordered the redistricting commission to redraw the maps to be indicative of how Ohioans vote.

**THEN:** The redistricting commission met to redraw the maps -- but the replacement maps aren't any better. These maps give Republicans a **57-42 advantage in the House and a 20-13 advantage in the Senate.**

**BUT:** These new maps are even worse than they seem. In the newly drawn maps, 12/42 Democratic-leaning House seats and 4/13 Democratic-leaning Senate seats give Democrats advantages of 3% or less. Only one Republican-leaning Senate district has an **advantage of 3%** , and no Republican-leaning House districts do.

**We can't make it any more clear:** Ohio Republicans don't care about giving everyday Ohioans a voice; they care about winning and pushing an agenda that hurts the middle class. We can't let these new maps pass -- and we'll take it back to court if we have to.

[**We're committed to fighting for fair maps across Ohio. Maps that give all Ohioans a voice -- no matter what their zip code is. If you're with us, add your name to our petition to call on the Republicans of the Ohio Redistricting Commission to put people over politics.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438702/328813226/1257055639?ms=em22_220204_maps_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em22_220204_maps_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em22_220204_maps_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220204_maps_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RtIHZeLhWtlWe%2BEThYQuVRZJXSFd1Hg5KCBNzfBS0Ba2270eeuzT2kM0c3ENzOLaVqB%2BlBDRnGu1UVjZRl%2BuQj3St44bGbf40A3D8VLcQNNDsHuPZYQM3R9u2MnCEkmp5qOrwAaQB252ehG0wKxxgA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAxNGUyYy0wMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa1wwvlHmki4szy1i0aa2r_0NGusHZtW5Gg1oazosdo=&emci=584f4dc9-ed85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=39014e2c-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=25291327)

\-- Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438703/328813227/1175522780?refcode=em22_220204_maps_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220204_maps_adv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTAxNGUyYy0wMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa1wwvlHmki4szy1i0aa2r_0NGusHZtW5Gg1oazosdo=)

clean_body: If McMaster wins this election, he'd be the longest serving Gov in SC's history. | | | Friends, If McMaster wins this election, he might become the longest serving governor in South Carolina’s history. We can’t do the same thing year after year, election after election, and expect a different result. We gotta do something different, y’all — and I’m running because 4 more years of Henry McMaster is NOT an option. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We’ve come too far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
This is how to honor Black History Month.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438952/328814284/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmVhMjM5Ni0wMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wlDxxv16ozyvNvSVbov9OTaC1y3tCjCvdxCIx7V1EY4=&emci=f0bdc1df-f885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=92ea2396-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, If your inbox looks like mine, you have already received a lot of messages about Black History Month. The truth is that this month has become more and more commercialized and it gives me heartburn to see so many institutions miss the connection between today’s struggle to protect our freedom to vote and the racial justice challenges of yesteryear. As we close out the first week of Black History Month, it’s essential that we remember the intended purpose of dedicating a month to honoring the lives and contributions of those who came before us. This month isn’t about commercialization. It’s not about fundraising. It’s about honoring our ancestors and cherishing our communities. Black History Month gives us time to celebrate and remember the people and events that have shaped our country and the world. It is critical that we study and apply the lessons from the activists who marched before us. These freedom fighters left a blueprint for defending our civil rights and we need their wisdom now more than ever to stop Jim Crow 2.0. Jim Crow 2.0 is our current reality, and it’s happening in states across the country. The fight against voter suppression is happening at the local level—and we need you with us. Whether it’s fighting on the frontlines or helping from home however you can. This movement hinges on the hard work and contributions of voters across race, zip code, and economic status. **Visit[StopJimCrow2.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41438953/328814285/768938118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmVhMjM5Ni0wMTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wlDxxv16ozyvNvSVbov9OTaC1y3tCjCvdxCIx7V1EY4=&emci=f0bdc1df-f885-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=92ea2396-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1037277) today to learn how you can get involved and take action in the communities that need it most. ** The Voting Rights Act of 1965 protected Black people from discriminatory voter registration laws, particularly in southern states. 65 years later, Republican legislators are blocking voting rights bills, attempting to ban drop boxes, removing mobile voting centers, and limiting food and water for voters in hours-long lines. At the same time, anti-voter conspiracy theorists are fueling increasing threats to election workers. Standing by is not an option. **We must take action based on the lessons we have learned from the past.** After all, these tactics are not new; they are from the same playbook as the segregationists of years past. This is why we know that—without collective action—politicians will continue to pass extreme anti-voter laws that block access to the ballot box and dramatically undermine our democratic institutions. Let’s be clear: Our nation has a long history of voter intimidation, suppression and disenfranchisement. Yet the activism of those who risked their lives to fight back runs just as deep. Black History Month reminds us that we have come too far to turn back now. With your help, we can protect the progress we have made as we continue the march onward. It is up to us to see it through. Thank you for all you have done to help protect the freedom to vote, and for standing with us in the months ahead.
In solidarity,
—Cianti Stewart-Reid
Executive Director of Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

clean_body: This is how to honor Black History Month. Fair Fight | | | Friend, If your inbox looks like mine, you have already received a lot of messages about Black History Month. The truth is that this month has become more and more commercialized and it gives me heartburn to see so many institutions miss the connection between today’s struggle to protect our freedom to vote and the racial justice challenges of yesteryear. As we close out the first week of Black History Month, it’s essential that we remember the intended purpose of dedicating a month to honoring the lives and contributions of those who came before us. This month isn’t about commercialization. It’s not about fundraising. It’s about honoring our ancestors and cherishing our communities. Black History Month gives us time to celebrate and remember the people and events that have shaped our country and the world. It is critical that we study and apply the lessons from the activists who marched before us. These freedom fighters left a blueprint for defending our civil rights and we need their wisdom now more than ever to stop Jim Crow 2.0. Jim Crow 2.0 is our current reality, and it’s happening in states across the country. The fight against voter suppression is happening at the local level—and we need you with us. Whether it’s fighting on the frontlines or helping from home however you can. This movement hinges on the hard work and contributions of voters across race, zip code, and economic status. Visit today to learn how you can get involved and take action in the communities that need it most. The Voting Rights Act of 1965 protected Black people from discriminatory voter registration laws, particularly in southern states. 65 years later, Republican legislators are blocking voting rights bills, attempting to ban drop boxes, removing mobile voting centers, and limiting food and water for voters in hours-long lines. At the same time, anti-voter conspiracy theorists are fueling increasing threats to election workers. Standing by is not an option. We must take action based on the lessons we have learned from the past. After all, these tactics are not new; they are from the same playbook as the segregationists of years past. This is why we know that—without collective action—politicians will continue to pass extreme anti-voter laws that block access to the ballot box and dramatically undermine our democratic institutions. Let’s be clear: Our nation has a long history of voter intimidation, suppression and disenfranchisement. Yet the activism of those who risked their lives to fight back runs just as deep. Black History Month reminds us that we have come too far to turn back now. With your help, we can protect the progress we have made as we continue the march onward. It is up to us to see it through. Thank you for all you have done to help protect the freedom to vote, and for standing with us in the months ahead. In solidarity, —Cianti Stewart-Reid Executive Director of Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www.fairfight.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Whether it be health care, education, or another issue important to you, I want to hear about it. I plan to take these stories straight to Congress and work with whomever I can to get things done.

I want to hear directly from you regarding what issues you feel deeply about. On my campaign, we’re prioritizing hearing from supporters like you because I want my campaign to reflect the people in our district. Whether it be health care, education, or another issue important to you, I want to hear about it. I plan to take these stories straight to Congress and work with whomever I can to get things done. So Peter, I’m listening. Will you take a few moments to share a bit about yourself and the issues impact you the most? | Thank you, Liz Mathis Liz Mathis is a lifelong Iowan, State Senator, and former local news reporter running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District in Congress. = | = | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Hagamos esto juntos.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41439226/328815241/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204spanish_gv_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQ3MTQ5MS0wMzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNfT4ZrZDhVP_Lg-vWMhNJV6kUdAHsqc5W47NpLx9e8=)
---
Buenas tardes, Estamos en un momento muy importante en nuestra campaña y no podría estar más orgulloso de nuestro equipo y de la gente y las comunidades del Distrito 2 de Nuevo México. Cómo estadounidense de primera generación y hijo de inmigrantes Mexicanos, siempre he sentido una obligación de aprovechar al máximo la oportunidad que se me ha brindado y honrar los sacrificios de mi familia, especialmente de mis abuelos, quienes empacaron todo para mudarse a la frontera y darnos la oportunidad de una vida mejor. Al igual que muchos de ustedes, he visto cómo el Sueño Americano se esta desapareciendo: comprar una casa se está volviendo inasequible, los trabajos pagan menos, nuestra infraestructura se está deteriorando y ni siquiera podemos permitirnos estar enfermos en este país, o arriesgarnos a perderlo todo y estar en bancarrota. Este no es el país que conozco y que nos prometieron, y les pido que se unan a nuestro equipo para crear un futuro mejor para la próxima generación de Nuevo Mexicanos. En los últimos meses, nos hemos reunido con gente de todas partes de nuestro distrito: Deming, Las Cruces, Anthony, Sunland Park, Alamogordo, Hobbs, Truth or Consequences, Socorro y Albuquerque, y familias de todo este distrito quien comparten las mismas historias y los mismos desafíos. Yo vengo de una familia inmigrante trabajadora y sé lo que es agachar la cabeza y trabajar duro por algo mejor: eso es lo que me comprometo a hacer en esta campaña. [**Les pido que se unan con nosotros, que se unan a nuestro movimiento, que voten por la equidad y la justicia y que apoyen a un candidato que traerá sus valores, creencias y cultura al Congreso.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41439227/328815242/-706083961?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204spanish_gv_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQ3MTQ5MS0wMzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNfT4ZrZDhVP_Lg-vWMhNJV6kUdAHsqc5W47NpLx9e8=) Los próximos 9 meses de esta elección serán difíciles, pero con su apoyo, confío en que podemos ganar y que podemos tener la representación que este Distrito realmente merece. Hagamos esto juntos. Ahora que estamos ya más cerca de ganar, necesito su ayuda y su apoyo. ¡Vamos a ganar juntos! Si se puede. Con sinceridad, Gabe Vásquez | [DONAR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41439228/328815243/-706083961?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204spanish_gv_60da_xx_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQ3MTQ5MS0wMzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNfT4ZrZDhVP_Lg-vWMhNJV6kUdAHsqc5W47NpLx9e8=)
---
* * *
Good afternoon,
We've hit a major milestone in our campaign and I couldn't be more proud of our team and the people and communities of New Mexico's 2nd District.
As a first generation American, I have always felt a huge weight on my shoulders to make the most of the opportunity that I've been given and make the most of the sacrifices of my family, especially my grandparents, who packed up everything to move to the border to give us an opportunity for a better life.
Like many of you, I've seen the American Dream slowly slip away — homes are becoming unaffordable, jobs are paying less, our infrastructure is deteriorating, and we can't even afford to be sick in this country — or risk losing it all. This isn't the America that I know, and I'm asking you to stand with me to create a better future for our next generation.
Over the last few months, we've met with supporters all across New Mexico — Deming, Las Cruces, Alamogordo, Hobbs, Truth or Consequences, Socorro and Albuquerque — and families all across this district share the same stories and the same challenges.
I come from a hardworking Mexican-American immigrant family, and I know what it's like to put your head down and work hard for something better — that's what I'm committed to doing on this campaign.
**[I ask you to join me, to join our movement, to vote for equity and fairness, and to support a candidate who will bring your values and beliefs to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41439229/328815244/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204spanish_gv_60da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQ3MTQ5MS0wMzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNfT4ZrZDhVP_Lg-vWMhNJV6kUdAHsqc5W47NpLx9e8=)**
The next 9 months of this election will be tough, but with your support, I'm confident we can win and that we can have the representation that this district truly deserves. Let's do this together. Now that we're in the next step of the campaign we're building together, I need your help to spread the word that we can elect a representative that will fight equally for all of our communities.
With sincerity,
Gabe Vasquez
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41439230/328815245/-900430888?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204spanish_gv_60da_xx_btn2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQ3MTQ5MS0wMzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNfT4ZrZDhVP_Lg-vWMhNJV6kUdAHsqc5W47NpLx9e8=)

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.

name: Matt Putorti
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
This month and every month that follows, we must commit to achieving racial equity.

| It’s officially Black History Month, a time to uplift and honor the stories of Black Americans, grapple with the systemic inequity and racism that persists in our country, and reflect on the year-round changes we can make in our own lives to support Black communities.

It’s also a time to revere the sacrifices Black Americans have made throughout our country’s history to secure basic rights – among them freedom, the right to vote, and the end of segregation, to name a few.

The layers of inequity that have persisted, however, continue to impact so much of our society today. From education to housing to healthcare to income, the sectors of American life that demand immediate and equity-focused action are many.

This month and every month that follows, we must commit to achieving racial equity. Black History Month should be dedicated to reflection, **but it cannot stop there; it requires action.**

May this February fuel daily advocacy in support of Black communities.

Best,
Matt
---

clean_body: | = Did you see the news, Peter? The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) released their list of battleground races for 2022 — and Yadira’s campaign for CO-08 is one of them. That means that all eyes will be on Colorado, and this race is CRITICAL to Democrats’ hopes of keeping control of the House of Representatives — with a margin of just six seats , we cannot afford to lose this race. = | = And let’s be clear: winning this seat isn't just about Democrats. It’s about the future of our kids, our communities, and our democracy. The stakes for Colorado families are real , and they need a champion like Dr. Caraveo in Congress advocating for them. We cannot afford to turn back the clock on the progress we’ve made in the last year — which is exactly what will happen if Republicans gain control and make Kevin McCarthy Speaker. They’ll cater to extreme right-wingers and big corporations instead of delivering the help working families desperately need. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support! Team Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**We need to know where you stand: Do you support President Biden’s pledge to name a Black woman to the Supreme Court?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6113?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220204-SCOTUSUpdate-HistoryMakingPick-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220204-SCOTUSUpdate-HistoryMakingPick-Pros-sl1&akid=2872%2E9716520%2EUGdNM4)

---

Team -- **History is about to be made.**

For the first time ever, a Black woman will be nominated to serve on the Supreme Court -- where her rulings would impact our country for decades to come.

This is a chance to make our country’s highest judicial institution better reflect the American people, but Republican senators are **_already_** attacking President Biden’s commitment -- before a nominee has even been announced!

****None of us can stay silent, but we still don’t know where you stand! We’re missing 50 responses from Pennsylvania, so please tell us now:

******Do you support President Biden’s pledge to name a Black woman to the Supreme Court?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6113?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220204-SCOTUSUpdate-HistoryMakingPick-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220204-SCOTUSUpdate-HistoryMakingPick-Pros-sl1&akid=2872%2E9716520%2EUGdNM4)
