# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump February 4th, 2022 The stench of Jeff Zucker is finally leaving CNN. The air over there, the Radical Left will be happy to hear, is being made more “environmentally friendly.” The carbon footprint is looking better. But the stench remains, and also at low-rated MSDNC, where weak leaders like Brian Roberts, of “Concast,” who are under the thumb of the Left, don’t allow the truth to be told. Stockholders should not treat these companies well. We need a free and open press in our Country, and we need it now! | [View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkE9PhDAQxT9NuUHaoZRw4KC72aPGxKg3UvoHulsKCwXET293RQ8mkzZ9v-nLvJFlLlMuSWRKwBAKU8KygqSJJrXQQFUhGSkyQRDFoneTGhfuzaKm2RmvZCL6qC0VZAwzTSCjAJwVos5pDiQvmMIE6zqyZev9MKH0AcEp1Lquiewdt_Lsx7kbgk0XZKfWab_iz5Eterl8NQPJMEPpafZd1Slp5g6lR9VxYxGwmzj18yhUEJ2wFe8Ga_S2IxGe3DQuwN94sVb1OPNxq6hvq3mQ3Kvf7t555fyPU_z6BO9v9eW6LgFXzhoZwD-xNTKEOg5bfaBrH42lHFZjrZlYHvbV3Ia8RYv2qUqUPyKA-y-A-zYAPl70Ob826TVOVR_TZ-xuDA7h9Nug_hp3j2SPDig_fgM6WY6x)
---
Donald J. Trump February 4th, 2022
Facebook’s number of daily users has plunged for the first time in Facebook history. This means people are tired of Fake News and abuse and especially tired of their political shenanigans. It could also be that people are waiting for TRUTH—the highly sophisticated platform that we look forward to opening in the not too distant future. Time to straighten out what is happening in our Country!
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzA4EfODlwSJOmxyq39oQcewmOjCHYBvH3NSnpodJqV55Zj2ZWVVwRoYpEVzjHsXJalGxfkKwprrLBFPaqLPZMFojmsrcOxkl4PYELVntQmeyTtuK7HChnIHe0aTgBSncMWIQ4KTmjODFV6_3gEDkgfI41z3OmeiuMuvsxdEOU6SJsYXbbSCcZ3OQn79qC5RyRc_Bd3YHSoUPkBJ3QBuFyBV0fRgkRtNLUohuMbpaNkvEp9M1G8hUvbeA6BjEuNfVtHQYlPLy2e-vB-l-llH-zy_vHdA_RcFlbo1Uk_oGtVjHUaViuRzr3yVipYdbGaFfyeK_banKNlmyuKsTfEMbPXxg_r4Hx16W588eNPFICfUo_c7ty-Bi7Xwb4W9w0si06Rvz0A0azjj4)
---
Donald J. Trump February 3rd, 2022
Bernie Moreno of Ohio is leaving the race for Senate, but I would like to thank him for his time and effort, and that of his wonderful family. I was very impressed with Bernie who was tough on illegal immigration which, after the Biden disaster at the Border, has become a big issue for all candidates. He has done much for Ohio and loves his State and our great MAGA Movement. His decision will help ensure the MAGA Ticket wins BIG, as it is all over the Country. Thank you, Bernie, for your support and keep fighting!

View Bernie Moreno's statement [here](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdUMlugzAQ_Rq4OYIxSzhwaBPl2KqXqjcEeBxc4SVeEvH3NSHJodLIh7fN-LG2ZrRneSpayCBOVuRV2eR0x_Nh5FBgw6q8Kcc8KbJRK4f22ntxRReU8Mh2o06nlhaQ030OUJdlxfYN53zgdcWrod9DWUM6t5P3xiX0LYFTnAGtEii1RaVjhHxBZMOIC86gYo4E4ohD1XskYy9NL86KRIMU3hG_6ozR1hNvgzQkOrR1yKJUMcGiaV1HT8HLTiITQSb0iLIXcwLVCjod7IgRVOPcxfhZ8OVBPbdF8tkM4TjY0NulK_zUBbMt2NRaeVR-SyKjvZrL98epaSLdqVmwSPwDJ8FiH0ezDIfiplPbMnMT8yxcVceqz-uRazPp46o2qd8TgLsL4F4kwM8X_60vZ3ohFDUpPjO1cnCIr18MvoSPjN3j65DUxz91mqXR) .
[View Post](http://email.conservativesunited.co/c/eJxdkE9vhCAQxT8N3jTyR1kPHtrd7KFJ0_TU3gw4uLIBZBXX2E9f3NoemkwgvN_wMm-g5kAF4ETXJCexcobLosI067BsO8JUBSWuihYjlreDm9R4F0Hf1TQ7HRRk7ZD0tcwPBetayQnlmGNBoKiE7ERJpSokE4mp-xD8hOgTIudYy7JkMDhh4BrG2fpoY6Ps1DLtV7pM4uvqnZcWF_kB0fMcbGMV6NkielJWaINIuYnTMI-tiqJrTSOsN7pbd9TGp9AXF-FvvLRTcpzFuDYs9M3sQQT12z24oFz4cUqh-IDy5bi-QsSNMxoi-Cf2GmKok1_lkS1DMtbgF22Mnkoe93XZhtyiJftUNeLPiJDHL0Ie2yDk87278tuF3lKqhpS95W5j5BjPsHr117h7ZHt0gvjpG26vjxQ)

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: Joe Biden’s Failure
body:
We must hold him accountable |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=86a356ce11&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

Joe Biden enters his second year in office after a complete and total failure his first year. Domestic affairs to national security, the United States is worse off today by every metric than we were just one year ago under President Donald J. Trump.

Joe Biden has failed us on COVID, failing to control and virus and imposing useless, unconstitutional mandates. His botched withdrawal from Afghanistan left 13 of our Servicemen and women dead and weakened our standing around the globe, there is an invasion at our southern border, with over 2 million illegal crossings and counting, and our economy is the worst it has been in a generation.

For all of these reasons, Let’s Go Brandon has become a rallying cry for the millions of hard working patriots like you and I. That is why I am excited to offer you my official “Let’s Go Brandon” tee shirt today! [Get your own iconic Let’s Go Brandon shirt today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=08cb31c923&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=0c43a5e10a&e=598f6aa24c) Show your friends and family your patriotism and opposition to this radical, socialist regime ruling in Washington. Together, we will take back power and take our country back!

Thank you,

David Curry

Friend,
---
I just wrapped up our finance meeting to kick off the month and was reviewing the numbers with Rebecca...

Tony Evers already DOUBLED our last ad buy and according to the latest campaign finance reports, he’s still burning through cash to drown out Rebecca’s message on the airwaves.

The ad market is a simple calculus...

clean_body: He’s drowning out Rebecca’s message. | Friend, I just wrapped up our finance meeting to kick off the month and was reviewing the numbers with Rebecca... Tony Evers already DOUBLED our last ad buy and according to the latest campaign finance reports, he’s still burning through cash to drown out Rebecca’s message on the airwaves. The ad market is a simple calculus... The more ad space Evers can outbid us for, the more voters hear his lying attacks and the less they hear the TRUTH about how he is harming our children with masks and plummeting education standards. Thank you for your continued support, Colleen Coyle \--------- Finance Director Rebecca for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Conservative Direct
subject: Reporter asks Jen Psaki about $30 trillion debt and her answer about what Biden thinks is 'truly amazing'
body:
\-- With the national debt now going over $30 trillion, White House press secretary Jen Psaki was asked about it today. Her response about what President Biden thinks is worthy of a beverage warning: Wait, seriously? Yep. Watch: Is that the same president that wants to spend a few trillion more dollars even with inflation continuing to rise but it’s being stopped by 52 senators? Biden’s been in DC politics for decades and now we have $30 trillion worth of his (and many others’) brand of “fiscal responsibility.” Recommended Twitchy Video |
---

clean_body: \-- With the national debt now going over $30 trillion, White House press secretary Jen Psaki was asked about it today. Her response about what President Biden thinks is worthy of a beverage warning: Wait, seriously? Yep. Watch: Is that the same president that wants to spend a few trillion more dollars even with inflation continuing to rise but it’s being stopped by 52 senators? Biden’s been in DC politics for decades and now we have $30 trillion worth of his (and many others’) brand of “fiscal responsibility.” Recommended Twitchy Video | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dig Deeper... name: Jamarah Hayner, Team Bass
subject: We must defend voting rights (do you agree?)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team —

Last year, state lawmakers introduced more than 440 voter suppression bills in 49 states. And they _passed_ at least 34 restrictions across 19 states before the year was up.

Karen has staunchly defended voting rights as a community organizer, a former state representative and Speaker of the California State House, and as a congresswoman. And she will continue to protect access to the ballot box as Los Angeles' next mayor.

The right to vote is sacred. We can't let extremist politicians take away the right to make our voices heard in our democracy away from the collective.

**[Right now, Karen is trying to marshal this grassroots team to send a strong message: Los Angeles will ALWAYS protect voting rights. If you're with Karen in the work to defend voting rights, sign on today to condemn racist voter suppression.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440138/328819174/-1918311884?ms=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&refcode=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&source=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=O63MxINy6fAocMLM4RHyhbQHgRaYyvOWWdFyp3GH5AyXd5p5clt3gto5q%2F8Xo6co%2F9tTo%2Fu7uKa%2FGifY39RY5DRGFC%2BOvOyaXwIs57stnMWdGask4lwuNYnb%2FTMhD1zt4Vb7wWG87FX6qzMEi5SD6Q%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGM2NzVlOS0wNjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z7_P1R22frLz4mwM6qxYZLSC19lLsmVI0d5sgvWfJfY=&emci=dcecab91-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=adc675e9-0686-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

The right to vote is the foundation of all other legal rights in America. So it's no surprise that voter suppression has always been wielded by those in power to silence the voices of marginalized communities.

Our vote is our voice and one of the best ways we can create positive change in our communities. Karen will always defend every Angeleno's right to vote without fear in any election.

**[If you agree that now is the time to defend voting rights, sign on today to condemn racist voter suppression.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440139/328819175/-1918311884?ms=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&refcode=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&source=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220204_vtrspr_adv_gq_act___JH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=O63MxINy6fAocMLM4RHyhbQHgRaYyvOWWdFyp3GH5AyXd5p5clt3gto5q%2F8Xo6co%2F9tTo%2Fu7uKa%2FGifY39RY5DRGFC%2BOvOyaXwIs57stnMWdGask4lwuNYnb%2FTMhD1zt4Vb7wWG87FX6qzMEi5SD6Q%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGM2NzVlOS0wNjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z7_P1R22frLz4mwM6qxYZLSC19lLsmVI0d5sgvWfJfY=&emci=dcecab91-cc85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=adc675e9-0686-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

In solidarity,

Jamarah Hayner
Team Bass

name: Judicial Watch NewsLink

body: Background on Pennsylvania court striking mail-in ballot law [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: A local election issue I want you to know about, friend.
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

We know there is an organized effort in Michigan to politicize our elections and undermine the public’s trust in the security of our election process.

Some of the individuals involved in that effort are running against me for Secretary of State, propelled by a national donor network that seeks to advance the Big Lie of the 2020 election.

What’s so interesting is that the majority of that organized effort is happening in the appointment of local election canvassing boards all around Michigan. These bi-partisan boards are responsible for certifying county vote totals and sending the results to the Board of State Canvassers. This is an important part of the election process: Men and women nominated by county Republican and Democratic parties doing the ministerial job of poring over election results, certifying them and sending them on to Lansing.

Unfortunately, there is an active effort to appoint partisans to some canvassing boards who are motivated by partisan politics and election conspiracies. Their aim is to sow distrust in our election process before the results even reach state officials. And in these election administration positions, they will have some power to do so. One appointee recently said he would not have certified the vote totals in 2020. Imagine openly admitting you would ignore the will of the voters!

At the beginning of this year we talked about our top goals for 2022. One of these goals was ensuring that Michiganders and people across the country know the truth about our fair and secure election process.

This is an opportunity to make progress on this goal, friend.

I will be working hard to ensure that our election process is safe from these nefarious actors and you can help, too. Start paying attention to who is on your local canvassing board and having conversations with your friends and family about how to end election conspiracies in your community.
Protecting our elections this year will take unceasing effort. But it is work that we are proud to do.

Thanks for your time, friend, and I look forward to continuing this work with you.
Onward,

Jocelyn

One of these goals was ensuring that Michiganders and people across the country know the truth about our fair and secure election process. This is an opportunity to make progress on this goal, friend. I will be working hard to ensure that our election process is safe from these nefarious actors and you can help, too. Start paying attention to who is on your local canvassing board and having conversations with your friends and family about how to end election conspiracies in your community. Protecting our elections this year will take unceasing effort. But it is work that we are proud to do. Thanks for your time, friend, and I look forward to continuing this work with you. Onward, Jocelyn To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: Paid for by Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State PO Box 21368 Detroit, MI 48221 United States

Big things are happening on Capitol Hill, Peter. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41440179/328819519/1300596418?refcode=220204_FR_congressionalunions
_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkMDRiZTU2LTA3ODYtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=K_jFvqxWSWISOlozFWVsPQQ15SZdIWY5WVgiVRRYgPg=) According to Bloomberg, members of congress are petitioning to form a union which would give legislative employees collective bargaining power for protection with diversity, Covid-19 protocols, sexual harassment, and low pay.

Some of these members are getting paid as low as $29,000 annually to live and work in D.C., one of the most expensive cities in the United States of America.

Democratic leaders, like Pelosi and Schumer, are *finally* publicly stating their support for this because they are finally feeling the pressure to care for our Party’s own workers.

When we give workers— including political workers— the opportunity to unionize and make liveable wages, we provide critical tools for people in a system that already favors the elite. When we recognize that people without college degrees from private colleges, too, can work in politics, that means our policies have to change with it.

Republican leaders will try to shut this down— it’s just what they do. Now more than ever, it’s critical Democrats can hold the House to pass key legislation centered around protecting workers.

If we don’t win in 2022 – if we lose the Senate and the House – we’re forfeiting so many opportunities that are starting to come to fruition in Washington. I hope you realize how big of a moment this is, Peter. **[We’re going to get democrats elected across the country to make sure that this bill is the first of many that supports equal opportunity for all. name: Susan Wild
subject: my opponent is proud to be anti-choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
It’s clear that my opponent would be another rubber stamp for their dangerous anti-choice agenda.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440224/328819732/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220204-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2Mjk5Ny0wNzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wM-H_TqEslgiBkAWgKqK-kU22GVPFOqszYJV2DeOFQc=)
---
| Peter,

There’s a lot that separates me from the multiple far-right candidates trying to take my place in Congress, and I’m very proud of these differences.

For example, one of my opponents proudly shared this week that he **“earned a 100% rating from the Pennsylvania Pro-Life Federation PAC.”** This could not be more different from my 100% rating from NARAL Pro-Choice, a rating which I am honored to hold.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440225/328819733/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220204-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg2Mjk5Ny0wNzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wM-H_TqEslgiBkAWgKqK-kU22GVPFOqszYJV2DeOFQc=)
---
**If Republicans win back the House in 2022, they have promised to do all they can to restrict reproductive rights and ban abortion entirely — and it’s clear that my opponent would be another rubber stamp for their dangerous anti-choice agenda.**

Everyone deserves to make their own decisions about their health and future. We must come together to protect access to safe and legal abortion. If bowing to China was a sport, the International Olympic Committee (IOC) would get the gold medal. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f56c2adbab644b0b8b2cbfd826816592&_e=W1zeNdjrRQz5jZQS83rcDxdC7RPIp_3iOus8UhLj-mnpt0ruj9yyvaCnZgnh10qAqpGSjUwH0hRJGPGnqTjNnaKkxtXHxrAKsfeM8dzBRs9HIuwP_uG4jyZTetquLuVYQx3bEXH7xVo2J_rPtHIgV-jBz7CSq1m3YZT_xpeAsXuprJIyXQ-WLlCEkBL88K2LrkfXk5Qbz0-U09A-Um-k6Cnpp5k6wCA64ytfnujOVOxc4HNseOFF-gS9YQM4FsK8hNrlt9S0b3zIlf_5V56jLvynexUyLfx378DQtro8VPZk5NdNyLbntebvtuEXAvBSlx7Sct-0y6rIJ9QcYgS0hQMKjAOsxe7ASh0i1X82g6S3B4nnJTRwVp9b3Qal6ZnPGXExathWeuspiNQu3QpyfRUtxZ9ss_6_Tl_LZdRtS-k%3D) Peter, **If bowing to China was a sport, the International Olympic Committee (IOC) would get the gold medal. ** Olympic opening ceremonies are supposed to bring the world together in a spirit of unity to welcome athletes to the world’s top stage. _But tonight’s ceremony in Beijing will be overshadowed by China’s human rights abuses and the IOC’s compliance with Peng Shuai’s disappearance at the hands of the Chinese Communist Party._
We can’t ignore these abuses. That’s why Mike is leading the fight to sanction top IOC officials, [_**and there’s no better time to stand with him than right now.**_](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f56c2adbab644b0b8b2cbfd826816592&_e=W1zeNdjrRQz5jZQS83rcDxdC7RPIp_3iOus8UhLj-mnpt0ruj9yyvaCnZgnh10qAqpGSjUwH0hRJGPGnqTjNnaKkxtXHxrAKsfeM8dzBRs9HIuwP_uG4jyZTetquLuVYQx3bEXH7xVo2J_rPtHIgV-jBz7CSq1m3YZT_xpeAsXuprJIyXQ-WLlCEkBL88K2LrkfXk5Qbz0-U09A-Um-k6OVEbJZG-J_v0a4Pdo3B01NzBYgaqU98PFcIUDLjByFA0xJF7cChb_DEsoeMTPtYdEA4OsVuPMBhwqJAd18Hxur4oaizGkTKxgvZwvU9UF_gGkrcZDa4W2PUfVcV2hSWJdYhh1HqSHkkFqwaaRU34uipxhdJSAONsddso19kQEI_4IgDOH0QPUAuh_12gBQXbh_7G_AZ3M4m6C4Kbrx4Z0k%3D) [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f56c2adbab644b0b8b2cbfd826816592&_e=W1zeNdjrRQz5jZQS83rcDxdC7RPIp_3iOus8UhLj-mnpt0ruj9yyvaCnZgnh10qAqpGSjUwH0hRJGPGnqTjNnaKkxtXHxrAKsfeM8dzBRs9HIuwP_uG4jyZTetquLuVYQx3bEXH7xVo2J_rPtHIgV-jBz7CSq1m3YZT_xpeAsXuprJIyXQ-WLlCEkBL88K2LrkfXk5Qbz0-U09A-Um-k6ED8FSJeLGG0jKugn9L4ltl7XS3rfu-S1jcn1nY9Ye2SVmJDWqHt-fXZEwO43GbLzIUxna065EwvN-8t4gsTBzugTgAUe7OmY3hdm7OvJO3JvBkVWIWABiaETP2eve1xnjf1dD1903MB7Yf-OG1Pi9ZcuoG2MjZndyN3UiblrzSdZcVUCrLBKZgoAvcwbyXe7i6bx6um4ROftFLhK2jGVRU%3D) [**I AGREE: THESE ACTIONS CAN’T GO UNPUNISHED**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f56c2adbab644b0b8b2cbfd826816592&_e=W1zeNdjrRQz5jZQS83rcDxdC7RPIp_3iOus8UhLj-mnpt0ruj9yyvaCnZgnh10qAqpGSjUwH0hRJGPGnqTjNnaKkxtXHxrAKsfeM8dzBRs9HIuwP_uG4jyZTetquLuVYQx3bEXH7xVo2J_rPtHIgV-jBz7CSq1m3YZT_xpeAsXuprJIyXQ-WLlCEkBL88K2LrkfXk5Qbz0-U09A-Um-k6PL28iEoqpiVK4OiIXFS72Ayth7EeiwVSxTdErJMCd2_WGumyW1av8ei4QEGiqnNab0lrfrOMYq7HEymYGXazD_fLdEgiutgURQZq5z8ajWwVlCZv8ViFijb26WysbVX0oKV_Z1-e0F_XpotHuI20KVbAHrJAyBrERxltJMGZjvg9OzX048kUhDq_doPuS9-wMG3YXgxf6yjlRv2A29YxqY%3D) Peter, it’s not just Peng Shuai who’s facing danger. Athletes from all over the world are being warned to stay silent on China’s ongoing genocide against the Uyghur’s. _Why?_ Because the IOC has proven it will side with the Chinese Communist Party over athletes.
**China will open the Olympics with a barrage of communist propaganda and whitewashing, so****[ _let’s take a stand for the safety of our athletes_](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f56c2adbab644b0b8b2cbfd826816592&_e=W1zeNdjrRQz5jZQS83rcDxdC7RPIp_3iOus8UhLj-mnpt0ruj9yyvaCnZgnh10qAqpGSjUwH0hRJGPGnqTjNnaKkxtXHxrAKsfeM8dzBRs9HIuwP_uG4jyZTetquLuVYQx3bEXH7xVo2J_rPtHIgV-jBz7CSq1m3YZT_xpeAsXuprJIyXQ-WLlCEkBL88K2LrkfXk5Qbz0-U09A-Um-k6L1YnNHxzISJwCDtevM2y8agHWjOgdSiPKAF7EJ-hCzG-znUPW7_U3iuniTikT8jE6Z1QjXVCquXnLnfVDX9vHYactR_jdnv9eiBqxvTuOhYgFQBAxk29DlUNNoTjNQvsNjTT_ZcCg8RhSXI5VIuDcKgUeNaAcV6SM7wNM0G1zHjEGo8QZFbyP8mV6W82e-eN75GMEkLhNxpnUTg6Pbm3IU%3D).** [**STAND WITH MIKE: SANCTION THE IOC**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=f56c2adbab644b0b8b2cbfd826816592&_e=W1zeNdjrRQz5jZQS83rcDxdC7RPIp_3iOus8UhLj-mnpt0ruj9yyvaCnZgnh10qAqpGSjUwH0hRJGPGnqTjNnaKkxtXHxrAKsfeM8dzBRs9HIuwP_uG4jyZTetquLuVYQx3bEXH7xVo2J_rPtHIgV-jBz7CSq1m3YZT_xpeAsXuprJIyXQ-WLlCEkBL88K2LrkfXk5Qbz0-U09A-Um-k6EiN2NyjP9jW7X6k8-XrySzTdnRqfxgy3hySM9BpPVTDbjMfV0MbsGPobJKhPvslJcUDF1O4YqKjSISfkLLnDzaDGu6wq1OteYKNFuC-MP1VTwSxq-u6ge7JdBYkpXmcEzKS_BjlNWhlZ7HS2kau3buFMkGO7OlJXny7-Zh8ODQqUarCSn7nftdxyF9emcjHZ0XMJfoj83KCsYDFecxiDyo%3D) Team Gallagher | |

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Winning in Ohio is our only path forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ][IMG]

Hi there,

Political experts across the board agree that expanding our Democratic
Senate majority hinges on flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. That’s
why I’m reaching out to you on behalf of my friend Tim Ryan.

Tim’s in a tight, single-digit race that’s already being flooded with
millions of GOP dollars in support of his far-right opponents. He needs
your help right now to fight back and rapidly respond to their deceitful
attacks.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6888?t=1007&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Friends, I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $25 to Tim’s
campaign so he’ll have the resources to win in Ohio and expand our
Democratic Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1014&amount=25&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1015&amount=50&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1016&amount=100&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1017&amount=200&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1018&amount=250&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1019&amount=25&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Other Amount

With a 50/50 Senate, we have no room for error if we want to hold and
expand our Democratic Senate majority. I’ll be blunt: losing in Ohio just
isn’t an option.

Tim was called “Democrats' most important candidate in 2022” for a reason.
Our path to protecting voting rights, codifying Roe v. Wade into law, and
investing in hardworking families depends on what happens in Ohio.

We know that if Mitch McConnell takes back the gavel, he’ll obstruct our
priorities and stop progress in the Senate altogether. Republicans are
even admitting that to the press.

As a Senator, I can’t sit back and let the chamber be taken hostage by the
GOP—expanding our Democratic Senate majority is the only path forward.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6888?t=1008&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Friends, if you want to defend the Senate majority for
Democrats and protect our country from the GOP’s extremist agenda, then
the most important thing you can do right now is make a donation to help
Tim Ryan in his Ohio Senate race →

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1020&amount=25&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1021&amount=50&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1012&amount=250&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6846?t=1013&amount=25&akid=2166%2E3611125%2EF19jQh ]Other Amount

Together,

Kirsten Gillibrand
Senator, New York

[**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440440/328820782/1129282168?refcode=20220204_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNjZGI0Ni0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8ea_XSlXD4VVCZQqG9eV2Xrg0iRkk7yq6KrTRHWqxA=) I’m running for Congress -- because Republican Congressman Don Bacon has proven time and again that he’s out of touch with working families like mine. [**My race is one of the most flippable seats in the country. But winning hinges on having the resources to reach as many voters as possible. And right now I’m trailing behind my opponent’s $977,000 fundraising lead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440442/328820784/1129282168?refcode=20220204_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNjZGI0Ni0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8ea_XSlXD4VVCZQqG9eV2Xrg0iRkk7yq6KrTRHWqxA=) [**_Put plainly, we’re behind in fundraising, and it’s going to take a lot of grassroots support to catch up. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10 \-- or whatever you can spare -- before midnight to put working families first and unseat Bacon. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440444/328820786/1129282168?refcode=20220204_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNjZGI0Ni0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8ea_XSlXD4VVCZQqG9eV2Xrg0iRkk7yq6KrTRHWqxA=) I’ll be blunt. Unlike many in Congress, I know what it’s like to struggle. That’s why I fight so hard for working families every single day. While I was out in my community raising funds for families in need early in the pandemic, Bacon was playing politics in Washington. While thousands of Americans were suffering financially, Bacon voted against Covid relief and lowering the cost of prescription drugs. I’m running to finally put our families first. But to be honest, I can’t afford to bankroll my own campaign. [**If we’re going to win -- and prove that everyday people deserve to be in the halls of Congress -- I’m going to need a whole lot of grassroots support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440445/328820788/1129282168?refcode=20220204_em_fr_b1_tony_30_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWNjZGI0Ni0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y8ea_XSlXD4VVCZQqG9eV2Xrg0iRkk7yq6KrTRHWqxA=) [**_I need to raise 364 gifts before midnight to counter Bacon’s massive warchest. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. clean_body: Why we need more everyday people like me in Congress... | | | I need you to read this: = I became an Omaha Public Schools Board Member to strengthen our public schools -- because I wanted to give students opportunities I never had. = I became a state legislator and secured over $6 million for public health funding -- because I believe healthcare should be accessible to all. = I’m running for Congress -- because Republican Congressman Don Bacon has proven time and again that he’s out of touch with working families like mine. = = I’ll be blunt. Unlike many in Congress, I know what it’s like to struggle. That’s why I fight so hard for working families every single day. While I was out in my community raising funds for families in need early in the pandemic, Bacon was playing politics in Washington. While thousands of Americans were suffering financially, Bacon voted against Covid relief and lowering the cost of prescription drugs. I’m running to finally put our families first. But to be honest, I can’t afford to bankroll my own campaign. = = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Tony | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

body:
https://www.delinadisanto.com/ [https://www.delinadisanto.com/]Hi Friend,
We just want to make sure that you saw Delina's announcement from yesterday ⬇️⬇️.
Basically, Arizona's new Congressional map means Delina now lives in AZ-01. So, instead of running against far-right extremist Paul Gosar, she'll be running against a Republican who is just as bad ... David Schweikert.
However, with your help, we can stand up to far-right extremists like Schweikert! Can we count on your support with a simple donation? [secure.actblue.com/donate/delina-disanto-for-congress-1?refcode=X_020422_AZ-01_ReUp]
Thanks,
- Team Delina
---------- Forwarded messaged ----------
Today, I'm officially announcing that I'll be running for the Democratic nomination in Arizona's 1st Congressional district against Republican David Schweikert.
When I first decided to run for Congress, I was ready to unseat Paul Gosar, who is – in no uncertain terms – an election-denying, insurrection-embracing, Proud-Boy-coddling extremist. However , under Arizona's new Congressional map, my home is now firmly in AZ-01... which means I'll be running against David Schweikert.
While Schweikert gets less media attention for his extremism, his voting record is nearly identical to Gosar's. That's a BIG problem for me and the community that I've proudly called home for the last 18 years.
Will you help me take on Schweikert and stand up to the far-right extremism that's plaguing our country? Even a $5 donation helps me out! [secure.actblue.com/donate/delina-disanto-for-congress-1?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01]
secure.actblue.com/donate/delina-disanto-for-congress-1?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01 [secure.actblue.com/donate/delina-disanto-for-congress-1?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01]As a registered nurse, I understand the struggle that many Americans face on a daily basis. That's why, as AZ-01's next Representative, I will focus on key issues like fighting for healthcare everyone can afford, tackling climate change, and protecting women's reproductive rights.
Now, to keep advocating for working families in Arizona, I need your help.
Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can today? [secure.actblue.com/donate/delina-disanto-for-congress-1?refcode=X_020322_AZ-01]

name: Jessica Semachko, Tom Perez for Maryland
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 4th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 4th, 2022**
Peter,
This week we were so excited to announce that former Baltimore City Councilwoman Shannon Sneed has joined Tom as his running mate! Like Tom, Shannon has dedicated her life to jobs and justice. She is tenacious, battle-tested, and ready to hit the ground running.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440682/328821746/-2071248755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
You can watch our announcement video **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440683/328821747/-2071248755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837).**
As we continue to grow our powerful grassroots movement across the state, we are glad to have Shannon join our team. You can read more about Shannon and our announcement in **[The Baltimore Sun](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440684/328821748/1505916421?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)** , the **[Washington Post](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440686/328821750/-1618771450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)** , and **[Maryland Matters](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440687/328821751/-1504839702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**.
Many thanks,
Jessica Semachko
Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440688/328821752/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
On Thursday, Tom announced that Shannon Sneed would be joining our team as his running mate! Marylanders deserve a leader who has a proven track record of getting things done for working families. Shannon is a transformational leader who has been a true champion for communities across Baltimore. We are honored to have her serve as Tom’s partner as they work to create a better Maryland.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440690/328821753/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Yesterday, Shannon and Tom traveled from East to West Baltimore meeting Marylanders and sharing their vision of bringing jobs and justice to the city, and to our state. Their first stop was at Kay’s Diner, a newly renovated restaurant in Wyman Park with a great menu and atmosphere that helps to create a thriving community.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440691/328821755/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
As the District 13 Baltimore City Councilmember, Shannon worked hard to secure funding to invest in her community. Tom was proud to see the results of her hard work first hand including the revival of Bocek Community Center, which had been closed for over 20 years.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440692/328821756/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
The Perez Sneed administration will make supporting local businesses and aspiring entrepreneurs a top priority. Later in the day, they visited Northeast Market where they visited with small business owners to learn more about what support they need in order to continue to grow and thrive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440693/328821757/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Shannon is a proud graduate of both the University of Maryland, Eastern Shore – where she became a soror of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc. – and Morgan State University. Tom was proud to walk through Morgan State University’s campus alongside Shannon. They even got to visit with her AKA sorors!
The Perez Sneed Administration is committed to ensuring our HBCUs receive the overdue investments that they need to thrive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440694/328821758/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
It's always a great day when you get to see the hard working state employees from AFSCME! Thank you AFSCME members and MSU workers for stopping by to visit with Shannon and Tom and for ensuring all Maryland campuses are healthy and safe.
* * *
**In the News**
**[Tom Perez Hopes to Transform State Government into a Force for Good](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440695/328821760/1740150806?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“People have run out of time, they’ve run out of patience, they’ve run out of money,” Perez, who is 60, said in an interview outside a coffee shop in Baltimore. “We need somebody who will approach every single day with that sense of urgency.”_
**[Tom Perez names former Baltimore City councilwoman Shannon Sneed as running mate in Maryland governor’s race](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440697/328821761/-1618771450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“When it came to selecting a lieutenant governor to join the ticket, I knew that Marylanders deserve a leader who has dedicated their life to jobs and justice and has a proven track record of getting things done for working families,” Perez said in a statement._
**[Maryland gubernatorial hopeful Tom Perez picks former Baltimore councilwoman Shannon Sneed as running mate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440698/328821762/1505916421?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“I believe my work and my life experiences have prepared me for this moment to lead,” Sneed, 41, said in a statement issued by the campaign. Sneed said she and Perez discussed the opportunity for months, eventually forging “a strong partnership.”_
**[Perez picks Sneed, former Baltimore City councilmember, as his running mate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440736/328821763/-1125371040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“During her time on the city council, Sneed spearheaded legislation that kept city employees, such as janitors, food servers and security guards, from losing their jobs on short notice when their job contracts changed. Under this law, an incoming city contractor is required to retain the existing workforce for at least 90 days.”_
**[Maryland’s Tom Perez picks Shannon Sneed for running mate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41440738/328821806/1206220006?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWRhZGVmZS0wOTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nayCdI2RMj91r9RqpxeUhpuygLQsAPNbmMSISeLonxQ=&emci=e8ee24cd-0186-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=09dadefe-0986-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)**
_“She understands the struggles of Marylanders because as someone who grew up in a single-parent family, she endured those struggles,” Perez, a Democrat, said. “She has worked directly in her community to lift up those in need and expand access to opportunity, and I know she will be a tremendous partner as we work to create a Maryland that works for everyone.”_

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 4th, 2022 Peter, This week we were so excited to announce that former Baltimore City Councilwoman Shannon Sneed has joined Tom as his running mate! Like Tom, Shannon has dedicated her life to jobs and justice. She is tenacious, battle-tested, and ready to hit the ground running. You can watch our announcement video . As we continue to grow our powerful grassroots movement across the state, we are glad to have Shannon join our team. You can read more about Shannon and our announcement in , the , and . Many thanks, Jessica Semachko Campaign Manager Tom Perez for Maryland On the Campaign Trail On Thursday, Tom announced that Shannon Sneed would be joining our team as his running mate! Marylanders deserve a leader who has a proven track record of getting things done for working families. Shannon is a transformational leader who has been a true champion for communities across Baltimore. We are honored to have her serve as Tom’s partner as they work to create a better Maryland. Yesterday, Shannon and Tom traveled from East to West Baltimore meeting Marylanders and sharing their vision of bringing jobs and justice to the city, and to our state. Their first stop was at Kay’s Diner, a newly renovated restaurant in Wyman Park with a great menu and atmosphere that helps to create a thriving community. As the District 13 Baltimore City Councilmember, Shannon worked hard to secure funding to invest in her community. Tom was proud to see the results of her hard work first hand including the revival of Bocek Community Center, which had been closed for over 20 years. The Perez Sneed administration will make supporting local businesses and aspiring entrepreneurs a top priority. Later in the day, they visited Northeast Market where they visited with small business owners to learn more about what support they need in order to continue to grow and thrive. Shannon is a proud graduate of both the University of Maryland, Eastern Shore – where she became a soror of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc. – and Morgan State University. Tom was proud to walk through Morgan State University’s campus alongside Shannon. They even got to visit with her AKA sorors! The Perez Sneed Administration is committed to ensuring our HBCUs receive the overdue investments that they need to thrive. It's always a great day when you get to see the hard working state employees from AFSCME! Thank you AFSCME members and MSU workers for stopping by to visit with Shannon and Tom and for ensuring all Maryland campuses are healthy and safe. In the News “People have run out of time, they’ve run out of patience, they’ve run out of money,” Perez, who is 60, said in an interview outside a coffee shop in Baltimore. “We need somebody who will approach every single day with that sense of urgency.” “When it came to selecting a lieutenant governor to join the ticket, I knew that Marylanders deserve a leader who has dedicated their life to jobs and justice and has a proven track record of getting things done for working families,” Perez said in a statement. “I believe my work and my life experiences have prepared me for this moment to lead,” Sneed, 41, said in a statement issued by the campaign. Sneed said she and Perez discussed the opportunity for months, eventually forging “a strong partnership.” “During her time on the city council, Sneed spearheaded legislation that kept city employees, such as janitors, food servers and security guards, from losing their jobs on short notice when their job contracts changed. Under this law, an incoming city contractor is required to retain the existing workforce for at least 90 days.” “She understands the struggles of Marylanders because as someone who grew up in a single-parent family, she endured those struggles,” Perez, a Democrat, said. “She has worked directly in her community to lift up those in need and expand access to opportunity, and I know she will be a tremendous partner as we work to create a Maryland that works for everyone.” Social Media Action Alert! We are so excited to share the growth of our grassroots movement, but we need YOUR help to spread the word! Volunteer with us! Saturdays, 11:00 AM | Mondays, 6:00 PM Virtual Please contact Esther at esther@tomperez.com with any questions. Schedule of Events Thursday, February 10 | 6:00 PM Virtual Hosted by Senator Cory McCray, Councilman Ryan Dorsey, Mary Pat Clarke, Carol Beck, Sarah Bur, Dan McCarthy & Terry Staudenmaier, and Vinny DeMarco Tuesday, February 22 | 6:00 PM Ruxton, MD Hosted by Meg & Harry Ferguson Wednesday, February 23 | 7:30 PM Bethesda, MD Hosted by George Cohen Sunday, March 6 | 2:00 PM Frederick, MD Hosted by Tom Slater, Melanie Galloway, Dr. Syed Haque, Dr. Shahid Rafiq, and Marcie Roth Saturday, March 12 | 5:30 PM Eastern Kabob, Gaithersburg, MD Hosted by the Bangladeshi American Council Wednesday, March 30 | 6 PM Virtual Hosted by Bruce Cohen ** Wednesday, April 27 | 6:00 PM Potomac, MD Hosted by Barbara Goldberg Goldman & Michael Goldman Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer. Tom Perez for Maryland PO BOX 5389 TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389 United States

| | | This is appalling – Donald Trump admitted that his goal on January 6, 2021 was to overthrow the election. Trump suggests Pence should have 'overturned' 2020 election -ABC News Enough is enough. Trump must be held accountable for his attempt to steal the election. Our democracy depends on it. We need Attorney General Merrick Garland to pursue criminal charges immediately. On top of that, Trump said that if he ran for president again and won in 2024, he would pardon the insurrectionists who stormed the Capitol. We can’t let Trump walk free. Let’s show Merrick Garland he has our support to prosecute Donald Trump. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zappd0qpc7qrsst3vvedba1dvr8r2opkeeeir218_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1i6co70cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1gecq6aspgc1i3dd3gs4rbfcdjejj3dcjkelij0o9ichon8d9jc2obatljm9oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applm1g7cor66pjj6p77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0ao0asm6fu210gp634n8p76qnfmijs2pdk9eoto_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1i6co70cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5j6draqarbugvkvqsdblhi47a6m8d28796v12d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1i6co70cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4otenf2vhbj3jj5f912qk39toie4q9lq8qfgjqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c1i6co70cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Holly McCormack
subject: The GOP is getting out of hand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,
Team Holly.

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, we know we are stronger as a team. That’s why we’re asking you to help us MATCH | BREAKING: $50,000 of Attack Ads Launched Fellow Conservative - I'll be quick because I wanted to share some breaking news... We learned that $50,000 in online attack ads were launched against our campaign. Yes, you read that right - $50,000 in digital ads! This comes just a week after finding out that our Democrat opponent has $23 million in the bank. Can you imagine the attack ads that will be coming our way over the next 9 months? Fellow Conservative, we know we are stronger as a team. That's why we're asking you to help us MATCH the amount being spent against us in this first barrage of attacks. We appreciate the support that so many patriots have already provided since we launched Team Herschel in late August. Recent polls confirm the race is a dead heat, but we must make sure we have the funds to talk directly to the people of Georgia and set the record straight. Help us FIGHT BACK. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Session Update Jan 2022 Week 4
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 4
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live work and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for you in Richmond. We are getting after it!
---
| "Predator Protection Act"
---
|
---
| Success: Our bill to repeal the Predator Protection Act HB257 with Senate amendments, which allowed the Loudon County school board to try to cover up sexual battery of a child, just passed the floor 59-40 and is headed to the Senate. Our children are number one and it is unconscionable to think that school administrators should sweep this conduct under the rug, instead of informing parents and law enforcement. This bill eliminates the egregious senate amendments from last year, which ended mandatory reporting of sexual battery, stalking, and abduction in schools to police..
---
| Mask Optional?
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Faa7o27oEUj2myaB9Co6p8a8BR_csAXofRcZdQbyd29IpUZXqNsln1aVCOJWtMiU-9RE2MoPRUDrbcQo2uXcikUfh7F6MyW2x5q8CvM-9JJIAHSFYZ7PhaqDAsA-4qxiShEJxpbuvYQZt_tNx4vXulAiIgL_CE-cXrqteZkYxd13QOrXJNe3fGW9xDlW6FShauEFVZmz2uAc0RlvFO1x4eI1Ke1RmCVOYuXByNYH-2CaX_6JSdaijg==&c=_SexaTvQ9ixJHLen0Il1vZsRYEs-vhKM2fQPhAdsVfPKGYeFym3Abg==&ch=CJT8RxrtlbLqlTh8vFJBSaxx4O-q0NSr3HHkngnu9aJxSBMZWIXBYQ==)
---
| Parent choice: More and more school systems in Virginia are getting on board with parental choice and executive order No. 2 to make masks optional in schools. An Arlington county judge heard arguments on both sides in a law suit which the schools filed against Youngkin. She said she would issue a ruling soon.
Click this interactive [NBC 12 link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Faa7o27oEUj2myaB9Co6p8a8BR_csAXofRcZdQbyd29IpUZXqNsln1aVCOJWtMiU-9RE2MoPRUDrbcQo2uXcikUfh7F6MyW2x5q8CvM-9JJIAHSFYZ7PhaqDAsA-4qxiShEJxpbuvYQZt_tNx4vXulAiIgL_CE-cXrqteZkYxd13QOrXJNe3fGW9xDlW6FShauEFVZmz2uAc0RlvFO1x4eI1Ke1RmCVOYuXByNYH-2CaX_6JSdaijg==&c=_SexaTvQ9ixJHLen0Il1vZsRYEs-vhKM2fQPhAdsVfPKGYeFym3Abg==&ch=CJT8RxrtlbLqlTh8vFJBSaxx4O-q0NSr3HHkngnu9aJxSBMZWIXBYQ==) to track Virginia mask mandates by school district.
---
|
Capitol Commission Bible Study
---
|
---
| Pastor David Anderson and his wife hold a "Capitol Commission" Bible Study every Thursday morning at 7am on the sixth floor of the General Assembly building. They stopped by my office to pray for Virginia.
---
| 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION

Bills:

* [HB 59](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Faa7o27oEUj2myaB9Co6p8a8BR_csAXofRcZdQbyd29IpUZXqNsln8Fbmb7LwlJTYFJKBCDAZvaCz4XVGL_Rq_UZxpppU3V43HArBW22qw2WNc6noGEfeE6YQLXZiZxqSKTx4cEQaPYDeGiOwvp64znMWQOwKJsVGsWDSigeAo-FqMce87-FryuvbKWXdICdIcrhNEzyuBY=&c=_SexaTvQ9ixJHLen0Il1vZsRYEs-vhKM2fQPhAdsVfPKGYeFym3Abg==&ch=CJT8RxrtlbLqlTh8vFJBSaxx4O-q0NSr3HHkngnu9aJxSBMZWIXBYQ==)[ Repeals House Bill 257 (Predator Protection Act).](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Faa7o27oEUj2myaB9Co6p8a8BR_csAXofRcZdQbyd29IpUZXqNsln8Fbmb7LwlJTYFJKBCDAZvaCz4XVGL_Rq_UZxpppU3V43HArBW22qw2WNc6noGEfeE6YQLXZiZxqSKTx4cEQaPYDeGiOwvp64znMWQOwKJsVGsWDSigeAo-FqMce87-FryuvbKWXdICdIcrhNEzyuBY=&c=_SexaTvQ9ixJHLen0Il1vZsRYEs-vhKM2fQPhAdsVfPKGYeFym3Abg==&ch=CJT8RxrtlbLqlTh8vFJBSaxx4O-q0NSr3HHkngnu9aJxSBMZWIXBYQ==) This bill was rolled into HB4 and passed passed the floor 59-40. ---
|

|

---
|

---
| Appomattox County
---
|
---

| Bridgewater College Shooting
---
|
---
| Our hearts go out to Bridgewater College. Please pray for the families of the two officers, campus safety Officer J.J Jefferson, left, and campus police Officer John Painter, who were killed in the line of duty, as well as the students and staff of Bridgewater College. We are thankful for the many men and women in law enforcement, who risk their lives every day in order to keep us safe.
---
| THANK YOU!
---
| I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness.
I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056.

clean_body: | | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 4 | VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner) | | The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates. | We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live work and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for you in Richmond. We are getting after it! | "Predator Protection Act" | | Success: Our bill to repeal the Predator Protection Act HB257 with Senate amendments, which allowed the Loudon County school board to try to cover up sexual battery of a child, just passed the floor 59-40 and is headed to the Senate. Our children are number one and it is unconscionable to think that school administrators should sweep this conduct under the rug, instead of informing parents and law enforcement. This bill eliminates the egregious senate amendments from last year, which ended mandatory reporting of sexual battery, stalking, and abduction in schools to police.. | Mask Optional? | == | Parent choice: More and more school systems in Virginia are getting on board with parental choice and executive order No. 2 to make masks optional in schools. An Arlington county judge heard arguments on both sides in a law suit which the schools filed against Youngkin. She said she would issue a ruling soon. Click this interactive == to track Virginia mask mandates by school district. | Capitol Commission Bible Study | | Pastor David Anderson and his wife hold a "Capitol Commission" Bible Study every Thursday morning at 7am on the sixth floor of the General Assembly building. They stopped by my office to pray for Virginia. | 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION Bills: == This bill was rolled into HB4 and passed passed the floor 59-40. Now headed to the senate. == This bill passed the floor 99-0. Please pray for the families of the two officers, campus safety Officer J.J Jefferson, left, and campus police Officer John Painter, who were killed in the line of duty, as well as the students and staff of Bridgewater College. We are thankful for the many men and women in law enforcement, who risk their lives every day in order to keep us safe. | THANK YOU! | I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056. | | | | | God Bless, Delegate John McGuire Virginia House District 56 900 East Main Street Pocahontas Building, Suite E213 Richmond, VA 23219 Phone: 804-698-1056 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA | | | STAY CONNECTED | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, 11357 Nuckols Road # 156, Glen Allen, VA 23059 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

>
In Texas’ 28th District, Jessica Cisneros is running to ensure every person has quality health care, bring jobs back to her community, and restore humanity and justice to our broken immigration system. She knows that when progressives are unapologetic about our values and who we’re in this battle for, we win.
And Greg Casar, a former labor organizer, is running in Texas’ 35th District. He’s always put working families first, and Congress needs his voice — along with his bold vision for Medicare for All, protecting reproductive rights, and standing up to corporate special interests.
**Jessica and Greg will be fantastic additions to Congress, because they’ll bring the type of progressive voices we need for our future.**
I’m also particularly fired up about their races because Texas will always have a special place in my heart. It’s where I got my second chance at college, for $50 a semester at the University of Houston (go Cougars!). It’s where my Aunt Bee rescued me by moving to help with child care. It’s where I started teaching Sunday School and bankruptcy law, and it’s where I started studying how our economy lays traps for working people.
In Texas, I saw what can happen when a person has a fighting chance to build something real. I saw how we can lift each other up. And I saw what we’re up against: a system where the rules are tilted to benefit the wealthy and well-connected.
Texas — just like every state in our country — deserves progressive leadership that will fight for families, not on the side of big money and obstructionist Republicans. The people of Texas deserve to have Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar fighting for them in Congress.
**But first, we’ve got to make sure they win in the Texas primary on March 1 — and grassroots donations will help get out the vote to put them over the top.**
[_**With only 25 days left until the Texas primary election, will you split a $3 donation between Jessica Cisneros, Greg Casar, and our re-election campaign? It’s down to the wire, and every contribution goes a long way right now.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41441052/328822656/1036680770?refcode=EMZ3J_TAN_E_20220104_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTY3MTljNi0wYTg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nilY6JHEMUgo_yJludyZ1nQC9XufNu_xzFfmuDfNDnI=&emci=346719c6-0a86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=356719c6-0a86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Recall George Gascon
subject: At your front door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Support the Recall of District Attorney George Gascon
body:
Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3b014d0255c0434fb2e2931c788310a6&_e=oJa2ebWg1QiMjro8oLHM-z-roDHvrR6FGidaxNSxRMBg7WeQ3ZHc1wxy7O5oJ1IqG7OsabAnVivcSpHvnxdpAaMP3J1T_FSu0RG0dkiaQDLdE3vNQEfZN1gQewiGaTMLWUOnULkVgoTOJMGsFluTuqa-VNKdAh2QPwsWpRwNgcWdb9IKC4drCuhYzk6qc_ssHNyM2z_H3Hfg4TojoHEVPpDLtn04YKawYorkRa1_xKPq0vjpb0bKQA1-1S4en_54y284BydSfrTaacjq-PO5rZ324xSyRA6mAf1wfUkSuzUUO8JCo-pTjL8YYOjXgTXqVfEK0j8swjF4p_kKlycv4zZFkjIbkrarKmG_W-V-A713ABwETFSBqM4qFmubTo8ULOTRG676wsEKwXrrGzenOnY6bDGRg7m8PGM8lRKmjRdXWoxpN6U7Llrzzw_dJusp)
---
Peter,

People used to travel to Los Angeles to see Hollywood stars, beautiful beaches and an exciting, growing city. But that was then, and this is now...

What changed? Los Angeles County elected District Attorney George Gascón in 2020 and he has spent every day in office endangering the very residents that elected him.

Gascón has embraced radical, pro-criminal, anti-law endorsement policies to fulfill his dangerous ideology. His policies have ratcheted down punishment to its bare minimum and significantly reduced the prosecution of crime. _And what’s been the result?_

**Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime rates have skyrocketed.**

Instead of cops, Gascón wants social workers to calm down a bank robber or rapist. Then, instead of prison, he wants the criminals to get therapy instead of a cell.

George Gascón is redesigning the entire criminal justice system to the benefit of criminals at the expense of victims of the crime and at the expense of every resident in Los Angeles County.

[**We are officially circulating the petition to recall Los Angeles District Attorney George Gascón, but we need your immediate help.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3b014d0255c0434fb2e2931c788310a6&_e=oJa2ebWg1QiMjro8oLHM-z-roDHvrR6FGidaxNSxRMBg7WeQ3ZHc1wxy7O5oJ1IqG7OsabAnVivcSpHvnxdpAaMP3J1T_FSu0RG0dkiaQDLdE3vNQEfZN1gQewiGaTMLWUOnULkVgoTOJMGsFluTuqa-VNKdAh2QPwsWpRwNgcWdb9IKC4drCuhYzk6qc_ssHNyM2z_H3Hfg4TojoHEVPpDLtn04YKawYorkRa1_xKPWbll2ILpKhoA3kKqrVBV4PB3rNuJXG64KTn1aKqjNX834RGM2E6NYwi4AAhLZyoeCvq7WRFdV68_1cz4jI9R23D2vXs-HSuCIbT10btloxWuo9bqzyIDGUDlIEHKApFN8yJUem4L984ThNNcHWiKxoAiF1f44TG-rYvxlzR_ohwWv38Ov5jw_I87B42BwD0rf_RGc-Eztxg7DxSM80LYY) **We need to gather the signature of over half a MILLION registered voters in Los Angeles County, which will be no easy feat.** [**A contribution of $10 from you right now will help us print and distribute 20 petitions today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3b014d0255c0434fb2e2931c788310a6&_e=oJa2ebWg1QiMjro8oLHM-z-roDHvrR6FGidaxNSxRMBg7WeQ3ZHc1wxy7O5oJ1IqG7OsabAnVivcSpHvnxdpAaMP3J1T_FSu0RG0dkiaQDLdE3vNQEfZN1gQewiGaTMLWUOnULkVgoTOJMGsFluTuqa-VNKdAh2QPwsWpRwNgcWdb9IKC4drCuhYzk6qc_ssHNyM2z_H3Hfg4TojoHEVPpDLtn04YKawYorkRa1_xKMJXHvZna12VKpdss2gwirqYQoxjLbBfzdPA7d2rEHlZNWeKNgwcDBCHdz0zskg_iSL5VAkhnnOgw3TJG8SuB1QGAngMlhFiUumARW5WE0m61ncD-xGEGrpBJUNEMgJjdSse0xc5db9QZabY4zYb41t7_fH8EfgoKOZpbM7PCo3cdgLPmgdmlz6lWLUgwzmTd36lIOZDbdLP7IIYwJLcKgM)

We won’t ask for your help or a contribution without giving you the facts, Peter. This is why we’re asking you to fight with us: **Gascón’s policies have created a system that places the needs of convicted criminals over those of victims.**

Upon taking office in December of 2020, Gascón implemented several special directives for his prosecutors in the county to follow...
* Do not pursue the death penalty
* Prevent youth offenders from being tried as adults
* Almost entirely restrict the use of sentencing enhancements in cases

**More than 90% of narcotics involved cases taken to the Gascón’s Office this year have been rejected.**

In the first six months of 2021, over 5,900 of the cases brought to the DA’s office by the Los Angeles Sheriff's Department were rejected as a result of Gascón’s special directives.

We cannot afford to wait another two years to get George Gascón out of office. **The damage he has caused is extreme and in another two years, the damage may be irreversible.**

This is a fight worth investing in, Peter. subject: MI-07 is a “tossup”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220204&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220204&amount=28]
Team,
Elissa’s never had an easy race. She flipped Michigan’s 8th district in 2018 with a little over 13,000 votes and won in 2020 in a seat that voted for Trump – and 2022 is shaping up to be another tough fight.
We’ve told you before that Elissa is running in the most competitive House race in Michigan, and one of the most competitive races in the entire country. Let’s take a closer look at what that means.
The Cook Political Report has officially labeled this race a “toss up.” The scale goes from “likely GOP” to “lean GOP” to “toss up” and then back the other way to “likely Democrat.”
But, in 2020, President Biden won Michigan’s newly formed 7th district (where Elissa will be running for reelection) by less than 1 percentage point. While this new area is more rural, it still contains Michigan State University and Lansing Community College. That’s a lot of young voters, some of whom will be registering for the first time this year.
This is all to say, this race could go either way and the work we put in now will have tangible results in November. That’s why we can’t let off the gas for even a second. Will you chip in to help Elissa win this toss-up district? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220204&amount=28]

### **\- INDems Statement Celebrating Black History Month -**
Please read the following statement by Myla Eldridge, Indiana Democratic Party Vice Chair, celebrating the start of Black History Month: _“Today marks the start of Black History Month, an annual tradition that celebrates the contributions and successes of Black Americans. In my case, I take a moment to recognize the impact being a Black American has had on my life and so many in Indiana. I have had the honor to serve as the first Black person to hold the office of Marion County Clerk, and I’ve seen that the right to vote is one of the most precious and valuable rights in our American democracy._ _Black Americans advocated and fought for decades to be given the opportunity to cast their ballot in our nation’s free and fair election process. And as of today, this American right is being diminished in state legislatures across the nation, including right here in Indiana. House Bill 1116 would restrict voting rights in our state, and I urge all Hoosiers to do their part to call out this unjust and un-American culture war. It’s our patriotic duty to step up and protect the voices of those who so often are left behind._ _It’s encouraging to see the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus (IBLC) take action during the 2022 legislative session in the Indiana General Assembly to make Indiana a more equitable state for everyone. By introducing a new ‘economic empowerment’ agenda that includes securing affordable childcare services and higher education programs, the IBLC is continuing the process of creating a welcoming place for all Hoosiers – and not just a select few._ _Like the rest of the Indiana Democratic Party, the IBLC is looking to solve today’s kitchen table issues facing voters while also creating a better future for all Hoosier families. The Indiana Democratic Party hopes the rest of the Indiana General Assembly joins the IBLC in passing this important legislation so that all Hoosier families – especially Indiana’s Black and Brown communities – can thrive.”_
### **\- Halftime Score for 2022 Session: Indiana GOP Becomes the Culture War Party -**
It’s official: the Indiana Republican Party is the Culture War Party. We reached the halfway point of the 2022 legislative session, and the Indiana GOP has pushed an agenda that would further discredit the COVID-19 vaccine, put politics in classrooms, restrict a Hoosier’s ability to vote, attack innocent minors for playing the sports they love, and hand firearms to bad actors. In fact, the Indiana GOP’s culture war agenda has opposition from the state’s most influential communities - including the [Indiana Chamber of Commerce](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41441147/328823057/-1229153651?refcode=idp-em-220204-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTFkYjZmZC0wYjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFrBZNuRcwIRaTBITBk9M1HPYIO50398EB3Gtf3j06c=&emci=7917987d-fb85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=da1db6fd-0b86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=4925535), ### **\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Set to Begin -**
It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, [“The Hoosier Promise” ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41441153/328823063/-1920848487?refcode=idp-em-220204-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTFkYjZmZC0wYjg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFrBZNuRcwIRaTBITBk9M1HPYIO50398EB3Gtf3j06c=&emci=7917987d-fb85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=da1db6fd-0b86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=4925535)and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year.
### **\- Indiana Democratic Party Seeking Interns -**
The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. _Benefits_
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

_Intern Duties_ Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

_Qualifications_ Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

**_How to Apply_** Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org.
