clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- INDems Statement Celebrating Black History Month - Please read the following statement by Myla Eldridge, Indiana Democratic Party Vice Chair, celebrating the start of Black History Month: “Today marks the start of Black History Month, an annual tradition that celebrates the contributions and successes of Black Americans. In my case, I take a moment to recognize the impact being a Black American has had on my life and so many in Indiana. I have had the honor to serve as the first Black person to hold the office of Marion County Clerk, and I’ve seen that the right to vote is one of the most precious and valuable rights in our American democracy. Black Americans advocated and fought for decades to be given the opportunity to cast their ballot in our nation’s free and fair election process. And as of today, this American right is being diminished in state legislatures across the nation, including right here in Indiana. House Bill 1116 would restrict voting rights in our state, and I urge all Hoosiers to do their part to call out this unjust and un-American culture war. It’s our patriotic duty to step up and protect the voices of those who so often are left behind. It’s encouraging to see the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus (IBLC) take action during the 2022 legislative session in the Indiana General Assembly to make Indiana a more equitable state for everyone. By introducing a new ‘economic empowerment’ agenda that includes securing affordable childcare services and higher education programs, the IBLC is continuing the process of creating a welcoming place for all Hoosiers – and not just a select few. Like the rest of the Indiana Democratic Party, the IBLC is looking to solve today’s kitchen table issues facing voters while also creating a better future for all Hoosier families. The Indiana Democratic Party hopes the rest of the Indiana General Assembly joins the IBLC in passing this important legislation so that all Hoosier families – especially Indiana’s Black and Brown communities – can thrive.” \- Halftime Score for 2022 Session: Indiana GOP Becomes the Culture War Party - It’s official: the Indiana Republican Party is the Culture War Party. We reached the halfway point of the 2022 legislative session, and the Indiana GOP has pushed an agenda that would further discredit the COVID-19 vaccine, put politics in classrooms, restrict a Hoosier’s ability to vote, attack innocent minors for playing the sports they love, and hand firearms to bad actors. In fact, the Indiana GOP’s culture war agenda has opposition from the state’s most influential communities - including the , and the Here’s a look at the culture wars the Indiana Republican Party has prioritized during this year’s legislative session: House Bill 1001: Discredit the COVID-19 vaccine NOTE: opposes 1001 House Bill 1134/Senate Bill 167: Politicize classrooms NOTE: and Indiana Black Expo oppose 1134 House Bill 1041: Bully innocent minors NOTE: , have policies for transgender athletes House Bill 1077: Hand firearms to bad actors NOTE: Indiana State Police opposes 1077. House Bill 1116: Restrict access to vote \- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Set to Begin - It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year. \- Indiana Democratic Party Seeking Interns - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. \- Opportunities - \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Indianapolis - , 5:30 – 7pm EST \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Columbus - , 1 – 2:30pm EST \- Indiana Stonewall Democrats Community Fundraiser - , 6 - 8:00pm EST ### | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

subject: We’re the underdogs, but our momentum is building

Great news, Peter — **January was our best fundraising month of the campaign so far!**
And it couldn’t have come at a better time. Now that we’re fully in election year, my team is starting to lay the groundwork for field operations, digital advertising, and voter outreach — plans only made possible by our network of grassroots supporters.
[Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41430808/328775743/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204ty_DJM_op_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjliM2ZkMC1lMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZhIIaj2nuTlZx231fI50jEHxrvdBN5wos5SnbSjLQ1E=)
---
Look, there’s no way around it: we’re the underdogs in this race. Democrats haven’t won the governorship since 2006, and we’re up against a corporate-backed, deep-pocketed GOP party that will stop at nothing to consolidate power by fanning the flames of partisan divisiveness and suppressing the votes of Black, brown, and minority communities.
**But by building a wide coalition of Tennesseans who are ready for change — no matter where you were born, what zip code you live in, or what party you’ve voted for in the past — we can do this.**
Thank you for being a critical part of our movement to build a stronger, united Tennessee.
Dr. Jason Martin
P.S. One of the best ways to help us keep the momentum going is by setting up a recurring donation—[**if you’re able, will you sign up for a recurring donation of $10 every month from now until November 8?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41430809/328775744/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220204ty_DJM_op_xx_l1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjliM2ZkMC1lMjg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZhIIaj2nuTlZx231fI50jEHxrvdBN5wos5SnbSjLQ1E=)

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: We need a fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

I was born and raised in Florida, and I won’t lie to you — it’s been hell to watch what the state GOP has put our state through for the past few years, from restricting abortion to attacking voting rights.

And now, with our Congressional majority on the line in 2022, we could see the exact same thing happening at the national level.

We need a fighter, Peter — someone who will fight to protect our House majority, and someone who will never stop fighting to deliver results for our community, whoever ends up holding power in Washington.

This is a turning point for our state and our nation, and we need leaders in Washington who know how to fight and win, no matter the obstacles they face and no matter the partisan games Republicans play.

That’s what I’ve done in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do in Washington — fight, win, and deliver results. But first, I need your help to win this race. Can you chip in right now and join the fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=0204fr]

Thank you for being on my team.

Randolph Bracy

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/52f818f4-0386-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/d3f12cc7-0c86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2YxMmNjNy0wYzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EuhX7mfndKAfdkhTvQKsORd2Ff_ltPCKYqlGIKxJjx0=&id=126427571 .

name: Darryle Torbert, Campaign Manager
subject: Will you join too?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I’m excited to be joining the team!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41441390/328824024/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220204CMIntro_N_DT_ALL_4_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTdhMGRmZC0wYzg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wxuqv_50c9CRgEqUtzMkfco8dEgMPQ2ppYQnAXXPgLo=) Hey, Peter!

I’m Darryle Torbert, Shontel Brown’s new campaign manager. I’m ecstatic about joining the team and working with such a groundbreaking leader like Shontel.

Growing up in East Cleveland and Collinwood, on the northeast side of Cleveland, **I’ve seen firsthand the struggles of everyday Ohioans.** _From abject poverty and crime to a lack of resources for the basic necessities to live, Northeast Ohio has some of the poorest communities in the country._

I’ve dedicated my life to creating a better future for children in Cleveland and throughout Northeast Ohio by working for and supporting initiatives in many school districts. **Now, I’m standing by Shontel’s side because she’s the _proven leader and coalition builder_ we need in Washington.**

[**_I’m proud that this campaign is built by everyday people seeking to create change. We must send Shontel back to Congress this November to advocate for every Ohioan. name: Mike Thompson
subject: This Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

February is Black History Month, where we pay tribute to the history and achievements of Black Americans. It has never been more important to learn and reflect on the importance of Black history throughout our nation.

While our country has made tremendous progress in striving for equality, we must not forget to engage with our history to help us give context for the present. This year’s Black History Month theme is “Black Health and Wellness” to highlight the legacy of Black contributors in Western medicine as well as to examine how our healthcare system is affecting everyday Americans.

Abraham Lincoln once said, “Those who look for the bad in people will surely find it.”. I hope that we take this time to set our differences behind and reimagine what possibilities lie ahead when we work collectively.

This February, I want you to join me in remembering those who have shaped Black history and the important work they have done to better our nation. Black history is American history.

Onward,

Mike Thompson
Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bc1c2505-3d85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/a4dca657-0d86-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGRjYTY1Ny0wZDg2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qg97oi64stHNFCpRwPfKfs-s14zziIfstjDwQKehjNk=&id=103862631 Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa, CA 94581
United States

clean_body: Americans take issue with progressives’ Build Back Broke agenda. Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter, Americans take issue with progressives’ Build Back Broke agenda. We’re tired of spending more to fill up our tanks, heat our home, and feed our families. We’re tired of government mandates being rammed down our throats at every turn. But most of all... we’re tired of losing. Joe Biden and his progressive cohorts have proven one thing: we need the America First agenda! And I’m determined to make that vision a reality. That’s why the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee is propping up Pelosi puppet Bill Foster. They know I’m a straight shooter that’s not afraid to speak my mind. I called out weak RINO Adam Kinzinger for his terrible“Republican” values and voting records. We eventually ran him out of the race and I plan to do the same to Pelosi puppet Bill Foster! My name is Catalina Lauf andI’m running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative in Illinois’ 11th Congressional District against Pelosi puppet Bill Foster. I was born and raised in this district – and I KNOW what issues matter to my friends, family, and neighbors. We care about a thriving economy, protecting individual liberties, and making it possible for our children to achieve the American Dream. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi continually throw this GARBAGE socialist agenda at us, and Bill Foster is complicit! Foster’s an out-of-touch tax-and-spend politician who is a secure vote for EVERY Biden/Pelosi bill wreacking our economy and our country. We can’t afford to continue on this disastrous path that Biden and Pelosi have put our country on. It’s time to take our country back from crooks like Nancy Pelosi. It’s time to protect the American Dream from the Left’s socialist nightmare. It’s time to defend our individual freedoms before Washington consumes them. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. It’s time to Make America Make Sense Again. Together, we can accomplish that! In liberty, Catalina Lauf | | | | Paid for by Catalina for Congress | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | For more updates visit our site at Contributions or gifts to Catalina for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual may contribute up to $5,800 ($2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election). Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards") and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 per election. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Catalina for Congress.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: We want YOU to gather signatures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d86b422d6fb7/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-6751161?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=1a1f4db742&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear friends, We're making great progress collecting signatures but we need all the help we can get to reach 28,000.

I need **YOU** to collect signatures so I can get on the Republican primary ballot and unseat Mike Lee.
---
|
---
| Can you collect **50 signatures** from neighbors, family, friends, social media acquaintances, or the people in your city? **Request a packet[here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2e2cf8b459&e=10c1db3257) **and we will mail it to you so you can get started.

You can also join us on **February 9 at 5:00 pm** at [West Bountiful City Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=fb1f0a17ba&e=10c1db3257) where we will meet and then gather signatures in the surrounding neighborhoods. We will meet again on **February 14 at 4:00** pm at [Foxboro North Regional Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2d44b2ac15&e=10c1db3257).
---
|
---
| If you have not signed for Becky, find us at one of our public booths in**Cache, Davis, Garfield, Grand, Salt Lake, and Utah County this Saturday**. Find a full list of times and locations [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b884af9577&e=10c1db3257).
---
| If you have volunteered to gather signatures, **please return your packet as soon as possible so we can count and verify your signatures**. Use the self-addressed stamped envelope, drop it off at an event or, contact our campaign for pickup.

Thank you for supporting my campaign by signing a signature packet, volunteering to gather signatures, and encouraging others to do the same! Together we can unseat Mike Lee and bring more proactive, productive, and inclusive leadership to Washington.

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=450abc8da9&e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=51a8bec831&e=10c1db3257)

Bountiful, UT 84011

subject: SIGN ON: Expand Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Melanie D’Arrigo’s running for Congress to expand Social Security, pass Medicare for All, expand the Older Americans Act, and end senior harassment.

[**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of Melanie’s Protecting Older Americans plan today!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JgPFRyMcJhG3FQZ94VJYWrcCm5LyQz598OJh5m2-USBz1qALhJpWTfDJXyRrzLAVnJXjbiCK-cs9RicOlGmG8wdRHz8Qd2-P-99oggjQEwp693y58bPeffuB66g2O9XDi1gT3oRCQ2iQbFkhG45nXmTHa7--aAHeqCiVd11_pMutTgSw2XiM85akXOCkYD8YglFI8NKt9yA2QV6WcYE7_IXCei-6k5nQ1_NYpMUbBEz-PLZb1azrVcaITErZeF8W4BisSQKtXlQdVUUyV9Clw1mGGYDzRxIUt0TOnduc2_x6ROyGHYYeVYpJtdwBwWnITMpE-bhYw0dEtVGRvAdU4FEZS3pYmr7Q1csOcInwSXBcCAon556iiP2whG9kyn2OBceRNoZ6tMfae6J1tfZCfkw3wyZwLU6NbiUoYKTN8vs6yXwwSxX-iAOAhTmQoPTLTl6W-FiF992HqsZGpoxmCCMRuxf3SW5sdqBqIMkTMpEr_Id0HBezGP8MsKvXzsN4emFDGQbfs0lG9_Kce4WZ9kIPS8O0UFAF8OIahyILSS7i4qS6xCw5m6NPohx0cKYhQ1pn_d0fhXDsqWYv29NGIdSGydicvKwAS3McPxe3IUhQ/3ja/fYMzSN-WT4mRPl-Voc5ruQ/h0/xsxBUOlCGAkOxYKM24-4sECjCnKsb_rggH6m3Gp0NPg)
The dream of retirement isn’t something many seniors can afford to realize. But, the problems facing older adults are policy choices we can correct **IF** we elect the people who will choose to correct them.
Right now, over 60% of American seniors depend on Social Security for most of their income, receiving an average of $1,438 a month.
In the richest nation on Earth, many workers who have paid into Social Security for all of their lives are just barely getting by.
Meanwhile, a billionaire pays as much into Social Security as someone who is middle class.
**[Melanie D’Arrigo is running for Congress to expand Social Security and give seniors a raise as part of her Protecting Older Americans plan. Can you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JgPFRyMcJhG3FQZ94VJYWrcCm5LyQz598OJh5m2-USBz1qALhJpWTfDJXyRrzLAVnJXjbiCK-cs9RicOlGmG8wdRHz8Qd2-P-99oggjQEwp693y58bPeffuB66g2O9XDi1gT3oRCQ2iQbFkhG45nXmTHa7--aAHeqCiVd11_pMutTgSw2XiM85akXOCkYD8YglFI8NKt9yA2QV6WcYE7_IXCei-6k5nQ1_NYpMUbBEz-PLZb1azrVcaITErZeF8W4BisSQKtXlQdVUUyV9Clw1mGGYDzRxIUt0TOnduc2_x6ROyGHYYeVYpJtdwBwWnITMpE-bhYw0dEtVGRvAdU4FOQ_ol2BIiVXmbRSusbS-6CmrJcpexpae1XLEK2QfszvtaxK8Hmm2rvejYvSE4qZNEGUkYjp5WdRhc9PDq6ixUbGX2pV6DyvCQWj7UmAHzjKWe8q-h-eg6e9hj4M1Z-yoqjfuzgofKb-470NcMslpmn2UBOna-jFiSiXBcHRlee3JPapItvzeF6gg-7DXKk5pumIhK9oxuNJi5wAJhWzcb8hQgB396D2ECT0LIdFkatgclLyRV460lvRFJJx4nJsTXCbNs1y1OBYtSxKUoFaKnc/3ja/fYMzSN-WT4mRPl-Voc5ruQ/h1/6kokSq0RJtxp6tbePkt8O1CMp8aFjvBXMrjnbp9TIV8)**
Melanie supports scrapping the payroll tax cap to ensure that Social Security continues to be fully funded. This would also allow us to expand benefits, including an increase for those with incomes below the equivalent to a living wage.
Melanie also supports adjusting the cost of living adjustment (COLA) formula to better reflect the actual cost of living increases to ensure that no one is being left behind as the costs of housing, healthcare and essentials go up.
**Older Americans deserve to age with dignity and have the means and health to do so. Melanie’s Protecting Older Americans Plan also includes:**
**Passing Medicare For All** means there would no longer be any Medicare premiums, out-of-pocket costs or the need to purchase supplemental plans. Medicare For All would also cover dental, vision, mental health and long-term care, including home and community-based services at no cost, as well as capping prescription costs at $200 per year.
**Expanding the Older Americans Act,** which funds health and social services. We must expand high-quality caregiving, modernize senior centers, and increase protections for nursing home residents.
**Ending senior harassment** by passing the Protecting Seniors from Emergency Scams Act (H.R. 446) which would require the Federal Trade Commission to report on and raise awareness of scams targeting older adults.
Melanie also supports ending the unwanted robocalls that frequently target and harass seniors by requiring internet providers to validate that phone numbers are coming from the numbers being displayed and requiring telecom companies to block nuisance calls from reported numbers.
**Stopping age discrimination** in hiring. Melanie will support protections for older Americans on matters of wages, benefits, hiring practices and termination — including ending at-will employment.
**[We’re looking for 1,000 citizen co-sponsors of Melanie D’Arrigo’s Protecting Older Americans Plan. Can you add your name today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JgPFRyMcJhG3FQZ94VJYWrcCm5LyQz598OJh5m2-USBz1qALhJpWTfDJXyRrzLAVnJXjbiCK-cs9RicOlGmG8wdRHz8Qd2-P-99oggjQEwp693y58bPeffuB66g2O9XDi1gT3oRCQ2iQbFkhG45nXmTHa7--aAHeqCiVd11_pMutTgSw2XiM85akXOCkYD8YglFI8NKt9yA2QV6WcYE7_IXCei-6k5nQ1_NYpMUbBEz-PLZb1azrVcaITErZeF8W4BisSQKtXlQdVUUyV9Clw1mGGYDzRxIUt0TOnduc2_x6ROyGHYYeVYpJtdwBwWnITMpE-bhYw0dEtVGRvAdU4FIhZk308ACoss-JPzXw1SFnckFw-B2Sd_7CYbcyiPqWU3dKiIJBpwO6TMVBUmofywnltgOlNETi3biX_vWLr1FV_dD6MoIsWbwZ5o_x9ZRv-O-DBY8YOwrV_cM_5TjVnmAsDLYz-ndpm9u-Pmv61i29klHfvS9k7mipkw44WhKckYMCNCxNHHxJGfVBbVRwEYZ4nyzM5-Y_QlGtYhXHl3xaR-s56I2wNn1clawhCGXhxmpZ5_4C_klnb0GlB7I4uW__-Ob03qu3Eq4MPV4NJd_0/3ja/fYMzSN-WT4mRPl-Voc5ruQ/h2/fRME2zCxa9ezK-toTXSpGQolHhT6XUYg5MAoGGithls)**

clean_body: | | | Melanie D’Arrigo’s running for Congress to expand Social Security, pass Medicare for All, expand the Older Americans Act, and end senior harassment. The dream of retirement isn’t something many seniors can afford to realize. But, the problems facing older adults are policy choices we can correct IF we elect the people who will choose to correct them. Right now, over 60% of American seniors depend on Social Security for most of their income, receiving an average of $1,438 a month. In the richest nation on Earth, many workers who have paid into Social Security for all of their lives are just barely getting by. Meanwhile, a billionaire pays as much into Social Security as someone who is middle class. Melanie supports scrapping the payroll tax cap to ensure that Social Security continues to be fully funded. This would also allow us to expand benefits, including an increase for those with incomes below the equivalent to a living wage. Melanie also supports adjusting the cost of living adjustment (COLA) formula to better reflect the actual cost of living increases to ensure that no one is being left behind as the costs of housing, healthcare and essentials go up. Older Americans deserve to age with dignity and have the means and health to do so. Melanie’s Protecting Older Americans Plan also includes: Passing Medicare For All means there would no longer be any Medicare premiums, out-of-pocket costs or the need to purchase supplemental plans. Medicare For All would also cover dental, vision, mental health and long-term care, including home and community-based services at no cost, as well as capping prescription costs at $200 per year. Expanding the Older Americans Act, which funds health and social services. We must expand high-quality caregiving, modernize senior centers, and increase protections for nursing home residents. Ending senior harassment by passing the Protecting Seniors from Emergency Scams Act (H.R. 446) which would require the Federal Trade Commission to report on and raise awareness of scams targeting older adults. Melanie also supports ending the unwanted robocalls that frequently target and harass seniors by requiring internet providers to validate that phone numbers are coming from the numbers being displayed and requiring telecom companies to block nuisance calls from reported numbers. Stopping age discrimination in hiring. Melanie will support protections for older Americans on matters of wages, benefits, hiring practices and termination — including ending at-will employment. Thanks for standing up. – Team Melanie | Get campaign T-shirts at is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Dear Friend,
[Time and time again we hear from the Dems they want to “defund the police.” In 2021, violent crime spiked across the country. The Dems plan worked. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fgop.com%2Frapid-response%2Fpsaki-on-crime-what-does-that-even-mean%2F/1/0100017ec5f11b5b-b8c960f9-c389-4ad3-8a7b-051817012cbe-000000/5QOawD7tVb84asmvxtfHEkeTavQ=256)

Fellow American,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[All I'm asking of you today is that you please take a 10-30 seconds to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=18c69673e151422fa97778633c6506b4&_e=t-vIzUG97RvbaJHVCVNI9BIL5Ct3ERf_mb9n9dn6pfC3SYWpS3XQuh68bU4KDEhPk39JVSqbRGXVP4hF1Ff4iwqdR0Y1kbsq4NW1zPeORpU6DHbD_p9iJHtTZHzGs0y8TlPTWdRafA14f23qsDkLKU6ppKWoT9X8GVp2JFbgbCqVQb4dWCrtUo5xPR8-mnLv2p4N7KuVpuSDdJ2Uj4Ug5xI2ULwcMwR4HpSjRFnN-cQRPK3tLPuwc0anslS4go-DoQjhbmeNROTKvyVJ42b9apt7Wga4ld8O8eIstKNPtc-C2IXh7pQUMks_R7tF4Ewss16rD2IUh2Jbe4OBXQQn-NdGuHQjGNiv_RMRUo0hYmcrTD19mgR1H_hW_fEFlgVrHTA4B0lHyR3_gDN90BAc30gtAPtSTHqpTA7s6BV-y97exRsJp9ko22rolKuckCsAcyNFDRMXTRcJ8UVLTK6f0ymj79RDg4yEWK-VneYZKcpAjDLbfPstOIEuDvZc7_Nk)**.

A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO TODAY >> **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=18c69673e151422fa97778633c6506b4&_e=t-vIzUG97RvbaJHVCVNI9BIL5Ct3ERf_mb9n9dn6pfC3SYWpS3XQuh68bU4KDEhPk39JVSqbRGXVP4hF1Ff4iwqdR0Y1kbsq4NW1zPeORpU6DHbD_p9iJHtTZHzGs0y8TlPTWdRafA14f23qsDkLKU6ppKWoT9X8GVp2JFbgbCqVQb4dWCrtUo5xPR8-mnLv2p4N7KuVpuSDdJ2Uj4Ug5xI2ULwcMwR4HpSjRFnN-cQRPK3tLPuwc0anslS4go-DoQjhbmeNROTKvyVJ42b9al54TlCuS89VYArGZ8BgXYBZIHKeBg04Uoq4j9bgzYYhk0cJYwyd18K1ax6Vh4DyTDkxBkakYSCnxjANvoBcEFWhvYDllO1Xq2_WZiJJs2W3QRuIiAGlYtmMaWEgeVcZMP5KKh6oEwOc2OXgxGX3IyNE_N2GASyfSwqMqoPI3kckbkaiJLPLVs3IZ5R4zGiS8eOwRulpB9YzE-5XTn-_Nn7OYq64g0YgLHm23wOGl3SY)

Rod Dorilás

[** TAKE A CHANCE ON ME>>**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=18c69673e151422fa97778633c6506b4&_e=t-vIzUG97RvbaJHVCVNI9BIL5Ct3ERf_mb9n9dn6pfC3SYWpS3XQuh68bU4KDEhPk39JVSqbRGXVP4hF1Ff4iwqdR0Y1kbsq4NW1zPeORpU6DHbD_p9iJHtTZHzGs0y8TlPTWdRafA14f23qsDkLKU6ppKWoT9X8GVp2JFbgbCqVQb4dWCrtUo5xPR8-mnLv2p4N7KuVpuSDdJ2Uj4Ug5xI2ULwcMwR4HpSjRFnN-cQRPK3tLPuwc0anslS4go-DoQjhbmeNROTKvyVJ42b9arYOszpIHA_DkD4oa6W7YydGWp7WdWeuDoMMSVXxZF473il5fvJCJuJmJu-kz-oI_d2WiAh3TPfNm0bAD0ZqmDb9b3mk4VXPqPJLRppmpFTkfM2TycTKyMlI1GGy5K_Fvi3SHYjuo_EwUULtFcipxKke5EOgRyZ85qMrmlQ410Uf-1-FFZdc5N-m2hKvXZN2Voh73npFm6WpUxxHRzNvw9psnUfat392WJbyOsJKzMt2)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

clean_body: We can’t lose this American institution. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. FIRST: Trump's Postmaster General Louis DeJoy vowed to SABOTAGE the Post Office. THEN: Mitch McConnell threatened to veto USPS funding to crush Vote-by-Mail! | | | If we don’t step up right now, the Postal Service will go under -- This can’t happen. We’ve fought too hard to let McConnell and his pawns win another election. If we’ve learned anything while standing up to McConnell and his cronies, it’s that there’s power in numbers. If everyone reading this chips in just $5, we can save the Post Office and Vote-by-Mail!! | | | | | | Thanks for standing with Postal Workers! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: 60-SECOND POLL FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com (via DCCC)
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene BANNED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Should officials who helped plan the January 6th rally be BANNED from public office?
2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | | **16,000 DEMOCRATIC RESPONSES REQUESTED**

We're HORRIFIED.

The House Republicans who voted to overturn the 2020 election just had a **record-breaking** fundraising year.

We CANNOT let these dangerous Republicans buy back power at this fragile moment for our democracy.

That's why we're collecting data on where our best supporters stand:

**Should officials who voted to overturn the 2020 election be BANNED from public office?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-2spp_)
---|---|---

Make no mistake:

**The Republicans who voted to overturn the 2020 election, who spent months lying about its results, and who incited the January 6 insurrection are simply too dangerous to be trusted with power.**

That's why we were OUTRAGED to discover that those same Republicans are now riding a record-breaking WAVE of fundraising:

_**Kevin McCarthy** pocketed __**$15.4 million.**__
**Marjorie Taylor Greene** raised __**$10.1 million.**__
**Lauren Boebert** raked in __**$3.8 million.**__
**Madison Cawthorn** received **$3.1 million.**_

They all played a role in planning the rally that took place before a deadly attack on our democracy just one year ago.

**_And they 're all building UNBEATABLE war chests to crush our Majority once and for all._**

We can't afford to let a single one of these dangerous Republicans hold an ounce of power at this fragile moment for our democracy.

[**That 's why, now more than ever, we need to hear from you: Should officials who voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election be BANNED from holding elected office?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_) | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46351667&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDQ5MzQ2NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46351667&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE4MDQ5MzQ2NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Dr. Kathleen Harder
subject: Women’s Heart Disease Awareness Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kathleen Harder for Congress
body:
February is American Heart Month. Cardiovascular disease is the number one killer of men and women in this country. Cardiovascular disease is the number one killer of men and women in this country. One in four men die from cardiovascular disease. Heart disease kills more women than all cancers combined. Every 100 seconds, an American woman has a heart attack. Today is **National Wear Red Day **and women all over the country will be wearing red — whether it’s lipstick, a pair of pants, or a favorite hat— in order to raise awareness, in hopes to reduce heart disease and strokes in American women. Healthcare policy needs to focus on access to affordable health care for all, that focuses on prevention. Help me take that message to Washington as your Representative for Oregon's Congressional District 6. So in recognition of National Wear Red Day, we want to know if you believe our government needs to be doing more to keep women healthy and lower the number of women dying from heart disease. Take our poll below. When it comes to keeping women healthy, the United States Government does... Peter, please don’t delete this email — __I promise this will be short.__

**I ran in 2020 to take down Devin Nunes and end Trump’s corruption. Now, I’m running to clean up the mess they left in our communities.**

**Unlike those guys, I’m committed to fighting for working people.** I know our neighbors deserve clean water, access to health care, and lower costs.

**Unlike those guys, I don’t take a penny from corporate dark money donors.** That’s why every small dollar donation from folks like you, Peter, makes an impact.

It’s going to be an uphill battle to turn this open seat blue and protect our House majority. Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. clean_body: Now, I’m running to clean up their mess. | = Peter, please don’t delete this email — I promise this will be short. I ran in 2020 to take down Devin Nunes and end Trump’s corruption. Now, I’m running to clean up the mess they left in our communities. Unlike those guys, I’m committed to fighting for working people. I know our neighbors deserve clean water, access to health care, and lower costs. Unlike those guys, I don’t take a penny from corporate dark money donors. That’s why every small dollar donation from folks like you, Peter, makes an impact. It’s going to be an uphill battle to turn this open seat blue and protect our House majority. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Your support makes all the difference, — Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. Sinema. clean_body: Help put pressure on Kyrsten Sinema. | | | Peter, After Joe Manchin said the original Build Back Better legislation is “dead” as is, Democrats need to find a new way to pass the most consequential pieces of President Biden’s agenda — including climate action, lower drug prices, and child care. And they’re going to need all 50 votes to get it done — which means we need Kyrsten Sinema to stop obstructing progress on behalf of her corporate donors. It’s critical for us to act now to amp up the pressure on Sen. Sinema. We have to show her that if she continues to block our agenda, we are going to defeat her in a primary. You can help us do that right now: Largely thanks to Sinema’s obstruction, Democrats are running out of time to pass the key components of Biden’s agenda before the 2022 midterms. If they don’t make progress, voters could punish vulnerable Senators at the ballot box, including Sen. Mark Kelly — and the GOP could even regain Senate control. The stakes couldn’t be higher. Kyrsten Sinema needs to know that if she continues to do the bidding of Big Pharma and Big Oil mega-donors, and block legislation that would help millions of working families, it’s going to cost her her job. As a reminder, 100% of proceeds to the Primary Sinema Project fund Arizona organizers on the ground who are holding Sinema accountable and laying the groundwork for another Democrat to replace her ASAP. Thank you for taking action, Primary Sinema Project | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. Dear Patriot, This is Johnny Nalbandian here once again asking you to help me defeat Adam Schiff. I’m the conservative who can win thi

| | Dear Patriot, This is Johnny Nalbandian here once again asking you to help me defeat Adam Schiff. I’m the conservative who can win this race due to my deep roots in our district, CA-30. I was raised here and have become a well-known business leader in my community who has run a successful businesses for over 5 decades. Schiff does not like to spend time in his own district because he would rather ignore problems than face them head-on. That’s the sign of a weak leader. Just take a look at what we are facing as Americans and you can easily see why voters across the country have buyers remorse on their vote in 2020. The inflation is out of control, the gas prices continue to rise (especially in California), and the streets are far from safe! We have the war on energy the Democrats have waged that has left us once again dependent on the middle east for oil.
* We must once again become energy independent and in doing so lower gas prices.

* We must send support to law enforcement and make the police respected again.

“Why have a Congressman who only shows up to his district to wine and dine with his rich leftist friends?” They ask. As you know I can’t win alone and that’s why it is so important you pitch in today to help me keep my momentum going. With your contribution, I can keep reaching the people with the truth and the right solutions to these Democrat-created messes. [Will you help me strike a massive blow to the Socialist Left by donating $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or any other amount today?](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/01Nx3qiwr/c?w=AgCHVPqMUSikvFwoiUxR36_NDpV5QF-lgBzYqMV88ok.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9qb2hubnktZm9yLWNvbmdyZXNzL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiJjNjI5ZTI5YS1iZmQ5LTRmN2UtODhjNi1iNWJjZmM1MDE1NGMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4ZWE4YmViOS0xMTg5LTQ1MWYtYWU1NS1kMGU5MDA0YjdiYzMifQ) [For more information, please visit our website at www.VoteJohnny.Us](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/01Nx3qiwr/c?w=ueMHPKLgqdIK_S1f52YrLHpSeWwhFl9OfeIpulvpI5o.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWpvaG5ueS51cyIsInIiOiJjNjI5ZTI5YS1iZmQ5LTRmN2UtODhjNi1iNWJjZmM1MDE1NGMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4ZWE4YmViOS0xMTg5LTQ1MWYtYWU1NS1kMGU5MDA0YjdiYzMifQ)

body:
I need your help now, more than ever >> |
---
| | [ ](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=2ba7585364&e=ade10d3dbe)

| | Peter,
The Morris County Republican Committee announced the County Convention, our first big challenge in this campaign.

**I am the best-positioned candidate to win this Morris County Convention.** With over 25 years of relationships and experience in Morris County and the most endorsements of any candidate in the field, **this is our fight to lose**. Even so, we cannot let up.

You and I both know: Early money matters. [Will you help us hit our goal of raising $50,000 before the Morris County Convention at the end of February? ](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=0f77c32486&e=ade10d3dbe)
---

---
| Families across New Jersey's 11th district are struggling to pay for gas and groceries under the failed leadership of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and their liberal puppet, Mikie Sherrill. **It's clear, we need change in Washington. **

**This is the year Republicans will take back New Jersey's 11th district and elect a majority to the U.S. House. **But, we can't do it without your support.** **

[Please, join our fight in the lead up to this important convention by donating $5, $15, $25 or whatever you can afford today!](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=9e78aca6f0&e=ade10d3dbe)

|
Thank you for your support,

Larry Casha
Candidate for Congress, NJ-11

PS. Have you seen that Steve Forbes is joining our team on February 10th for an event in support of our campaign? _[Join us on the 10th by purchasing your ticket today >>](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=9b7a663d4c&e=ade10d3dbe)_

name: Max Steiner via, MaxSteinerForCongress.com
subject: Quick update: I'll be offline for training with the Army reserves this weekend.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41433390/328786958/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGM3MDVhMC1lYzg1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehSg1wqg7pL4ygHGDDfs8Tx-V7E7zY_d_dfoMtFAiOQ=)
Friend,

As an Army reservist, I'm required to spend one weekend per month, and several weeks per year, at training. That’s what I’ll be up to this weekend.

For good reason, the Army forbids campaign activity during training. That means I won't be able to attend campaign events as usual.

**This also means that I won't be able to comment publicly on the Shasta Board of Supervisors Recall, which is still too close to call.** For those of you who aren't fully aware of the issue, the "Trump Right" attempted to recall Supervisor Leonard Moty on Tuesday. The election is still too close to call, but it looks like the recall has succeeded. Moty is a lifelong moderate Republican, former police chief, and was endorsed by the Chamber of Commerce and every Republican notable in Shasta.

It was not enough. The Republican base is angry at the status quo and Republicans in Shasta County have no Democrats in office to blame. The GOP has become the Party of rage, and it is beginning to eat its own. LaMalfa was too scared to even take a side in the recall: which I can tell you from personal conversations has only angered both groups of partisans.

Look forward to a longer email on this next week after the dust settles. Shasta is the key to turning the North State blue in 2022, and this recall may be the straw that breaks the GOP back.

I'm a bit concerned about losing fundraising momentum while I'm gone, so I'm hoping to raise $5,000 in online donations before I head out to make sure we don't skip a beat.

**[Will you chip in $10, $35, or even $50 today? clean_body: You don't want to miss this ~grab your tickets while they last! | | | | | | David Harris Jr. Will be our keynote speaker! | Tickets will be available at the door! | | We appreciate all our sponsors and neighbors, for without you we couldn't keep the lights on, nor could we continue to press for conservative policy locally and in Austin. We are happy to announce that table sponsors will gain admittance to a special VIP reception with David Harris Jr.! There will be a book-signing, 50/50, auction items and much more! VIP reception (for sponsors): 5:00p - 5:30p - Republican HQ 201 HWY 150, Suite J-L Coldspring, TX 77331 Reagan Dinner: 6p-9p - San Jacinto County Community Shelter 200 HWY 150 Coldspring, TX 77331 General Admission Tickets are $75 /each with other sponsor opportunities available and event catering by Top Chef - Philip McCulloch! | | == | | David Covey will emcee our action packed event! | Please make checks payable to: SJC GOP PO BOX 370 Coldspring TX 77331 or feel free to donate via our secure portal at ==! | We are an organization of volunteers who are part of the community and our engagement mission means we "show up". We honestly care about our community and will continue to fight the good fight, as our conservative values are the only thing that stands between our families and socialism ~ Chairman Dwayne Wright | Connect with us | | | | | | | | | | San Jacinto County Republican Party | PO Box 370, Coldspring, TX 77331 | | Sent by mailto:chairman@sjcgop.org in collaboration with |

subject: Mull-Mentum!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends, It’s been an unbelievable first few weeks on the campaign trail! | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

It’s been an unbelievable first few weeks on the campaign trail! Check out the latest happenings here at Mullin for Congress HQ and learn more about how you can get involved this week. **Team Mullin Was Endorsed by Congresswoman Anna Eshoo!** We were thrilled to see so many of our supporters at our big field kickoff in Redwood City, where Congresswoman Anna Eshoo made her game-changing announcement to formally endorse our campaign. Check out the video below!
---
| [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=b19cc7870f&e=292fde286a)
---
| **And We Secured Two More Labor Endorsements!** For nearly a decade, Kevin Mullin has been voting with union workers and working families to ensure their needs are met. That’s why we’re so proud to announce that the Mullin campaign earned the sole endorsement from the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers (SMART) _**and**_ the International Brotherhood of Teamsters Joint Council 7, adding to our overflowing list of over 100 endorsers from around the district and state.
---
|
---
| **Get Involved: Come Walk with Us Saturday, February 5th!**

We’re holding our next grassroots day of action on Saturday, February 5, in Redwood City and we’d love for you to join. We’re going door-to-door to spread the word to voters about Kevin’s unmatched progressive record of delivering results and why Congresswoman Jackie Speier calls Kevin the “perfect” leader to build on her record in Washington. [Click here to email Brian Rogers, Mullin for Congress campaign manager, for more details about this weekend’s event.](mailto:brian@kevinmullinforcongress.com)

**Tell Your Friends: Top 5 Reasons to Support Kevin for Congress**

And finally, to win this election, we’re going to need your help to mobilize every last Democrat to get out and vote for Kevin, and that starts with telling all your friends why they should send Kevin to fight for us in Congress. Here’s what you should tell them:
1. In the Assembly, Kevin has passed an impressive 60 bills into law.
2. Kevin has been ranked the most progressive member of the Assembly.
3. Kevin has been enthusiastically endorsed by U.S. Reps. Jackie Speier and Anna Eshoo, Former State Senator Jerry Hill, and more than one hundred current and former leaders from around the district.
4. Kevin fought for and won the first vote-by-mail law in California that led to record turnout, banned dark money in our state elections, and secured the largest climate resiliency investment in California history to protect the Bayshore.
5. In Congress, Kevin will fight to build an economy that works for all of us, advocate for resources and investments in transportation, housing for all, and universal, affordable child care. He’ll never stop defending our democracy and the right of every American to vote, and make sure America follows California’s lead with bold action on climate change.

Thank you for your continued support of our campaign!

— _Team Mullin_
---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Climate Resilience Workforce Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I will work hard to pass this important bill, but I can't do it alone.
#
Peter,
As we continue fighting to pass a Build Back Better Act that includes the most significant investment to combat climate change in our country's history, we're refusing to leave frontline communities, climate resilience, and working people behind.
**We need to take action _now_.** Extreme winter weather is again hitting communities across the country not prepared for freezing temperatures, ice, and snow. Last summer, historic high temperatures in the Pacific Northwest caused roads to buckle under the stress of the heat.
These climate disasters are expensive and require massive efforts to clean up and rebuild damaged homes and infrastructure. That's why I recently introduced the Climate Resilience Workforce Act to invest in a skilled workforce capable of responding to and preparing for the destructive impacts of climate change.
I will work hard to pass this bill, but I can't do it alone. [**Can you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Climate Resilience Workforce Act and help build the momentum necessary to turn this legislation into law?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate-resilience-workforce-act/?source=em20220204-1009&t=1&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate-resilience-workforce-act/?source=em20220204-1009&t=2&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)**
The Climate Resilience Workforce Act would assemble the workforce the United States needs to achieve climate resilience by:
* **Creating millions of climate resilience jobs** through grants to states, counties, cities, tribal governments, labor organizations, and community-based nonprofit organizations.
* **Removing barriers to employment in climate resilience jobs** based on immigration status and prior involvement with the criminal justice system by providing a roadmap to citizenship for workers employed in climate resilience sectors or workforce training programs and prohibiting employers from inquiring about criminal history before an offer is made.
* **Funding existing workforce development programs and creating new ones** through grants that train workers for employment within climate resilience sectors, prioritizing pre-apprenticeship and apprenticeship programs.
* **Investing in developing regional, state, local, and community-based climate resilience action plans** that center frontline communities and identify effective strategies to achieve climate resilience.
* **Creating an Office of Climate Resilience within the White House** that would focus on planning, worker protection, and equity.

Disaster recovery work is a multi-billion dollar industry, and it's often dangerous. Yet the workers on the frontlines often lack basic protections. If we create millions of good-paying, union jobs and center the very communities disproportionately impacted by climate disaster, we can finally build back better, greener, and _stronger_.
[**Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Climate Resilience Workforce Act, and join me in the fight to help prepare communities for and respond to climate disasters.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate-resilience-workforce-act/?source=em20220204-1009&t=3&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/climate-resilience-workforce-act/?source=em20220204-1009&t=4&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220204-1009-footer&t=5&refcode2=1009_420207_GJU00X&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1009%2E420207%2EGJU00X)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

clean_body: One year ago, we launched this campaign and now we've built a movement | | | We’re almost four months out from the primary in June — and celebrating the one-year launch of our campaign today. Folks, I couldn’t be more ready to take this thing all the way! Can you chip in $4, or whatever you can afford, to ensure we have the resources to win the primary in June and take our grassroots campaign all the way to November? If we win the primary, there’s no doubt Kevin McCarthy will start spending thousands to stop our movement. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Your donation means so much. It shows that you’re ready to fight for a movement that will bring leadership that fights for the working families of Bakersfield and beyond — rather than fighting on behalf of big corporate donors that want to enrich themselves. It shows that you’re fighting to make sure our democracy stays alive even as Kevin McCarthy does everything he can to protect members of his own party who participated in planning the violent attempt to overthrow our government. It shows that you’re ready to take on one of the most powerful Republicans in Congress and finally hold him accountable for all the times he has left the folks of our district out to dry. Building a grassroots movement from the ground up is never easy. But with you in this fight, I know we can beat the odds, defeat McCarthy and elect someone who will actually work for the people of California’s 23rd District. In solidarity, Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

body:
|

***4,504:** _the number of citizen donations since our launch on Jan. 6. If we get to 5,000 by Feb. 6 it will make a major splash.__[Your support in any amount](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb4_final&n=1) helps us get there._ Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Parody Becomes Reality](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooYWB9CLupqjDm9EenM-1wSrlz5-oieEMeS2NWXKWb20g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb4_final&n=2) On Monday, Gavin Newsom told us about his “judicious” mask-wearing at the 49ers game. The next day, Eric Garcetti did him one better. LA’s Mayor assured the public that in his own maskless photo with Magic Johnson, he was holding his breath. Yes, his defense is he _didn’t exhale_. The line between parody and reality has vanished entirely. Citing Newsom and Garcetti’s conduct, hundreds of Oakdale students just organized a protest against the mask mandate. I’ve visited schools where it’s simply ignored. The kids are happy and learning. At the Capitol this week, I gave every legislator [the letter](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KFFJdP5qmDo2Y2EdvW7-VDBFNwqzBbm8mdVboAO3Qo6E8UNxN1wTT_V9KsZLcAOdrtnDrbtRcg0XfW0c2P-qfDpw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb4_final&n=3) now signed by 124 school board members. It demands “the end of the State of Emergency,” the end of “all masking, testing and vaccination mandates,” and “a return to normal school activities.” It was a good week at the Capitol, actually. On Monday we stopped AB 1400, the Single Payer bill that doubles state taxes. On Thursday we passed HR 82, my Resolution proclaiming School Choice Week. We’ve won big victories for our state as part of the super-minority. Imagine what we can do for our country as part of the majority. [Let’s shock the political world by getting to 5,000 citizen donations](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb4_final&n=4) With gratitude,
Kevin
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb4_final&n=5).

It is clear that our message is resonating and our hard work is paying off. With grassroots supporters like you, we’re going to continue building our momentum every single day through the May 24 primary. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF1wBUPzyz7MI_CDYMoGqnRS7iw24vBD9-RvNUc-OCMfPIVhTMMyAczx8xKwrnnF0hDtWW1ZCC3xX3eNRKrXawovMBn6wVdju6UD2YMnoDCPKjgTddUdpq8cvqUuZFdoRD2I7-_6jwEBRI_XhS0uZC5-Z6AxYznq1GaoKFYI8iXNSei-1drL1_L6pcvOI8cB79bTGnRVt7IspTGb7-WAdltG0CZw3WmM3bCK9o6LdtOriKj3YLZ57xiXLQkELHRrw-a) **Katie’s Thoughts on a New SCOTUS Pick** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF12MF2jzR_DwWaZAK4kjY1ZBFPLjuSJCdcRNc6qpaTU3UFdmszmJAnx6ILT_irqBpu2qQLI03ULbUJzfr5FUGWyDrcWF19lmtk90tVzIrWmjEzwje2d_1qYVM2LI_nuWC8kmkaMn9Pgs4guliyT_fVbtQmqN-W4iBEARwNSMBL6WFXaZpIUdeK52pFcOMg2XCQRSF9xVaZ-hZDbunu7NHAhlkjCoTMvo8j-jh7UFm5KS7URrrkhle7Pqr51MM54B59) President Biden should follow President Trump's lead on judicial appointments and nominate a Supreme Court justice who will apply the law as written -- not legislate from the bench or bend the law to reach a predetermined result or scratch a personal bias. However, if Joe Biden's Supreme Court nominee is like many of his other judicial nominees, it will be someone with radical liberal views that are bad for Alabama. We need a justice committed to the Constitution and the rule of law, not an unqualified, left-wing activist. President Trump had historic success appointing constitutional conservatives who will help preserve the country we know and love for generations to come. I was proud to stand with him to help confirm judges and justices, and I'll fight to continue this work as Alabama's next Senator. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF12MF2jzR_DwWaZAK4kjY1ZBFPLjuSJCdcRNc6qpaTU3WdoKCcMZB6VNPrfvfJl5Rlu1E8y4IBUopkekQ_W8x0yWcXCpjLTq-JzfhXqrUknjiINeAPa14ZO7Rtu9UhAiNU2SCgCX4eIccZnmyOhTHJcu6i-SXI9e8HIG_QRLiCp5iVQichMr4RDxNQyW_KmtvgOhMBOm_1krsHoWy38U_pHr2jYE-Lx82l6NEA5UwrtIr45o8AJte--7QAbdVPcrHq) ****Katie Stands with Border Patrol Officers**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF1cSY8_CeFe-mbWEWXBNzl53NY8b5o9SDYjP858BD_67l-AY-u2pHUl2jOxuOYbpI39GIlf6c5y9re9jukZwM14raXybLELGXKYVOJm5MaiLoej7K9CknuekJ66HPfQ1NghMELXkFKbn44reQX1K1kjcknGCBE8QrvL_IA3cnazhOZ38cJYUQXss4IVy05pqWnFE3m1wHpu7lMauYRa1Hx9DiLKWeL2hFBqfoULp-J8tEvE2koVAEnPDKJ0N4Ee9JZ) I stand with the brave border patrol agents who are standing up to their radical political leaders. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF1cSY8_CeFe-mbWEWXBNzl53NY8b5o9SDYjP858BD_67m_DOfvmhtEi5tmJ9afQoXWZ_8XX2z5m-L69D_pOTZYLECJPj_4DEsYDsVY1C5ppoYfTn2W-3EftGPdi_t0hxqi-ZulBDYPkA06JrXWoqtClrbzPr4Fy8kj4EDfqWv--1D-8-RE5Ayv19m85WmItnIWeGXBfyNUC-4AXNU8oiD6uhpsF7Baofy1Ub_7iodXp8sZ0NnzrTCyvP-k21uAQPxA) ****Christian Leaders Boycott the Olympics**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF1IQ86pwYduBBq33LrMKFZcXZ8MakN09c62PZ9rj_tdVitRR4gjyG4aVrh42YHjx2a7UfQFxo0f7ewJryOXfDFtJy-dQ3ieEPhGHlXE4qT4Jgc25a9g1-FjV9xEAebL02gek_m_w8AyzshS-wJhJ2gKSqb9jlarYszG1AuqYZ5mN0UD3DAE7CdRxxDUaO5Qc1ZCO_wlJFl4gWGIsz86jleyyB6Vk7ZjgDwEawWAiG5mFKZ2-uVKkA-SALDFZXmAdg9) I stand with the Christian leaders who are fighting back against China's atrocities. We should be boycotting the Chinese Communist Party's genocide Olympics. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF1IQ86pwYduBBq33LrMKFZcXZ8MakN09c62PZ9rj_tdVju7VHDo2oOrNP5ngOB88b71j4Gr9AhRKgLouTvmEc0HhzRmM0EmQY93cNkLBHv_TvtVBWY9Am-1GER7GyfMP4oiZgAl0kNa-MVC2oxg9_a6Ki341Bm2d8L5D1Rlt6KIbBSuUryKCjRp3ABGJTP4S0tytER_inx70PrO16YUY_HY1JRtX4U0Fy-lDJ_HhLidNDxzKB4aaeLD0VOBmaIvXvJ) ****Team Britt Dominates Senate Race Fundraising**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2ec5611c832242898c215a73e3fd795f&_e=GoBOOj0jClZ_jCJzBOHBf_ZfWTvqH8HbOvFtRlL8LOXM8frI2WsXLTuz4mH5coF1ZF29Id0GPX-_9M_3pEVE7c_UqZq6GA4utpdaVobpD79J0VtrwPI1jIQtMRAhb5JZ2MWSDqEvSFPy28ye3Pa9MPKX4QOa_cqKepL7V2SjC3DXuidVSoUbKREmUNuIXvNaprvYYNLQO51Y1ZjvPYJoFeBRzrBDwYF6a7k3ME90JGGYedpGTiJtg5FlcR1RRV2NczT5oro22xHECFOifZ3RKX3XTxjmE3zjo0qxKZU1FiyugWl_Xhkf48RfUlk9PcKJ) I am proud that 87% of the money we’ve raised has come from Alabama, and I’m excited and honored that so many hardworking Alabamians are joining our grassroots campaign and this movement to preserve the American Dream! It is clear that families in every corner of our state know that I will always put Alabama first, which is why our campaign is the only one in this race seeing its support coming from Alabama. We completed our first 67-county tour on the campaign trail in December, and we are working nonstop to complete our second such tour before either of my opponents make a dent in their first. I am proud of the grassroots momentum we continue to build and look forward to visiting even more local communities across Alabama as the May 24 Republican primary approaches. As the next Senator for Alabama, I will fight tirelessly to defend our Christian conservative values, safeguard our constitutional liberties and God-given rights, and save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER **Katie Leads in a New Poll Thank you, Alabama! It is clear that our message is resonating and our hard work is paying off. With grassroots supporters like you, we’re going to continue building our momentum every single day through the May 24 primary. Katie’s Thoughts on a New SCOTUS Pick President Biden should follow President Trump's lead on judicial appointments and nominate a Supreme Court justice who will apply the law as written -- not legislate from the bench or bend the law to reach a predetermined result or scratch a personal bias. However, if Joe Biden's Supreme Court nominee is like many of his other judicial nominees, it will be someone with radical liberal views that are bad for Alabama. We need a justice committed to the Constitution and the rule of law, not an unqualified, left-wing activist. President Trump had historic success appointing constitutional conservatives who will help preserve the country we know and love for generations to come. I was proud to stand with him to help confirm judges and justices, and I'll fight to continue this work as Alabama's next Senator. Katie Stands with Border Patrol Officers I stand with the brave border patrol agents who are standing up to their radical political leaders. Christian Leaders Boycott the Olympics I stand with the Christian leaders who are fighting back against China's atrocities. We should be boycotting the Chinese Communist Party's genocide Olympics. Team Britt Dominates Senate Race Fundraising I am proud that 87% of the money we’ve raised has come from Alabama, and I’m excited and honored that so many hardworking Alabamians are joining our grassroots campaign and this movement to preserve the American Dream! It is clear that families in every corner of our state know that I will always put Alabama first, which is why our campaign is the only one in this race seeing its support coming from Alabama. We completed our first 67-county tour on the campaign trail in December, and we are working nonstop to complete our second such tour before either of my opponents make a dent in their first. I am proud of the grassroots momentum we continue to build and look forward to visiting even more local communities across Alabama as the May 24 Republican primary approaches. As the next Senator for Alabama, I will fight tirelessly to defend our Christian conservative values, safeguard our constitutional liberties and God-given rights, and save the country we know and love for our children and our children’s children. Katie Turns 40! Katie’s birthday was on Wednesday! Have you gotten your limited-edition blue Katie Britt hat? ACT FAST to get your hands on the official hat and show your support for Katie in 2022! Snag yours today before they sell out: . Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: **TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

body:
Help me prevent the next one! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a59a98205f83/a-tragic-missed-opportunity-for-oregon?e=7e91be8cad)

| |

| | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=1b5559e9ec&e=7e91be8cad)

---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=98295b97f4&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | Dear Friend, Kate Brown blew it. The governor and Oregon’s Democratic leadership are all talk – they’re completely uninterested in what’s truly important for our State. Intel's decision to invest billions of dollars in Ohio means thousands of good-paying jobs are going there rather than right here in Oregon. As a small business owner and CEO in the semiconductor industry, I know this disastrous decision could have been avoided had our state's executive and her advisors been at the negotiating table fighting for Oregon jobs and Oregon’s working families.

The Oregonian just came out with an article detailing Kate Brown's utter lack of leadership in this regard, writing,

"Ultimately, Brown’s administration made no public proposals of the kind [her deputy chief of staff] suggested. And last month Intel picked Ohio for a major U.S. expansion, promising to spend at least $20 billion and hire 3,000 for two new factories on 1,000 acres."

The article also quoted my response to this news:

"'Despite years of discussion in the Legislature and in the high-tech community about the needs and the enormous advantages of foresight and planning, a lack of government leadership caused this tragic missed opportunity,' Gomez said."

We have to change our State government’s complete indifference to being a partner with business to build our economy. We can only do that by making good choices at the ballot box.

**_If we want a strong recovery from the pandemic, we need to send a business leader to Salem with foresight and a willingness to work hard to bring jobs to our State. If you agree, will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or any amount you can afford to our campaign?_**

---
| [Donate Today!](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=7772c65d8e&e=7e91be8cad "Donate Today!")
---
| It's time to make Oregon a business friendly state once again. I hope I can count on your support.

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor
---
| | | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=61b1c6a298&e=7e91be8cad)

Friend, this news out of Texas has us SOUNDING THE ALARM.

**Voting by mail has ****proved to be safe, secure and effective, election after election, both here in Arizona and across the country.** But now, extremists in Texas have BLOCKED officials from being able to discuss it with voters! It's an obvious, desperate attempt to keep certain voters from being heard, and if we don't act immediately, this kind of voter suppression could be the next big step BACKWARDS for Arizona.
It's clear our state needs a voting rights champion as governor. Since Arizona Republicans lost the 2020 presidential election, they've only lashed out more and more, even going so far as to invite Donald Trump to Arizona for a massive anti-democracy rally to kick off 2022.
