body:
We will navigate a better way! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLywF391RaGOIrg5GpbI29t0UYN5RF7OnIFjsS7xDtwXQlAvNBqT5Gd7z9UBPZGuOCHrQHJQ5FyAB9GuMRlLm_vufKKhOMynnwJc5SI5XM-CmudAidIkiPsX9R5wdV5j9uNp0vnwfO0Yy74_hGm5usy0w3piMIBuFaDESs8XXCY8VbuAlfGBfMVavPrnzyAEbOQCtEIkp1LDaJCVCYN2Xdokw%3D) [__**Add your name to the "Better Way" pledge**__](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLyyfayb-ZfiZdsOx2WLDXackK8Cq_vkhbJBArZ2-KZt90d7Iw_7ZgpWfLJ_T7HOLVpZhZu93P4N-BvEgBJdBbD3JMaH_eCpKNjo3VV6AbxHDmS6FbaESiLda6oOeC1CRdCCMwGpJheflnPR5gjzC_Z4Vt_6bMU1GuF-N80UOtJErdakoYuiG6MpvCik2wBvQbmOFBCfu8YV0EOmmg9XMEf-Q%3D) Hello my friend, Thank you for being a part of this rapidly growing team! Do you agree that our country has an extreme lack of honest and competent leadership? There IS a better way to lead in America and we have already proven it. As a Republican governor in deep-blue Maryland, I've achieved conservative results by bringing people together to advance bold, common sense solutions. We've cut taxes seven years in a row, eliminated a $5.1 billion deficit, rebuilt our infrastructure, lowered the cost of health care, and achieved the greatest economic turnaround in America. Insults do not deliver results. Hyper-partisanship does not deliver results. Putting politics over people does not deliver results. Common sense and unifying leadership will. **Today, I have a[challenge](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLyzfoE-VXa5qHikqW48En6U-rl_st_6ulEKTqupu_sDNaxcADmWVc-vnOyvyAPoyus_r99U41SYJPcXo0zzDwqOTj2V2yTT5QaRznNGTUZZGyn8JP0acTUp4-nVurs58nGwkwMFiUM3mz0QxDc5LV18begMr8ZLkSXKuutkn3XgcwZWEANDgj8Lsda-TOn1CL3gxwP76J-BIYNBAUTSKkOUs%3D) for you.** Join _An America United _and me by adding your name to our pledge to find a [_**better way forward**_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLy_GD46ONoiHfrY1jocTyCbMFgBsytRnW8oMuyM0ySnYmokg7TbHYkH72Y7dgzKLIKc02BWFl1X_i9UW1hpyWIsTGFrKQYYsgaeed3JozxuIMwYlampQ_7pRhN5mnNdH6eeHfN2f9SZ-a-B5dlzXCRvfCJsniGKrqojG_qQwzHqbJYR3Oqg0pNtjlzlODPkOhwZxw2fjyzLUfZlA_0EXOje8%3D) in America's political discourse. It all starts with you! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLy7ygxoi9oP6kBtrkoGmzc7lGnO1oYSdkvOw-CfQexnuOVaUBKbqg8TGLtGg7YO_yes02zMrKL9vBSL9DFliJOZdTr6XLelSy-GaUx1Q4quDrAZ-nDXs7aFsDUhAS8iqTLKANpeGmtXqEugRa8vtACqSR6ScgHlOQ8ae2KdbsYT8ONMPC-bOrC-eDgs-SVs8eSv9f2CNHmIWQYhCHC7F6G_8%3D) This is a challenging time for America, but we **_cannot_** let the obstacles we face defeat us and stop us from fighting for what we believe in.. I've learned this throughout my life. My father was the first Republican member of Congress to stand up to Richard Nixon when the evidence was clear that he broke the law. My Dad was a great example of fighting for what you believed in, regardless of the political consequences. In 2014, no one thought it was remotely possible for a Republican to be elected governor in the most Democratic state in America. But we pulled off the biggest upset in America by bringing people together around an optimistic vision for my state. Just a few months into my term, the worst riots in 47 years broke out in my state's largest city of Baltimore. We brought peace through strength by sending in the national guard to immediately stop the rioting, but we also restored calm by walking the streets of the community and listening to their concerns. Then only months later, I was diagnosed with cancer, but I didn't let it break my spirit. I beat cancer and continued to govern my state with a renewed sense of purpose. _**We need more resolve and backbone in American politics**_ if we ever expect to see more positive results. We need strong leaders to put what is best for the American people over the demands of the extremes. | |
---
Ronald Reagan lived by this famous motto and it inspires me every day:
_“_** _There_** _ _**_is_** _ _**_no_** _ _**_limit_** _ _**_to_** _ _**_what_** _ _**_a_** _ _**_man_** _ _**_can_** _ _**_do_** _ _**_or_** _ _**_where_** _ _**_he_** _ _**_can_** _ _**_go_** _ __
_**_if_** _ _**_he_** _ _**_does_** _ _**_not_** _ _**_mind_** _ _**_who_** _ _**_gets_** _ _**_the_** _ _**_credit_** _.”_
|
---
You deserve better – America deserves and desperately needs strong leadership and common sense solutions. We cannot sit on the sidelines and count on politicians in Washington.

[**Add your name to ****_An America United's_ pledge****in our mission to find a better way to conduct the people’s business across the country.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLyxlnwlwLw-3bIC6OXtE2Yan_lKT2B5rlKah1MDYAsd1VKjX1eH_yPwZvqu14yBqALmrrwWQQ0wsuh0nDA1nYdSt21UUww39tr8ANcDAMFcx2noeZ8vIB1E_O73dwGiHmPYJGBD94unVhsPOFFq_78NT-OV_mChXH3-Ogp0XU0vL5ha5V6IvIX-msLFnW6izIzsMGPbcD_8crms24YWIqDIo%3D)

We can do this. I need your pledge today.

Sincerely,

**Governor Larry Hogan**
[**TAKE THE PLEDGE – JOIN AAU TODAY**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ddf8f775159044e5b0c8421dec398418&_e=YCka2q4egoOH8Y-mKn8dc9j0ZhW8y7tkozS3PPRkz9T9CCy7D-aojGmWhuajg_5SDZ4ynTkBDSklCWUfpCKLyx2Wq_X5pgO1cDTFyapv2BGBz1uzpemCOF5bNc99Sah5SN4P3TIYhcwy5Hj7NK1YS4zBg3Z-A8xXSsh7TuVkbvwNaBfVMicB5HDR6yLNtKqz6q-onfbCEAxfgsy63lMri8-FKtWUphhGrsLeuZAg9Bf97wyID3_8orKlPJ4oy5AZ_9wixGogUToSdszR20BzuTELo5r6M7-_275wZe32HPM%3D)

body:
GOP leadership is FURIOUS
| **Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220204_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1219%2E878179%2EflblXY) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220204_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1219%2E878179%2EflblXY) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220204_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1219%2E878179%2EflblXY)
---
* * *
Team, we’re DISGUSTED by the GOP’s leadership.

**FIRST:** Liz Cheney bravely spoke out and told Trump he’s FULLY RESPONSIBLE for the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. She’s _AMAZING!_

**THEN:** GOP leadership publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to silence her.

**NOW:** Liz Cheney is refusing to back down! Instead of bowing down to Trump, she’s following the FACTS!!
[**But she’s still facing brutal attacks – so we need 35,000 signatures to show Liz Cheney that we stand with her. Will you sign?** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET/?source=VPP_20220204_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1219%2E878179%2EflblXY)

Thank you,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Brown=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Gov Whitmer shut down our economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
According to researchers at Johns Hopkins University, Gretchen Whitmer’s lockdowns had little to no impact on Covid deaths. | | | |
---
| | | _Washington Times, January 31, 2022_
### Lockdowns had little or no impact on COVID-19 deaths, new study shows
---
|
---
| Peter:

I had planned to write to you today about the state of our education system in Michigan, but a blockbuster new study was just released that I feel must be addressed.

According to [researchers at Johns Hopkins University](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=956917b68b&e=0636b97700), Gretchen Whitmer’s lockdowns had little to no impact on Covid deaths.

[_The Washington Times_](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=0817e8980d&e=0636b97700) reports that researchers wrote, “We find no evidence that lockdowns, school closures, border closures, and limiting gatherings have had a noticeable effect on COVID-19 mortality.”

**Think about that.**

Governor Whitmer shut down our economy putting thousands out of work for what?

According to the study, the lockdown had devastating effects.

“They have contributed to reducing economic activity, raising unemployment, reducing schooling, causing political unrest, contributing to domestic violence, and undermining liberal democracy.”

This isn’t from some random Facebook commenter. This is from respected researchers at one of the most prestigious hospitals in the world.

**They further concluded that limited gatherings actually INCREASED COVID-19 mortality**.

This is from the report: “Lockdowns have limited peoples’ access to safe (outdoor) places such as beaches, parks, and zoos, or included outdoor mask mandates or strict outdoor gathering restrictions, pushing people to meet at less safe (indoor) places. Indeed, we do find some evidence that limiting gatherings was counterproductive and increased COVID-19 mortality.”

Peter, as I’ve been saying for that past two years, Whitmer has no clue what she’s doing.

She’s [illegally imposed reckless policies](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=bfaec8ce5d&e=0636b97700) that have destroyed lives.

She [caused untold deaths by forcing nursing homes to accept COVID-19 patients](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=92d693e0e0&e=0636b97700), then **covered up deaths** by [underreporting them by 42%](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=b12e242e24&e=0636b97700).

And, she’s shown herself to be the ultimate hypocrite by [violating her own lockdown and masking orders](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=53aed2f8cd&e=0636b97700).

It’s clearly time for Whitmer to go.

If you’re as fed up as I am, join me. Together we can Dump Whitmer and Fix Michigan.

I’ve put all my chips in the middle of the table. I’m all in. Are you?

We can rebuild our economy, restore the lost jobs, and restore our state to greatness.

_But I need your help to do this._

**Please consider making a generous donation today. $5, $50, $500.** Any amount helps to get us the resources we need to win this race and Fix Michigan.

The momentum is building. The case against Whitmer is clear.

Make a donation today, then volunteer to help.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---

Any amount helps to get us the resources we need to win this race and Fix Michigan. The momentum is building. The case against Whitmer is clear. Make a donation today, then volunteer to help. Thank you. body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdKzxGRsBqrksBAN4aY-4YjOTt_dCpzE1RmwHkM60_0n6aMUJoFkl6rYm-SebvV6MuShSZ_XoEWlZC0fUxruyp9_kObrxpZz7qrXR_Bc3y_x2LMSDapmEOzeJVpK1HG0iQwtwUbcHq7OwvQMJrwinxNZ6B-TWYRfZ5sTPH06UexKa43qy-zRuHdqNRcc_OCdIzU5qRzj7pxrpMFfDhF5zX0pRmrkyHG5-HC46b0zYX9J3GAMZE0wNX7sIJOPO7ioiRCScmQIvNS-6mUOX8z786DzALQHx_Dimj2Of9OJF8gxTYPoeq1-_m5Lx-UFIhoIQJPZg63lokKRKtvkQc008FuBJ_4y_wrWNf5PJsvHD5-Lvv8Tq2c8g0ygX2wN55EWjC2A%3D%3D) | |

**Dear Nancy, China Is Not A Joke 😳**
_Image from Adobe Images_
As we send our athletes into the lion’s den, China is threatening to [spy](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK8I9g1riajjCwMX0uDw3y6QfgpGgBkakSFvu5-RY66yaXsK_m1WBEM1yir84nOAl2_CAPImbzNQBGBfsKDMaEdf7ArdogKkJpI9LuvM_sSvzAKBtxnSGSnj2TaUisuVC0EOGI2wHnoUEVuSnDw3lQUkw_Ot12JRcxcKiZtdhhXdCJQ-1WUhDqpCW8gF8rKXVfOCfXb4MNhycBwzpsYtWrPY448Pz7bgJgAbyJsrCKHOcO_sn_XExxshU__7BG4zILMGoRn61DIRUQdh-EOKMazCxxTaH1b1N5EBJjbsgaHOwO1blpFA_8WTxihL0mdhbWoDKJubRm8W-G6r0bsdhZvKqCLi75uS2EIx-ck1ECw3F) on them and [punish](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK2cBoSXQD8oRGUz3ie_TgSMg96ik9FYPEE64Mrko-FcYx2UtzVTXeiLE5ZUsN13FJoGvvDvR2dlPvTqD4VrSVZTFIuDFZwWm89bvUpa79pHRVdh4Jsa3KDoZgPrAqD9lqx6mbjKRp1f1yzVeI_Gp3AKSK3hJfvefD30IYSLfOJovETikcwgpohsDbDAfqpzOSUww7vXZnvpl3TsqYl1q2QUIejsreM9nFJm6IR470M68jyslyTEbWvkhf1Q190g5Q6TOzSUQ71XkYpdtpxZ0X74NPB-kJgX59Fwrk0xcrT5b13x4NDWojudaUgg_3ya1y5DtGMNuGhpzXCkbSZXZxAq5fRwaAPLVrpyszz3zbNsy1KA1q9gYEq6CiFcd8F1iXA%3D%3D) anyone who dares to criticize the Chinese Communist Party.

And there is plenty to criticize, even denounce.

China is [guilty](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdKz8SqMyo9J8J9ViIsHbP8jH0kVaWC-3zHIsqG9yX2oj2k2aIIJ2o0lAKxRJctAuBjy33cn1uOQA9L2JcSJ5ID7UeYabF9G2cfn4w7-058SZjLlMlSRfe3L7JSYW3pCM1MfWHyN6xrMKkrIMfcnowu9J4w6nuVr_su7mFNgAMMk4lfydJP7W6EIyVp7Fe_pU3yLSC1WOebNHZ4KmBIUyEfMnH07veS-Kg6U0DbhOB8tkexvuHtaWHXFHI5iSWbynI63llaor5-ZQKqtgbVKeCTjqYXA3_WLLxlMVMouHsaZvScNygmZ060MrwfjrxYq0tMRVlhaGm7M8fCckEg-mfL5opB0f5s_3qeT7kc37xiKF_) of a massive genocidal campaign. Millions of Uyghurs are [toiling away](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK1oYu9zw5JPMO6quac838O6pUWPXzeV3tS-9JoTMJPbC-UuborFC_Bs7I-3LszYog3lZQIYt61V6HCHFb6kaMUKNuEl2GiFwr5gl5rUeWZh6X_Mj8TEncaQH6y4DdWlfj2TrCU5YAh5t5TW8YxgjO2I5Z0aKDm9w9y1Ue9jNZVK8jHfs6nctxZzVQ2dNT2P5fqlgyejKpB8S93_6-Cm73isR69WX6FiXNi5s20U9Va7DJ-usy8Yg9r_gCfguRu5rlXK5fq1Hja_Pu_nrMF4ouCr60aJff5yNtIRzcMZbg2INwOOGbUxvunYJ8REisb2DGA%3D%3D) in forced labor camps. Women [undergo](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK6TzPmI-JTAqG1j0sY_cDOQJttYpNY-Z_2vg3F_5vPM3fTo1lk4loq0-TaNUC7fPsyLxS7XL3SETgxJYyZ__C4SKjoecZzQbT5dN_pLPKn47wMTujuc-6Ia02QIXSiFG6BuvdQ94DMI3khvio491pQIq3m24NSzXdM40zbnIQZzmMALjddNz5a-_apHQnIINXUmNLe7OJjjx4Y9cCPWkdpHsmwdN6ed_B5xdFCMaDO3TEV_GFCSoRQxmlq7u9tbTz19ls38EzwFtEkxpScA-Pf7dZDr0ZdxRlSiB41Ek3RksDRmtUtELzR3q7-kVYZDVlins0TE9RadRHLqV2DH1tI08O-x8lDKo5cpC_-ZlcdI4) forced sterilizations and abortions. Anyone who dares to speak out for human rights is arrested, imprisoned, or worse.

My Republican colleagues in the House are serious about taking on the threat that is China. If only my Democrat colleagues agreed...

Pelosi’s 2,900-page [America Competes Act](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK49ix_m6jUoQNBrvddH6LYOLcn_1hn88OphfNBjeu0zJP--BlFl4-WsN8S6RbZ7XnOrR8nA3s2Byu6RWp9nvqq-h_LcpED-kiSbUzBHbPUxYKhkc9lnE4OyHP_3V2QANeVm-yPLRW8baW1K033p6Gk_OiQkDUkT64To_RiQAWFELlFCW3Srk-Z6MM85rZHukdTH796iKd0W3sMRjMp8wWXk2FANc9ie2rCnRADuYEBENk38xwOe357S9IO9spwsrIRArogn-OOyzzddLr83gtNM%3D) is a joke. If you thought the “infrastructure” bill lacked infrastructure, just wait till you read this.

What should have been a bill to thwart China’s growing power and protect American industry from Chinese interference is nothing more than a sop to the woke left.

First, let’s talk about what the bill _doesn’t_ do. It doesn’t impose sanctions on the Chinese Communist Party. And it does not hold China accountable for its role in fomenting a global pandemic and lying about it. Second, the bill [throws](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdKxOit-jSlMCb8y7zbIcCdAKwMQx-3_ZuA2mj9kxC5f87bfCpbxHBUQRnV4c44ZCpe4vij9oN4JW1mIL6vllbRskerzU-ykx_0cr09kd3b4M7RNsKAAK9sfSJ7MMG2t0aQPLMs4N-GdYg7_R6wcqvqtSQHyGfgkEEoWnhA0koO9KrT8AAzE2vZ3EU90OO95W3K8lwS9XbA2vOqSk6t4zsDFmSnqIhW6LuKGEQ73Oo9-sRRZ8RgJ25m78uh-ZjFt4p3zhnkDWbxivbuhHLhyo0gl8oFWoq9aOU-zIw8Mor9XdwWsWZt1UuWHrVZfQ4glKRXJH5-eMwkGHmsvsrX6tiM02qB9dfhlkHRg6UxkU6VotYUTrgeAvrvT8zTXPGZYm9NA6SzVucfJnDAxVzWUmrEf0%3D) billions of dollars at unrelated issues—like climate change—that have nothing to do with national security and fail to provide safeguards that prevent China from stealing our data.

Hard pass.

Republicans have offered concrete solutions. The Republican Study Committee recently [wrote](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK37Flck4H0SFB82SdnzvDARH6VVEX59QP-0MeqhTi7FDprgvoOesTCmW9ZmILLlewmj6PA0VqKrU15KwLAG3aM8H1y91UrrBBRFCwTya3Xsmh1tKfVO0eS1ieosbgjO2OKhmL1L1z6GaGa3F9jmJLpkFTcxNN3IUFsA-OrCHeenjVW6icTZ9rrU_5mSPKHjX8fUplKH8g2VlGSfcpQSMls5HGIIilvj_d-oYdwCnpe0WtS5m4CQPY_F7Xeh2rGX8_3AXY5cPKwprVTk1sI2P3mQYeRy-O1NK4OWHwD4mY8dNYz6HcGWejZK1o2vvsLmI85m6I2e0fMtbqLw32jq36aU%3D) an alternative proposal that addresses China’s growing and dangerous influence in matters of national security, education, commerce, data security, intellectual property, medical supply chains, COVID-19 mismanagement, and human rights.

It’s time to take China seriously, because, God knows, China is taking us seriously.
|

**A Century To Celebrate 🎂**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK6qOhG80Z3nTPaDqMWNzxHQVnYwkGNjJsXIbmpwV58Rc5S_Aq2r2hkzRCHTWC54vmoEIglSfOUOucRwI8LFVvsvYyDTntoCP7OmJMthwLobIzJpaMMpquyZzKW16pvVsUhcCzvgKeyuXajVZGGJxWF8aVGErEvYu1toU1E2NWnKHfyRCA-uYs_LZ19dQeBGWnBdXE714wYLasU-Hhf4xAq_lVDOFRQOgY8sVH0yRznOPfmXfBRxjcvpNfwh4oC9R0BMCPhpAIutfjsSac4jVRjxHNf_xaO3d9CoaxD-uUdjsu7He6mLoiHZtKCdVR3XQAg%3D%3D)
_Image courtesy of WATE_
Every birthday is worth commemorating, but this week my office had the honor of taking a small part in a milestone 100th birthday celebration for a very special Knoxville resident, Fuad Mishu.

Fuad turned 100 on January 18 of this year. He spent his first 60 years in Baghdad, Iraq, where he was born. He spent the last 40 years living out his American Dream, here in Tennessee. [Through hard work, sacrifice, and a lot of love, this proud American helped all seven of his siblings and three of his children migrate right here to the Knoxville area.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=53448acf1ba942e39c0e3a978c538a2f&_e=3kTNY9mQRTDUw7T6YwAdK6qOhG80Z3nTPaDqMWNzxHQVnYwkGNjJsXIbmpwV58Rc5S_Aq2r2hkzRCHTWC54vmoEIglSfOUOucRwI8LFVvsvYyDTntoCP7OmJMthwLobIwrOZpOfZewpF01yZGWwFOhlaSU9SSNTQ5GcmAR5DX_iP_JQgf8UjYz-30rHe0vpQepHbfpbNtx3I22iYyfAl6UcI-ZpKIPcUFKXbh3psW0oNWgz_RsIVlNr86YQub56pBd2YfCtUuPvamrNwPowwUbrHzVbPS1J-nxuszvqOdvkI_8y37Bw5IVfiWHUCj-FH0NAR_uYe9fr5_bp3PQJUNg%3D%3D)

Happy birthday Fuad!

Hard pass. Republicans have offered concrete solutions. The Republican Study Committee recently an alternative proposal that addresses China’s growing and dangerous influence in matters of national security, education, commerce, data security, intellectual property, medical supply chains, COVID-19 mismanagement, and human rights. It’s time to take China seriously, because, God knows, China is taking us seriously. | A Century To Celebrate 🎂 Image courtesy of WATE Every birthday is worth commemorating, but this week my office had the honor of taking a small part in a milestone 100th birthday celebration for a very special Knoxville resident, Fuad Mishu. Fuad turned 100 on January 18 of this year. He spent his first 60 years in Baghdad, Iraq, where he was born. He spent the last 40 years living out his American Dream, here in Tennessee. Happy birthday Fuad! Product Of The Month 🛍 | Just For Fun 🎉 → You can lead a horse to water... 😆🐎 () → A win for the ENTIRE team 🤗💪 () → This officer deserves this gift and so much more 🏈👮 () | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Hello,
Donald Trump came back to Iowa to endorse my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, and that’s a scary thing for democracy. Let me explain why.
After Donald Trump was elected in 2016, I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 40 years. I knew what Donald Trump was, and I was not going to be used as a prop for the political purposes of an irrational demagogue. **Never did I imagine, though, that we would witness what happened on January 6th.**
Thankfully, our democracy prevailed that day, but I fear things may be in a more dangerously precarious position than ever before. Donald Trump’s minions are already back in Iowa gearing up for a comeback in 2024. Trump is once again using division to consolidate support from lapdog-ishly weak-willed Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley.
**If Republicans take back the House and the Senate in 2022, what stops them from overturning the election results in 2024 like they nearly succeeded at doing in 2020?** The only assurance we can bank on is a Senate led by tough, seasoned, stalwart Democrats – ready to defend our democracy against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
Senate control hinges on my race here in Iowa. But we’re facing a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and right now we’re still very short of our $13,500 goal and what we need to win.
**If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect not only our Democratic majority in the Senate but also our very democracy, I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Honoring Black History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
This month, we look back with gratitude and honor the contributions of Black Americans. |
\- Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBqu2KwqgsJOhMHO0OHxXw6ngawk3eP25jsFGPSwULK-lxlH67gVPWNH7ATl8u_LRzDaLjLg9yJqo586AjyLnoty1s50A2Lg8L_Cog9cBLqBwrQd3vP5tbmt8bA95Q_laflna0crpwGhz_wGVrd6MH5Mqq03tpNeqrPhPuB7lYK-pWwkfaPLBfMeAcCnlRIGdkrKm17gPsFXrnZDsxBfoFnSttoQqvcyn80MJTVgoTOk7xHU7ql0F53BP0Aq0EIKrNwPFzxYnWDgAuvobT1_yjl7Shug4ZVfs8o76mMvEw6xN/3ja/adYqFZy1Rb-EQQJ3JhLUDg/h0/i1oc_2QH7EWTF1qku2bwi0doKr_r9UhijdXokFfj0VM)

| | Team,

February marks **Black History Month** , when we as a nation celebrate generations of Black Americans whose patriotism and courage have enriched our communities and strengthened our democracy.

This is a special time to celebrate the innumerable contributions of Black Americans to both Ohio and the nation. We ponder progress made and gain inspiration for the work that remains.

We recommit this month and always to justice, equality, and unity in fulfillment of the American Dream for ALL.

Each of us in our own way can honor the words of Lorain, Ohio’s native daughter Toni Morrison, who wrote, **“the function of freedom is to free someone else.”**

This Black History Month, we join all Americans to lift up the innumerable contributions, beautiful legacy, and bright future of the Black community and to continue our work to heal the wounds of all our brethren.

Sincerely,

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBqu2KwqgsJOhMHO0OHxXw6kemSvA-eiyNXXJp8fTMMTSOJJRjqJmhZ3BIJowAQkgRCu1LxdsfK9ud1ww07k5JewGljczaZjGrrpmDLJFjcC4wLrQ9gy1-aNW8vLbNOX8bT603MB7eV6spPJWnUe2vx7_BGG1kK-ywODZr1tcXwGc-85ZTixY7M7YXrXf-tReeqgAw5LiACFIsx2S6wKU-EUGFiY-xNz21x-DF7NclRvAr5Xid9CN65-Fc5AAJO0FSGFq5hPNOHoSXYdDZzcV9bfyVlAxfE6gcg6c2Ntu7JmI/3ja/adYqFZy1Rb-EQQJ3JhLUDg/h1/EkTNBPv-bLwUhwSf3POu6YP7S4AEDyCnm5nDpXnYWbA)
\-- Marcy Kaptur

clean_body: This month, we look back with gratitude and honor the contributions of Black Americans. | \- Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, February marks Black History Month , when we as a nation celebrate generations of Black Americans whose patriotism and courage have enriched our communities and strengthened our democracy. This is a special time to celebrate the innumerable contributions of Black Americans to both Ohio and the nation. We ponder progress made and gain inspiration for the work that remains. We recommit this month and always to justice, equality, and unity in fulfillment of the American Dream for ALL. Each of us in our own way can honor the words of Lorain, Ohio’s native daughter Toni Morrison, who wrote, “the function of freedom is to free someone else.” This Black History Month, we join all Americans to lift up the innumerable contributions, beautiful legacy, and bright future of the Black community and to continue our work to heal the wounds of all our brethren. Sincerely, \-- Marcy Kaptur | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? **** | **** **** **** **** h ** | | Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Contributions may also be mailed to: KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS P.O. **Arizona Republican Electors Suddenly Under Attack Now for Choosing Trump in the 2020 Election**
| |
---
| |
---
| | | | Democrats are suddenly now attacking 11 Republican Arizona electors for choosing Donald Trump to receive Arizona’s electoral votes over a year ago, shortly after the 2020 presidential election. The Democrat-controlled U.S. House committee investigating the raucous protest at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 issued subpoenas on January 28 for some of the Republican electors in seven swing states that submitted both a Republican slate of electors along with a Democratic slate, including two Arizona Republicans.

name: Peter Welch
subject: A Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Climate change is already here, and we need to act. I’m proud to have the support of the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund, which just endorsed our campaign this week.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=96%2E61531%2Ev8Z9kT)
Hello,
I’ve lived in Vermont for over 40 years, and each home has been on a dirt road.
When I want to go hiking, or now, in the winter, cross-country skiing, all I have to do is step outside my door. It’s one of the best parts about living in Vermont — how easy it is to enjoy the scenery and breathe the fresh air.
And I know Vermonters across the state are environmentally conscious. We want to preserve the nature that surrounds us for our kids, grandkids, and all future Vermonters.
Climate change is here, and we feel the effects with each passing month. This past December was our warmest December ever on record. This January was the coldest January on record. Floods and droughts are now Vermont’s most likely natural disasters, and expected to increase. A warming climate means the Vermont ski season could be shortened by as much as one month if we don’t curb emissions in the next few years. Lake Champlain temperatures increased between 2°F and 7°F, and with it the increase in algae blooms and beach closures.
These changes may seem small, but droughts and floods have an extreme impact on the future of our farms and towns. Beach closures at Lake Champlain are already impacting our ability to enjoy Vermont’s natural resources, and a shorter ski season will take a significant toll on our economy. Climate change affects us all, which is why we need to take collective action.
[**If you’re ready to enact a Green New Deal and do everything we can to protect our earth for generations to come, add your name right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-green-new-deal?source=em_20220203_p_p_gnd&t=3&akid=96%2E61531%2Ev8Z9kT)
I’m proud to fight for a Green New Deal in Congress — we need to make bold, systemic changes to work to combat climate change. **That’s why I’m proud to have the support of the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund, which just endorsed our campaign this week.** They understand the urgency of building a clean energy future, and I know that together we can get this done for Vermonters and folks across the country.
It’s clear we don’t have the luxury of time on our side — and protecting our climate for generations to come is one of the most urgent challenges we face. It’s why I’m running for Senate, but I can’t do this alone.
[**Add your name to say you’re in this fight for a Green New Deal, and let’s work together to make it happen.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-green-new-deal?source=em_20220203_p_p_gnd&t=4&akid=96%2E61531%2Ev8Z9kT)
Thanks for taking action,
Peter

---

This is urgent, folks.
We just got word that the North Carolina Supreme Court struck down Republicans’ partisan gerrymander and has ordered the Legislature to redraw maps in the next two weeks.
I’m hopeful that the Republican-controlled Legislature will use this as a second chance to uphold the will of the people with fair maps. But I won’t stay silent if the GOP abuses the system _for a second time._
Republican Madison Cawthorn has made clear that he has plans for an extremist takeover of North Carolina, and it starts with installing his hand-picked candidates. It’s anti-democratic and wrong.
The only folks with the power to choose who represents us should be North Carolina voters and North Carolina voters alone.

name: Morgan Harper
subject: NEW: Tim Ryan’s shady PAC dealings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
We just heard about this terrible insider politics move by our opponent.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220204-620-footer-ak&t=2&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)
This is huge.
We JUST heard: Back in December, Tim Ryan’s campaign ran dozens of ads attacking Senator Joe Manchin for his opposition to Build Back Better — but at the SAME TIME, his campaign accepted THOUSANDS of dollars from Manchin’s PAC and other PACs connected to him.
**This sort of two-faced, insider politics is exactly what we’re running to put an end to.** You’ll always know exactly where I stand — and that’s a YES on Build Back Better, a YES on voting rights, and a YES on killing the filibuster. After this news, I don’t know if you can say the same about my opponent.
**[If you’re done with corrupt insider politicians like Tim Ryan, rush a contribution to our grassroots-funded campaign right now to stand up to him.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24910?t=3&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24916?refcode=em20220204-620&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)**
Tim Ryan tries to paint himself as a fighter for the working class, but he took money from Manchin’s PAC that comes straight from big banks and defense contractors. **To me, actions certainly speak louder than words.**
We need a real champion for the working class representing Ohio, and that’s why I’m running for Senate. **[I won’t accept one dollar from corporate PACs (or from Senator Manchin, for that matter), so if you’re with me, contribute any amount to our grassroots campaign today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24910?t=23&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)**
Thank you,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24910?t=24&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220204-620-footer&t=25&refcode2=620_90090_YT2lhc&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=620%2E90090%2EYT2lhc)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

This sort of two-faced, insider politics is exactly what we’re running to put an end to. You’ll always know exactly where I stand — and that’s a YES on Build Back Better, a YES on voting rights, and a YES on killing the filibuster. Peter, Earlier this evening, NC’s Supreme Court ruled that the GOP’s congressional and legislative drawn maps are an unconstitutional gerrymander. We’ve seen Republicans do this before. name: Fetterman HQ
subject: good new and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We won’t let the GOP buy Pennsylvania.
#
Derek, do you want to know how freakin’ competitive this race is?
OK, think about it this way. The most recent Senate election in PA saw over $13 million spent on ads the entire race. That’s a *lot* of money, right?!
Well, the total spent in PA this cycle is already nearing $20 million. With three months to go until _the primary._
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42899?refcode=em20220204-4460&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)
**Derek, this is shaping up to be the most expensive election in state history.**
**Here’s the bad news:** Most of those millions are being spent by Republicans + their super PACs, because they’re ready to spend basically anything to hold onto PA’s open Senate seat + stop us from securing our Democratic Senate majority.
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42899?refcode=em20220204-4460&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)**
**Here’s the good news:** You’re part of a first-of-its-kind grassroots movement — we’re talking folks from all 67 PA counties and 50% of U.S. zipcodes — that has what it takes to go up against the GOP’s money machine.
It’s truly _incredible_ how much power we have in our numbers. As long as folks like you pitch in a few bucks whenever you can, it adds up to be more powerful than self-funded GOP millionaires and the lobbyists writing them six-figure checks.
**[So, will you make today the day you chip in $5 to support John Fetterman, Derek? We need your help to win this race and guarantee our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42899?refcode=ema20220204-4460&t=3&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42899?refcode=em20220204-4460&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)**
We won’t let the GOP buy Pennsylvania in 2022. Not when CNN ranks PA the #1 Most Likely to Flip State. John is the candidate to flip this Seat, and we’re the team that’s going to make it happen.
Thank you, thank you, thank you. 🙏
— Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220204-4460-footer&t=23&refcode2=4460_434096_QO0crz&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4460%2E434096%2EQO0crz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Team,
In this day and age, campaign finances are very complicated. That’s why Jack Ballard has a specific branch of his campaign team dedicated to ensuring finances are in order. Jack is running for Congress not because he thinks he’s above the law – but because he wants to make it work better for all of us.
On the other hand, our current Representative – Matt Rosendale – doesn’t feel the same way.
He’s actually in a lot of trouble right now because of exactly that:
[](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f98eec56ca9f4318af4875d7f9da982e&_e=NpTpU151UwZM5PKwZUdsFNKJotFkeDtY1zh_elq6zDRVoF5upIL87Mb9qZtWBXNGMknWbZzWSYilN6IixkAtm1YkpCEtjyP97HMQdNkeRb-uaKTT3NjGbyE1kpKjsfdF7Q3hebfuy_X5VihJviNyC0z92e_3i7oCq60jYyFyV9udTEohCg-mDWCp3rn1b_OfWycYM1a3nTgjxc3dbJ6-kiq54LTjjiOZg2LdAtRm4MJxUJKAmpeJdcwzeiDeY-d7bYT3ClR6_s__mgYiVPdOLi5tFNAmQ5-75TZyrXFTHKaiH5mcFVaJnYgBFcqA6CKC6LG6ZiqqLGD5kC3mHHNiJjVrOKIHf_hgIK1kEBsaDBWCtAufJTk0Nvj7vTodt5pUi5CYbir8tLZSBhD0A49rZMkF0eslLQOtB568nTdrI7gLi1lkMhUFh-ItZUtk3D34IhV5C-SG8PjiYwPRJp6wj08eaRBKWh6C9DoG4bfQwRr0TH2Uf4zW7t_hr2rvfFPZ)
You might have heard about this back in February. But there’s new news on the case:
[](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f98eec56ca9f4318af4875d7f9da982e&_e=NpTpU151UwZM5PKwZUdsFNKJotFkeDtY1zh_elq6zDRVoF5upIL87Mb9qZtWBXNGMknWbZzWSYilN6IixkAtm1YkpCEtjyP97HMQdNkeRb-uaKTT3NjGbyE1kpKjsfdF7Q3hebfuy_X5VihJviNyC0z92e_3i7oCq60jYyFyV9udTEohCg-mDWCp3rn1b_OfWycYM1a3nTgjxc3dbJ6-kiq54LTjjiOZg2LdAtRm4MJxUJKAmpeJdcwzeiDeY-d7bYT3ClR6_s__mgYiVPdOLi5tFNAmQ5-75TZyrXFTHKb10x7QtQ7gSeX-vHhUhDc9Ahn7b61IoOaAtUx6iyrR5IIIRC8nrjT8qQockEhBJft0XQHHFqsoKmIrtcUQWqxi3V8klUn_OiejyqKP0Kzt0ez9cbQHT5fQG6ikFEenK5_0nVTJ99t1pHwmsisbepu_np9xU5xAjYmT7eoUZ9E9nP3w56wf5lu3ESez2-cGoptDha_cfN_-QP8wU6JKRFg0)
_“U.S. Rep. Matt Rosendale is asking a federal court to throw out a lawsuit accusing the Montana Republican and the National Rifle Association of an elaborate 2018 funding scheme that allegedly produced nearly $400,000 in illegal in-kind 2018 campaign contributions.”_
Matt Rosendale clearly thinks he’s above the law.
**In response to this latest news, we’re launching a 48-hour fund to defeat him, starting NOW! We have to replace Matt with a real Montanan who adheres to basic election laws.**

clean_body: DONATE HERE TO HELP JACK BALLARD REACH HIS JANUARY FUNDRAISING GOAL! Folks, It’s no secret that our Representative, Matt Rosendale, still stands in | | | | Team, In this day and age, campaign finances are very complicated. That’s why Jack Ballard has a specific branch of his campaign team dedicated to ensuring finances are in order. Jack is running for Congress not because he thinks he’s above the law – but because he wants to make it work better for all of us. On the other hand, our current Representative – Matt Rosendale – doesn’t feel the same way. He’s actually in a lot of trouble right now because of exactly that: You might have heard about this back in February. But there’s new news on the case: “U.S. Rep. Matt Rosendale is asking a federal court to throw out a lawsuit accusing the Montana Republican and the National Rifle Association of an elaborate 2018 funding scheme that allegedly produced nearly $400,000 in illegal in-kind 2018 campaign contributions.” Matt Rosendale clearly thinks he’s above the law. In response to this latest news, we’re launching a 48-hour fund to defeat him, starting NOW! We have to replace Matt with a real Montanan who adheres to basic election laws. Thank you, Ballard for Montana Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

name: Tim
subject: How to deal with a bully
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2252%2E3611125%2EOC96cu ][IMG]

Folks,

My right-wing opponent, Josh Mandel has been hurling attacks and insults
my way.

He called me "soggy" and said I had “small hands like marshmallows” ...is he
serious?

If this is the best Mandel can do—we’re well on our way to winning this
race and flipping Ohio blue. None of his attacks can distract from the
fact that I’ve spent my life delivering for hardworking Ohioans.

Josh Mandel is a big bully with big-money backers. But, he's not
invincible—and the best way to silence a bully is to BEAT him (at the
polls).

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7313?t=1007&akid=2252%2E3611125%2EOC96cu ]These attacks from Mandel and his GOP buddies will only grow more
unhinged. To flip this seat and expand our Democratic majority in the
Senate, we need the funds to fight back ASAP. Can I count on you to have
my back and chip in?

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Trump Leadership Poll Request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
VOTE NOW -- I want to hear what you think. Is President Trump still the leader of the Republican Party? We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently, my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. With voters turning their backs on Henry Cuellar due to his refusal to support progresssive policies along with him being investigated by the FBI, **progressives like Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are lining up to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress.** But we can’t bet our chances of winning simply because voters are questioning Cuellar’s ability to lead and his ties with foreign interests. He just released his FEC report and has $2.3 million in campaign cash, thanks to his corporate donors. **88% of House races were won by the top spending candidate in the last election.** So we need to see a huge surge in fundraising to come out on top and send Jessica Cisneros to Congress. _Are you with us, Peter?_ [_**With just 10 days until early voting, will you contribute $5 or any other amount you can to unseat Henry Cuellar and send Jessica to Congress?**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCkrH4M6rqmJkPB1qAXyiJgKedd0-B4PHYEu68HMj8CJ2lRTngGdoOyVCyjdKAmsRSdDce3UoWwNpFpACFuBm0jKIs1itb7oUB5J2qbPNImBabszV96yl3GWNYhJ9X_3MLPe8lLwKVY9XSFCmiZGUbmCUZtoJww_n_Fp2IQhtk8HceQFASxXlthu8IvUyJF5tXoiayx_V-whpN86APowMOk8UbvagRL3PjOEXBwbb2lglno7EVo-FhYiPMqTAk3wVLsTsr4PfOpEswnhoC4YdOeULOCVm-MyajJyT8QnJ5RhlfxE_BLocULvgjW0s_55gUlGbJom-nELqRZsgxDFQakhd8Z8vRmABEpUFK5kzpuOF-8V-Tec0dPB_36WcGExxYn9cwh6WB0BAnbiuDvzfgIaYCf_po7Z-ZNAXL8ET9Q_s/3ja/N1YaQlKXQz2mzOMTRCbMLA/h1/4ZVvBC4Ky4hEwdJec7MpgKa5IbPwIeuvW6hUC36PHs8) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCkrH4M6rqmJkPB1qAXyiJgKedd0-B4PHYEu68HMj8CJ1kB-rDpApT09NdH59vt68KRiiG7WCKwL4sVnHj82UuW6rZGeZIEpsJZS8zIMDEJNjbVBl-SrOB1WfmJ5DMp7ocycVXus__1lFVllvP__56XEz0T7Jt24VLsevNERsmas5LMqgidPmLwjf7Zr4EJk9lwm3tS_G9MCF5M_Z25eb5qd4SdkdBymw64fLff_Umo9_lvINhdUoPDi1RxB16IRhwng85e4MXTtOWs60VnjdOiNWdbxPjaTnkqBT0kT4OwDNH5zVIPBYmFO_YDUj-tUpEUbEuz4AkoO0UfRJjQc4LBEE0FX0m_NgP6PuoUh1F58Z6zxDNEk1TRJdeUt6HTBD6Gd0kbuUM8Gteqwodttqz1yrtCUzL79DnGjIeUxPyCB8/3ja/N1YaQlKXQz2mzOMTRCbMLA/h2/HEprGYlQ59Hkg8F3gjPT5K_YmZTFXOer0cHFj11LS1E) Henry Cuellar claims to be a “Democrat”, but his actions say otherwise:
* He received hundreds of thousands of dollars from Republican donors and national conservative groups.
* He campaigned for a Tea Party Republican Congressman facing a Democratic woman right here in Texas in the 2020 Election.
* He’s against a person’s right to choose and voted against the Women’s Health and Protection Act (WHPA) that would have codified Roe v. Wade into federal law.
* And he’s voted with Trump nearly 70% of the time while he was in office. He voted Trump’s way on immigration, guns, and a border wall. **It’s no wonder Cuellar is dubbed as Trump’s favorite Democrat, Peter!**

It’s safe to say after 16 long years of Henry Cuellar’s weak leadership, South Texans want a representative that will fight for them in Congress. **They’re tired of watching Cuellar team up with Republicans to take down progressive policies.** As a human rights attorney who grew up on the border, she knows what’s best for communities that have been ignored for far too long. That’s exactly why AOC is coming to Texas to support her. Jessica is fired-up to fight for South Texans in Washington, D.C — but for her to win, she needs your support. clean_body: Progressives are lining up to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress | | | Peter, in just 10 days , South Texans will begin casting their votes on who’s the best Democratic candidate to represent TX-28 in Congress. With voters turning their backs on Henry Cuellar due to his refusal to support progresssive policies along with him being investigated by the FBI, progressives like Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are lining up to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress. But we can’t bet our chances of winning simply because voters are questioning Cuellar’s ability to lead and his ties with foreign interests. He just released his FEC report and has $2.3 million in campaign cash, thanks to his corporate donors. 88% of House races were won by the top spending candidate in the last election. So we need to see a huge surge in fundraising to come out on top and send Jessica Cisneros to Congress. Are you with us, Peter? Henry Cuellar claims to be a “Democrat”, but his actions say otherwise: He received hundreds of thousands of dollars from Republican donors and national conservative groups. He campaigned for a Tea Party Republican Congressman facing a Democratic woman right here in Texas in the 2020 Election. He’s against a person’s right to choose and voted against the Women’s Health and Protection Act (WHPA) that would have codified Roe v. Wade into federal law. And he’s voted with Trump nearly 70% of the time while he was in office. He voted Trump’s way on immigration, guns, and a border wall. It’s no wonder Cuellar is dubbed as Trump’s favorite Democrat, Peter! It’s safe to say after 16 long years of Henry Cuellar’s weak leadership, South Texans want a representative that will fight for them in Congress. They’re tired of watching Cuellar team up with Republicans to take down progressive policies. As a human rights attorney who grew up on the border, she knows what’s best for communities that have been ignored for far too long. That’s exactly why AOC is coming to Texas to support her. Jessica is fired-up to fight for South Texans in Washington, D.C — but for her to win, she needs your support. We've got all the momentum — so let’s finish what we started, together. — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Charles Booker
subject: Peter, I understand what it means to struggle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

I want to tell you why I’m the candidate that can beat Rand Paul.

After you finish reading my explanation — [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220204?refcode=em20220204-1541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1541_346206_ESRLfV&akid=1541%2E346206%2EESRLfV ]I hope you can chip
in $5 to support our grassroots campaign. This election is
the best chance we’ve had in years to turn Kentucky blue and with your
help, we can get the job done.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220204?refcode=em20220204-1541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1541_346206_ESRLfV&akid=1541%2E346206%2EESRLfV ]Chip in to defeat Rand Paul →

I’m not the first person to run against Rand Paul. Plenty have tried, but
Rand has remained in power for over a decade despite neglecting his duty
to legislate for the people who elected him.

Why? Well first off, Rand has a lot of rich friends who are happy spending
millions in dark money donations if it means Rand will help protect their
interests in Congress. Second, Rand knows that most Kentuckians aren’t
happy with his work. So he’s worked very hard to disenfranchise our votes
and suppress our voices.

That means if we want to replace Rand Paul, we need to build a widespread,
diverse grassroots coalition of voters. We need to organize in every
corner of Kentucky and center our conversations around the challenges too
many families in Kentucky face right now.

I’m ready to be that candidate. Mostly because I know firsthand what it’s
like to struggle. I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost
family members to gun violence. I am still paying off my student loans.

That’s why this campaign is proud to advocate for the priorities of
working people. It’s clear seeing the growing momentum on the ground for
our campaign that Kentucky is hungry for this kind of meaningful change.

My story is the story of millions of Kentuckians who are sick and tired of
politicians who continue to ignore us. I know that together, we have the
power this election to replace Rand Paul and make history here in
Kentucky. But I need your support to make this future
possible,
Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220204?refcode=em20220204-1541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1541_346206_ESRLfV&akid=1541%2E346206%2EESRLfV ]Unlike Rand Paul, our campaign relies 100% on grassroots donations
from people like you. Will you chip in $5 right now to help
power our work as we build the biggest grassroots voter outreach program
Kentucky has ever seen?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220204?refcode=em20220204-1541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1541_346206_ESRLfV&akid=1541%2E346206%2EESRLfV ]Contribute $5

Thank you,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220204-1541-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1541_346206_ESRLfV&akid=1541%2E346206%2EESRLfV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1541%2E346206%2EESRLfV

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Team Shedd Updates
subject: Stop the invasion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
It’s time for accountability. Friends, **The US is under invasion from drug cartels who are bringing the fentanyl into our communities that is killing our loved ones.** Meanwhile, Joe Biden refuses to take this threat seriously. As a result, Border Patrol had **TWO MILLION PLUS** encounters with illegal immigrants and there was a **2300% INCREASE****** in encounters on the Arizona-Mexico border last year. Make no mistake this is NOT about immigration. This is about human trafficking and drug trafficking into Arizona and America. name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With the filing deadline for U.S. Senate passed and just 60 days until the start of Early and Absentee Voting, things are shifting into high gear! Jane continues to work hard every day to earn your support and vote by crisscrossing the state, listening to the issues most important to Ohio Primary voters, and advancing her America First agenda every day. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Dominates Fundraising from Ohio Donors** After fourth quarter fundraising reports came in, Jane Timken continues to dominate her opponents in terms of **support from Ohio donors**. She has raised more dollars from more individuals who can actually vote on May 3rd than any other candidate and her support keeps growing each day. In stark contrast to the other candidates in the race, Jane continues to earn the financial support of Ohio donors rather than raising a majority of her money from out of state donors or showing no comprehensive statewide donor base. Here are the numbers: Jane is the only candidate with broad financial support across the state, with over 3,700 individual donors representing all 88 counties in Ohio. Jane’s support boosts an unmatched ground game with Timken County Chairs in all 88 counties and over 180 endorsements from Ohio elected officials and activists. **From the Trail** On Tuesday night, Jane hosted College Republicans from the University of Cincinnati and Xavier University. It was great to see so many young conservatives for important discussions on free speech on campus, education indoctrination, COVID mandates, and more. The future of our Party is strong! [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=fdc26d3608b940078c8f502c5e038b16&_e=YlQUE-UiGHzH8RfkSzHeB4Vx395Y2Pw2En7maDoaQaX6XRq9p46GVuEqAHpnt9HZgyKY2GI1llvglCDsaH5RvmLo_5saEWWNoY6j7fGgbfn-rbAbj5uA0JuuAH1zjs5uYa-Y2-K-rM4blMW32tDJqVDrhluoCYcJEYYpvHQmfUCadd_C-x65rRxU0yEDyazU0XbLE-QNm4J5whwXaj_79tLipCU8DhunAEtz3N6Hm4Md4myIWoLLUR2iB_nGDdMBAnAlvHupY-MvpbT2zhJNGpHe3Mfzh6pKyU3kcJs840_oxUmzfm8jyWFmgwnQF_4qCSFMFKey0jCVbMIYb2xsaQ%3D%3D) On Wednesday night, Jane toured the Muskingum County Sheriff’s Office. The officers are doing incredible work to protect and serve the community. Jane heard about what they face, including the increase in fentanyl on the streets, and how as leaders, we can best support them. Watch more in an interview with the WHIZ by clicking the image below: [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=fdc26d3608b940078c8f502c5e038b16&_e=YlQUE-UiGHzH8RfkSzHeB74pOdcTG1h0DH9gK961acZv1BFW1SXPXfErpINqVt32ViC_rdNH-Z0eY3Av_ISNzfrf3Vqg9OeT51mXJ_GchbJIUTqE3rCjrQCWqTvDZupU844ZQ9WPhXpxQZvInrvGKgxwyUvt-MBXvQwQ9xfLmznz_2PpJv9buEp0P4ksBdkwsiXszzmNpBxWMsKNf_cNweI9iuZlymSVeIShhU6SHsvoPGfPwMoGjENePMg6kTLHQrmvfraQ5Ind9kYv_nQaYA%3D%3D) **Latest Endorsements** The campaign was proud to release another round of endorsements from conservative leaders across the state, bringing our total to over 180 conservative elected officials and activists. A strong testament to Jane’s leadership, we are proud to have these folks on the team. _This Week’s Endorsements_ Omar Tarazi – Hilliard City Council Les Carrier – Hilliard City Council Jim Phillips – Mayor of Amsterdam Bob Brobst – Saybrook Township Patti Alderson – Ohio Republican State Central Committee Member "I am proud to support Jane Timken for the U.S. Senate because she is the pro-family candidate who can defeat the leftist anti-American, anti-parent and anti-teacher corruption and incompetence that has infected our public schools across the country. There are many high-quality candidates in this race who all talk a good game and bemoan the condition of public education, but only one who actually has a plan to solve it. Jane Timken has the leadership and competence to get the job done and for that reason, I am happy to endorse her." - **Omar Tarazi - Hilliard City Council** "As a member of Hilliard City Council, I know how important it is to have leaders with character and integrity representing Ohio. Not only is Jane focused on the right issues - solving the education crisis our kids are facing, combating violent crime in our communities, fighting against the rising cost of living - but she is in this race for the right reasons. Jane will be a strong public servant to secure Ohio's future and fight for Ohio's interests." - **Les Carrier - Hilliard City Council** I hope everyone is staying safe during this weather and has a great weekend! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=fdc26d3608b940078c8f502c5e038b16&_t=M8Rzj1_IDSCQ6b88c6R8lG58YOuxt0aztgZlHuuKkjf-1ok47ENVBC-ZUzgtPJ40AS70UIMw17WQpZ_D2El9lRbmOb1nfnOuCIRxarkAYdF0RDgWY3yk7h_QgVks0qlnWrR2No_64QUDITb2FheKkZd3KJlxN1ERDo7A7lxLkww%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=fdc26d3608b940078c8f502c5e038b16&_e=YlQUE-UiGHzH8RfkSzHeB9H2nuV9QU7ZJAW5niiXxv4BbAaaDmaXLjJWIN70gXrZh32-qP-RLrSRDjhQz6RrmT1BiAFts64E-la3bcgVfTbewG4e9wOjauQgemfbIW2srvX7tlpeFdcL-x_A21W1pMXLQ2W4DG9KjBW0yy3zuNuJk3B8IE5zacqzq7PpxAFW6wPhRiyQ9PkbhQxVTdGrdc7NuUdq2yDIViX_4UWUOksuSWjPqfgs9KvAXXfn2udyTSxyoBFS-XXX4rDJADr6Ytur64l0VA8Yc74vxnnj3G0%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=fdc26d3608b940078c8f502c5e038b16&_e=xilySe-6vaI8lrOmQOMSyCUxmEwh70Rcg9Hk17mkS40BNNLa2TA0Fb427AVVfa1TYgly_9Rduegb9RkWKFjnBvdegN4caw9tF2UwC9SKSREs-fsAfryE94VQhjafNmQiKngSuat5-NF0iUcJzRuX01EKT4G7qdjxU1DEaaCKHXceWmhf9KGSjS3TRq3Ha6aaWDtybXj34fShJP1yr6g7-UCurDK9bfTuA34Bi6BS_JSQ5Y-UPvohyHX8eDBkX5zlJFqP1J_FPbDjpS00caY6gw%3D%3D)

Jane heard about what they face, including the increase in fentanyl on the streets, and how as leaders, we can best support them. Watch more in an interview with the WHIZ by clicking the image below: Latest Endorsements The campaign was proud to release another round of endorsements from conservative leaders across the state, bringing our total to over 180 conservative elected officials and activists. A strong testament to Jane’s leadership, we are proud to have these folks on the team. This Week’s Endorsements Omar Tarazi – Hilliard City Council Les Carrier – Hilliard City Council Jim Phillips – Mayor of Amsterdam Bob Brobst – Saybrook Township Patti Alderson – Ohio Republican State Central Committee Member "I am proud to support Jane Timken for the U.S. Senate because she is the pro-family candidate who can defeat the leftist anti-American, anti-parent and anti-teacher corruption and incompetence that has infected our public schools across the country. There are many high-quality candidates in this race who all talk a good game and bemoan the condition of public education, but only one who actually has a plan to solve it. Jane Timken has the leadership and competence to get the job done and for that reason, I am happy to endorse her." - Omar Tarazi - Hilliard City Council "As a member of Hilliard City Council, I know how important it is to have leaders with character and integrity representing Ohio. Not only is Jane focused on the right issues - solving the education crisis our kids are facing, combating violent crime in our communities, fighting against the rising cost of living - but she is in this race for the right reasons. Jane will be a strong public servant to secure Ohio's future and fight for Ohio's interests." - Les Carrier - Hilliard City Council I hope everyone is staying safe during this weather and has a great weekend! Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

Peter,
Late this morning, the Republican National Committee (RNC) approved a resolution censuring Rep. Liz Cheney & Rep. Adam Kinzinger, the two Pelosi-picked “Republican” members of the sham partisan Jan. 6th Committee. This move by the RNC only further confirms that Liz Cheney has lost her ability to be effective in Congress for the people of Wyoming. She has no allies in the Republican Party, and the Democrats only see her as a temporary and useful tool to achieve their partisan ends. She spends every minute of every day engaged in her personal vendetta against Donald Trump, and that is not why Wyoming sent her to Congress. Wyoming deserves a representative who fights the battles that are important to the people of our state. The Biden administration is waging an all-out war on our way of life and the ability of our citizens to prosper and support their families. We need someone who will fight Joe Biden and stand up for property rights, constitutional rights, and personal freedoms, and who will push against the relentless overreach of the federal government. clean_body: | | | | Cheney censured. | Peter, Late this morning, the Republican National Committee (RNC) approved a resolution censuring Rep. Liz Cheney & Rep. Adam Kinzinger, the two Pelosi-picked “Republican” members of the sham partisan Jan. 6th Committee. This move by the RNC only further confirms that Liz Cheney has lost her ability to be effective in Congress for the people of Wyoming. She has no allies in the Republican Party, and the Democrats only see her as a temporary and useful tool to achieve their partisan ends. She spends every minute of every day engaged in her personal vendetta against Donald Trump, and that is not why Wyoming sent her to Congress. Wyoming deserves a representative who fights the battles that are important to the people of our state. The Biden administration is waging an all-out war on our way of life and the ability of our citizens to prosper and support their families. We need someone who will fight Joe Biden and stand up for property rights, constitutional rights, and personal freedoms, and who will push against the relentless overreach of the federal government. When I am Wyoming’s congresswoman, I will always stand for what’s important to the people of this state. Thank you, Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Wyoming Tough Endorsed by President Trump | | | |

body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_e=NFDaMsSOslJ57foz9J81sC1INxm5RjAIJuZqYjWDqDVPjiUWZQlSLhtJmLYblUfZBqqep3Dx-uxMjC-s8vuMdMyyeYlFpFKmpJnOUhmefFrTOqi9TrF0_OPiHs_MuhA9oZqCWb393W9EzesYxHc8Zse8j0jOaKzWLDvk7KMDCZpYVih7wqjj991HKcMSxpaAPEfC_0oOGLYMAI8vRYNwmjIYI5ZB6zoGiouBGOwJmSaAEX7lsmWfcuUlw0q9Grf7gkLErmI2JMF3MMl3J4h9FuB0A4AdqGHOsc46XFmRy8v0JqalhAMaHy0mnhY3y10-_qGAcP6l4CCuChlr1-ikUJvKBhGQDzHrIlbo7xwMSxw_SV0Dgj7E5UvP3XEHlJD8YiU75GIsFiT0NdhWwDy5iu_f4xlG5-4gNiChgMGxb7I8WvtWHl9-E5RCb8DJ0YT-1bmmLZZAdnFhfOj6SZxpItQ7sKSGSBnG2OVOv5bdZk4%3D)

Fellow American,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[All I'm asking of you today is that you please take a 10-30 seconds to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_e=NFDaMsSOslJ57foz9J81sC1INxm5RjAIJuZqYjWDqDVPjiUWZQlSLhtJmLYblUfZBqqep3Dx-uxMjC-s8vuMdMyyeYlFpFKmpJnOUhmefFrTOqi9TrF0_OPiHs_MuhA9oZqCWb393W9EzesYxHc8Zse8j0jOaKzWLDvk7KMDCZpYVih7wqjj991HKcMSxpaAPEfC_0oOGLYMAI8vRYNwmjIYI5ZB6zoGiouBGOwJmSaAEX7lsmWfcuUlw0q9Grf7gkLErmI2JMF3MMl3J4h9FuHh1ehmuP7Ne9tXtXjRZmv2NZOtG9uOflYxWJtRuV_MonjQc_ePQL1WGcy9kJwdGKB_o9bi44TRtf1MA3sj2t5zPwR9NEAMp1R-jTZ22TnUH8H5W-nEFII0nGFigBdGYRw7TUNcz62FofAkLnmPWVjInH2he5-pf32WOK96lEkya1Gp6sh2TKh7c7tpC8W7hBpSplJkgO1a6-6WZ5UyKQw%3D)**.

As a first generation American, I thank god every day the American Dream is alive and well.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_e=NFDaMsSOslJ57foz9J81sC1INxm5RjAIJuZqYjWDqDVPjiUWZQlSLhtJmLYblUfZBqqep3Dx-uxMjC-s8vuMdMyyeYlFpFKmpJnOUhmefFrTOqi9TrF0_OPiHs_MuhA9oZqCWb393W9EzesYxHc8Zse8j0jOaKzWLDvk7KMDCZpYVih7wqjj991HKcMSxpaAPEfC_0oOGLYMAI8vRYNwmjIYI5ZB6zoGiouBGOwJmSaAEX7lsmWfcuUlw0q9Grf7gkLErmI2JMF3MMl3J4h9Fg6vJCE5ZjxtWjo2_86b9peTNnUlfkfkkDhAqtzzKyvzszjsEJVWtLWcMA16N35sXZV5w43JVuvfvcFOCRM6l91DuwVYy6LD8mK6Lkf2qhsYhJB5lHnekNQ4xervzEjhO49QqCze0MKCFn5qljliMg7GbpR3ZneYCLiOkr7DqlM9R171-IxBB6n1WCy-g7LIra2MRtn7_z7PXFH9aimk21M%3D)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO TODAY >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_e=NFDaMsSOslJ57foz9J81sC1INxm5RjAIJuZqYjWDqDVPjiUWZQlSLhtJmLYblUfZBqqep3Dx-uxMjC-s8vuMdMyyeYlFpFKmpJnOUhmefFrTOqi9TrF0_OPiHs_MuhA9oZqCWb393W9EzesYxHc8Zse8j0jOaKzWLDvk7KMDCZpYVih7wqjj991HKcMSxpaAPEfC_0oOGLYMAI8vRYNwmjIYI5ZB6zoGiouBGOwJmSaAEX7lsmWfcuUlw0q9Grf7gkLErmI2JMF3MMl3J4h9FqG7y1mmatXw6JLwjFO18hXpfiLClNDk1MfBCtM5ASP0sPLJH54meFAdlGtvuapoKTeloEGcwgCxV6x1U4zsWAfuHnIMiU55U4g5PQtzLvpJ9dje1S0wm9ysCdjgmXiSRA_0u5R7YcpnyWOqk8KBFfkfvLBDJdhIqOcjSM60bKFo_gXlvWh5Bu-ODiHViDlNiEVmSauL01V-ecuGIdVT7gI%3D)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** TAKE A CHANCE ON ME>>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_e=NFDaMsSOslJ57foz9J81sC1INxm5RjAIJuZqYjWDqDVPjiUWZQlSLhtJmLYblUfZBqqep3Dx-uxMjC-s8vuMdMyyeYlFpFKmpJnOUhmefFrTOqi9TrF0_OPiHs_MuhA9oZqCWb393W9EzesYxHc8Zse8j0jOaKzWLDvk7KMDCZpYVih7wqjj991HKcMSxpaAPEfC_0oOGLYMAI8vRYNwmjIYI5ZB6zoGiouBGOwJmSaAEX7lsmWfcuUlw0q9Grf7gkLErmI2JMF3MMl3J4h9FjGu3dz1w8UWsyzdTxWqd7lXhmztXnPA6uBL2s2ZyH-CnVBaiyW_hj57qtOy3-ra-_NQhYK8CTnrSgJrGM0XdxHr9ExxFDmQAD05fwP49YCThdn5Xq8caH1YWpLpPNRURSEhXlNuS-WqXabQuaPsGmD5UiosJJxOb9WmmS7Wce-DfGss3d2UUtzGmfjso3lgaeASIGn-tUeKJAenSuZCPks%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_e=NFDaMsSOslJ57foz9J81sC1INxm5RjAIJuZqYjWDqDVPjiUWZQlSLhtJmLYblUfZBqqep3Dx-uxMjC-s8vuMdMyyeYlFpFKmpJnOUhmefFrTOqi9TrF0_OPiHs_MuhA9oZqCWb393W9EzesYxHc8Zse8j0jOaKzWLDvk7KMDCZpYVih7wqjj991HKcMSxpaAPEfC_0oOGLYMAI8vRYNwmjIYI5ZB6zoGiouBGOwJmSaAEX7lsmWfcuUlw0q9Grf7gkLErmI2JMF3MMl3J4h9Fj18jgShdP5LnoY1horNHWDwx0dIhERb7xbpdBnZV9JDdJeG1sUqKSEo0d5RWQIOeuf8mA_hu5I4pKO1rJcNGyVMv2emQZxeOkFGEk_fP1-zH6jotUX0mWos-sZsE5Io5HjNNEZXkGOBVDKU_8OLgjrHkKWREi_P6xfpaqDA6cIB8G51py4zvd20vjuPr3uu8uG_rGAfAYWPGeBpy5TsTzE%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=0c3815f374bf4823963650f0aa0a33a7&_t=9Zv-YLLeA41fg0EfpiuX3t9LUNZ88clPZ6O16KGUslBbPSI2BN-TaZtS1ivfkMTipxZlWfjvzVKRCB2_8Eq_YEgCXJ1r4iiyhy-YVQuukW10-xNbwANHZn7A86uWJ6AuHf3h4jModoGdF13mhza1lMnyv3tvOof0Owcp9zxcDLQ%3D).

subject: Prince William County Sheriff Glen Hill endorses my campaign for Congress
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Patriots,

Sheriff Glen Hill, from my home county, has endorsed my campaign for Congress. I am proud to have his support in this fight to bring common sense leadership back to Virginia’s 10th Congressional District.

While Nancy Pelosi and Jennifer Wexton are soft on crime, I am the opposite. I support our law enforcement officers and ensure they have the proper funding and support to do their jobs. That’s why Sheriff Hill has chosen to support me in this race.

He has seen the work I’ve done in Prince William County, and knows I’ll bring that same fight & tireless drive to the United States Congress. But I cannot do this without your support. Please consider supporting me TODAY in this fight to #TakeBackVA10!

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Radical Activists' "Tent City" in Boise is the Result of Weak Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
"Boise Mutual Aid" is the primary group organizing this 'tent city' protest, and they are known for their anti-police rhetoric. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/02-04-22?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d881f82452&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| Over the last several weeks, state property on the corner of 6th and Jefferson, in front of the old Ada County Courthouse across from the Capitol, has become the site of a protest camp occupied by radical activists taking advantage of the homeless. I have confirmed with Idaho State Police (ISP) that many of the occupants of this camp are not homeless and actually leave the camp at night. During this period, there have been approximately 150 open shelter beds each night at the Interfaith and Boise Rescue Shelter. No one needs to sleep outside in a tent. The activists aren't happy with the shelters, however, because they prohibit the use of drugs and alcohol. "Boise Mutual Aid" is the primary group organizing this 'tent city' protest, and they are known for their anti-police rhetoric, recently posting a picture to their Instagram account showing with baked goods featuring vulgarities targeting law enforcement.
---
|
---
---
| Idahoans do not want to see our cities degenerate into crime-ridden 'tent cities' overflowing with sewage and needles. I have formally called on the governor and the attorney general to enforce the law and evict these lawless protesters from state property. I have spoken with new residents of Idaho from Washington and California who have seen the destruction caused in places like San Francisco and Seattle when liberal leaders refused to take action and keep their cities clean and orderly. Preserving law and order is a key component of upholding Idaho's conservative values. Meanwhile, even as radical leftist activists are trampling on our laws and our landscaping, Idaho's State Board of Education has been circulating this 2022 Idaho Threat Assessment Conference flyer hyping upcoming sessions on the supposed threat of "right-wing extremism" in America.
---
|
---
| More and more, we are seeing how weak leadership in Idaho is leading us down the same failed paths as other states that have gone purple and eventually blue. Idaho is proud of being a 'red' state, yet liberal activists are now engaging in the same kind of lawless campaigns here that have led to violence, arson, and vandalism in other cities. Will Idaho confront these left-wing extremists before it's too late? Given our current leadership, I fear the answer is no. I am running for governor to protect Idaho's conservative values and to preserve law and order from being undermined as we have seen in California, Washington, and other liberal enclaves. We cannot afford to surrender our state to the left or their RINO allies. Will you help our efforts to defend our shared values with a contribution today? Donating [$100](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3bd022c912&e=823fa8e224), [$50](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e29ae14626&e=823fa8e224), or even [$25](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b64edba23b&e=823fa8e224) will help us to keep fighting for our state.
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cfb542c593&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| We can't let Idaho go down the same failed road as San Francisco and Seattle. Together, we will elect proven conservative leaders who have the backbone necessary to fight against these forces and to preserve our values and our way of life.
---
| Sincerely,

Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=05fdc5d2c3&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c0624fb99e&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=62cce973ed&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=07884d893c&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=98db9b6a73&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.

Idaho is proud of being a 'red' state, yet liberal activists are now engaging in the same kind of lawless campaigns here that have led to violence, arson, and vandalism in other cities. Will Idaho confront these left-wing extremists before it's too late? Given our current leadership, I fear the answer is no. I am running for governor to protect Idaho's conservative values and to preserve law and order from being undermined as we have seen in California, Washington, and other liberal enclaves. We cannot afford to surrender our state to the left or their RINO allies. Will you help our efforts to defend our shared values with a contribution today? Donating , , or even will help us to keep fighting for our state. | "DONATE Today!" | We can't let Idaho go down the same failed road as San Francisco and Seattle. Together, we will elect proven conservative leaders who have the backbone necessary to fight against these forces and to preserve our values and our way of life. | Sincerely, Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor | P.S. subject: Did you see this poll?
body:
We are in striking distance! |

| Friend,

Did you see the latest poll in our race? The new Trafalgar poll shows that the momentum is on our side, and we are in striking distance! We can not stop now, we must keep pushing forward!

The Establishment and the Democrat machine are fighting back against us, but hardworking Patriots like you are going to deliver a victory for this campaign. I can’t do it without you. [Will you donate $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to keep our momentum going strong?](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=77eb6f45c3&e=598f6aa24c)

**[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b47b572029&e=598f6aa24c)** Together we will win this race and bring our Georgia values to Washington DC. I will stand up for Religious Liberty, Protect your 2nd Amendment, Finish the Border Wall, and keep taxes low. No dream is too big and no challenge is too great. Together we will take our country back and give you and your families the future you deserve. [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=3dc050e2d3&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=6a5cdcf519&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=d58f5d1c49&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=cc7d7e28e3&e=598f6aa24c) Thank you,
David Curry
