name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Are you ready?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
This is going to be a dog fight! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=f204a4e084024cb8b70ecbb94582165b&_e=MZJS61hTIPh0VwXojeOfB2gcxiVPFmQuVjJ09TzqKUfNw8GhpWIp5cX7FEzMKx7goRqhn_gipGwChbbNNMc4G2SvCANBPoXDhzawwTv4v2pzg_GfZYDnYr21wB5xQlE1grlE_UFzCk-ypyENyUL7CsGAKQYOuTOWwAK5jdRSLctRft3qu6dx17xpCbqJfzjkKYyrkg_gNVfcEmBGXjsqeWsU5Gu-811SQJujp5UBzJz_mg2-rFbwodQE45gGzdsGbSb1Cl6KVlkyGldhXIxZ2pZNiHlqn7FoSlg4hQFxWxOyMh0zrkyV2xkiSNI8aSVzLVIX3mRXqP94PcQ2-VDfWPdaePp772u1o5yNWIXrHKQ%3D) My friend,
**This is going to be a dog fight.** Are you ready? I am. I know we have what it takes to earn the support of 60% of the delegates on May 14th and defeat Tim Walz this November. I will continue to make the case that my successful experience as a small-business owner and as the leader of the conservative, Republican majority in the Senate is the key to returning our state to prosperity and common sense. Together, we have successfully stopped the insane polices of Governors Dayton and Walz — we can stop them for good this November.
We can win, but it won’t be easy. Thanks to your early support, since entering the race, our **per-month** fundraising has managed to lead the Republican field for governor! Your commitment has led us to raise nearly $546k and have more than $460k cash on hand. We're in this for the long haul! As we move forward in this election, **our record is what matters.** I have proven that I can win. I have proven that under my leadership we can get the job done. When Republicans seemed to lose every seat in Minnesota, the Senate kept their majority. Without our Senate majority, imagine the extent of the government takeover we'd be facing! I’m grateful for the endorsement and continued support for governor by the Highway Patrol. I carry with pride the title of the prestigious “legislator of the year award” from both the Chiefs of police and the Minnesota Police and Peace Officers Association (MPPOA), the rank-and-file members. Public safety is the number one issue we face as we work to bring more moderates and independents on our team. Having the support of many of our law enforcement community proves that I have consistently been a champion for the women and men in blue. One thing is clear: **I’m battle tested.** It’s time to take our state back, but first, I have one major hurdle: the Republican endorsement on May 14th. [**Help Get Me Across the Finish Line >> Chip In!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=f204a4e084024cb8b70ecbb94582165b&_e=MZJS61hTIPh0VwXojeOfB2gcxiVPFmQuVjJ09TzqKUfNw8GhpWIp5cX7FEzMKx7goRqhn_gipGwChbbNNMc4G2SvCANBPoXDhzawwTv4v2pzg_GfZYDnYr21wB5xQlE1grlE_UFzCk-ypyENyUL7CpTl9kBBr-bKtDw35zWEttACHyW4VOMDmljk3TT9T1EMGc3bIrI96IGJpsgvU2gi3DD5k94vS5DpM5SlZYxXx8aeYSC7OaeCm1JYipunc4pbxeJBbP07_jdSIV6521wEvElysuJjQ0Fto3vv1bZHA7XvaImiDSvxrI7wxUNQGewULFk4CTNlFsNT2Ny79DzW2kDHjskuXvkQcx9zOyqjcc4%3D) Thank you for your time, effort, and commitment to the movement!
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=f204a4e084024cb8b70ecbb94582165b&_e=MZJS61hTIPh0VwXojeOfB2gcxiVPFmQuVjJ09TzqKUfNw8GhpWIp5cX7FEzMKx7goRqhn_gipGwChbbNNMc4G2SvCANBPoXDhzawwTv4v2pzg_GfZYDnYr21wB5xQlE1grlE_UFzCk-ypyENyUL7CohPQ55lXpPkNkbbByCd9fYKDUc-jMbQHYJfA6W4jNNlgwM0QRoglceNOIvYRqn6lSXFUeajukb8FrEdsalFIJehRy_mWkfrU5bbWhx_QkqmZsS7eDeV5HgZDSE6gFELZijSIDxpbVjqa8ob6upLzneqFC-D6oNS70pu3TQ6xXG9XhdNKpllN2qLJH-1y5v_dGj-PBZx3tKEES6_sj9KAjA%3D) Paul Gazelka [**> > Contribute <<

Thanks to your early support, since entering the race, our per-month fundraising has managed to lead the Republican field for governor! Your commitment has led us to raise nearly $546k and have more than $460k cash on hand. We're in this for the long haul! As we move forward in this election, our record is what matters. I have proven that I can win. I have proven that under my leadership we can get the job done. When Republicans seemed to lose every seat in Minnesota, the Senate kept their majority. Without our Senate majority, imagine the extent of the government takeover we'd be facing! I’m grateful for the endorsement and continued support for governor by the Highway Patrol. I carry with pride the title of the prestigious “legislator of the year award” from both the Chiefs of police and the Minnesota Police and Peace Officers Association (MPPOA), the rank-and-file members. Public safety is the number one issue we face as we work to bring more moderates and independents on our team. Having the support of many of our law enforcement community proves that I have consistently been a champion for the women and men in blue. One thing is clear: I’m battle tested. It’s time to take our state back, but first, I have one major hurdle: the Republican endorsement on May 14th. Thank you for your time, effort, and commitment to the movement! Paul Gazelka | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

name: Nikki Haley
subject: What if I told you…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle. |
---
Peter,

What if I told you we have a chance to...

...defeat one of the most liberal Democrats in the Senate?

...take back the Senate by winning just ONE race in Georgia?

...elect a conservative superstar and football hero to the United States Senate?

What if I told you we can do ALL THREE?

**That's why I'm endorsing my friend, Herschel Walker.**

**[Republican Herschel Walker is the clear choice for the U.S. Senate in Georgia, but he needs you to join his team. body:
One of the greatest figures in American history, Abraham Lincoln, was born on February 12, 1809.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_4_newsletter&n=1) | |

In the coming weeks, Republicans across the State of Illinois will honor the 16th President during their annual Lincoln Day Dinners. My running mate, Aaron Del Mar, and I will be attending as many of these dinners as we can. Check out our events tab on our website and see if we will be at a Lincoln Day Dinner near you! We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail! ### **My response to the Governor’s State of the State **
The Governor delivered his State of the State Address this week. Here is the statement I released to the media.
**“** Today we witnessed how out of touch our billionaire Governor, JB Pritzker, is with the people of Illinois. In his State of the State/Budget address, he described the State of Illinois in terms that only someone who spends his days in the cocoon of a North-side mansion or private jet could use.
JB Pritzker has not done one thing to improve the fundamental fiscal trajectory of the state. Biden paid off JB’s Illinois credit cards last year, but we are still in a fiscal death spiral. A one-time bailout from the federal government does not equate with sound fiscal management. Millions of dollars spent on TV and digital ads doesn’t turn fantasy into reality either.
The truth is that Illinois, outside of the Astor Street Mansion, is far different than what JB described. Chicago and its suburbs are the crime capitols of the country. Our unfunded public pension liability is at $130 billion – the worst in the nation. Our state has lost hundreds of thousands of jobs due to JB’s heavy handed, unilateral decision to shut down the state’s economy. We are the highest taxed state in the country and more people left Illinois in the last decade than any other state.
All might be well with the wine and cheese crowd but for the rest of us, it’s time for a new direction in Illinois.”
### Action needed on HB 4640
There is a frightening bill working its way through the legislative process.
House Bill would “make any and all public health data related to residents of that local health department's jurisdiction available to that local health department for the purposes of preventing or controlling disease, injury, or disability.”
In other words, your private information will be made available to government workers without your consent. Not only will your information be available to government employees, but they would be authorized to use that information to "prevent or control disease."
This is an egregious abuse of power that would give public health officials virtually unchecked power over our lives.
The legislation appears to be stalled, but we need everyone to keep the pressure up. So far, there have been more than 13,000 people who have signed witness slips opposing this bill. We need to keep it going. This legislation is an assault on our freedom and must be stopped.
### Illinois economy shrinks
A new report shows how Illinois’s population loss is hurting the state’s economy.
According to the report from the Illinois Policy Institute, Illinois’ sustained population loss has resulted in a loss of more than $30 billion in economic activity. Illinois’s economy is $31.4 billion short of what it should be, resulting from the pandemic lockdowns combined with eight straight years of population loss.
The population loss is a direct result of Governor Pritzker’s failed leadership. People are leaving in droves to escape Illinois’s high taxes and bad economic policies. It was also Governor Pritzker who joined other blue state governors in locking down our economy.
These lockdown policies have proved to be an enormous mistake. The lockdowns only reduced COVID-19 mortality by 0.2%, according to a Johns Hopkins University report but did tremendous harm to our economy.
The John Hopkins report states, “In consequence, lockdown policies are ill-founded and should be rejected as a pandemic policy instrument."
Thanks to Pritzker’s poor decisions, the Illinois economy is more than $30 billion smaller than it should be. Rest assured, a Rabine administration will be focused on economic growth and correcting Pritzker’s costly mistakes.
